subject: THIS is why we reach out so much. Please take a moment to read:
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,

Peter, last week, 7 of Georgia’s 9 Republican representatives in Congress voted to SLASH funding for Medicaid and to INCREASE the average American’s taxes by $1,500 A YEAR — all to fund more tax cuts for billionaires like Elon Musk.
This expense will reach far beyond the dollar, and it’s a cost we can't afford.
Now, we’re headed towards ANOTHER government shutdown under House Republicans’ “leadership.”

name: J. Weil
subject: does crippling recession "Make America Great Again"??
body:
| |
---
Trump is taking a bat to our economy at the exact worst moment. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzUyNzQ2ODA2ODM5MDU1LFwiclwiOjE0ODM1MjgyMzk1Njg2Njc4OX0iLCJzIjoiMzg1NWU1YjVlNWY5ZmMwZSJ9)

Friend,

As markets start to tank from Trump’s reckless tariffs on Canada and Mexico, the real plan behind this right-wing plot to wreck our government is becoming clearer.

Is this what Trump and Musk meant when they said that Americans will have to “ _endure hardship_ ” as they dismantle our government and consolidate power solely in Trump’s hands?__**
**
|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzUyNzQ2ODE0MTc5MDg5LFwiclwiOjE0ODM1MjgyMzk1Njg2Njc4OX0iLCJzIjoiNTllOGEyYTg3YjU3MjYyNyJ9)
---
|
---
The Atlanta Fed’s GDP forecast just predicted -3% GDP growth _this quarter_ based on Trump’s steep tariffs on China, Canada, and Mexico, firings of federal workers, and mass deportations.

_Does a crippling recession “Make America Great Again”?_**__****[
](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzUyNzQ2ODE4MzczMzk0LFwiclwiOjE0ODM1MjgyMzk1Njg2Njc4OX0iLCJzIjoiMjkwNTZjMjI0YTU4MjIxYyJ9)**

---
|
---
There is only one upshot to this disaster: we are in the midst of three **special elections that could flip control of the U.S. House of Representatives and empower Democrats to stop Trump from ruining the economy**.

This is the exact type of news that wakes up non-political voters and forces them to pay attention. **_We need to be ready to greet them with our positive message and a chance to take action to fix Trump’s mess._****[

I know we ask a lot, but this is why it is so important that we never let up. Voters are getting angrier about Trump’s wrecking of our economy—we can win if we talk to them _right now_. Can you chip in any amount to help us win?](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzUyNzQ2ODI1NzEzNDI4LFwiclwiOjE0ODM1MjgyMzk1Njg2Njc4OX0iLCJzIjoiMzkxODRmNjgxMjE3OTgxNCJ9)**

name: Your Doctor.
subject: Medical Jobs Cannot be Put on the Chopping Block
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Across the country, we’re seeing political agendas take precedence over sound policy. Now, Idaho’s legislature is threatening to dissolve a successful 53-year-old medical education program for purely political reasons. This should be a warning to us here in Florida. We are 23 days away from a pivotal election, and could end up in the same shoes if we do not gather the support of willing Americans like you.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/75304968754E6D435A63713636444142704D6970766747506577564D4150703935635A4869573431304738715348534E4E336C4C6A712B5275536E4E2F697A55/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-08%20at%208.20.43%E2%80%AFPM.png]
We already have a healthcare crisis in our rural communities. We must ensure our medical training programs remain strong, well-funded, and focused on delivering quality care—not political talking points.
If you believe in facts over politics , chip in today to help me fight for a better Florida. Even $9 helps us organize events and get local communities involved in an election that halts GOP scams and implements real legislation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/75304968754E6D435A63713636444142704D6970766747506577564D4150703935635A4869573431304738715348534E4E336C4C6A712B5275536E4E2F697A55/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-23%20at%208.53.29%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Together, we’ll ensure that access to quality healthcare always comes before partisan games.
Yours in the Fight,
Gay Valimont
Candidate for FL-1
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States

Our GOP Trifecta is off to a hot start, and polls indicate that the American people are with us.
I’m inviting YOU to complete our State of the Nation Survey today.
|

Our GOP Trifecta is off to a hot start, and polls indicate that the American people are with us.

I’m inviting YOU to complete our State of the Nation Survey today. | | | | | Our GOP Trifecta is off to a hot start, and polls indicate that the American people are with us. But where do you stand on the issues that matter? "This is your chance to grade our performance. House Republicans have just released their State of the Nation Survey, and YOU are invited to complete it and share your thoughts with House Leadership." | | | "ACCESS SURVEY" | State of the Nation Survey Email: "%%Emailc%%" Patriot ID: Friend-47-8349 Survey Status: MISSING Deadline: 11:59 pm | | "COMPLETE MY SURVEY" We know what the fake news media and the Radical Left lunatics think of our performance- they hate to see all the progress we 've made. But what's more important to us is what Americans like you think of all we've done up to this point. "Will you take just a few minutes to fill out our State of the Nation Survey?" | | | "STATE OF THE NATION SURVEY" I hope to see your response very soon, Friend. Yours in patriotism, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jackson County Republican Party
subject: 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner Fundraiser on March 22. Deadline to buy tickets is March 10th!
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNjk2MjEyNDY0MDIxODA1MjI4JmM9ZDZ1MSZlPTAmYj0xNDIyNjIwMTg0JmQ9bjRxM2wyeQ==.-pEwJGOJsz5wSmDaPWVEX1pOoieKbcUSad0vCAB-EYs)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner Fundraiser on March 22nd at the Rogue Valley Country Club!
---
| |
---
| The deadline to buy tickets for our event is Monday, March 10th. Please call [541-770-5277](tel:541-770-5277)or email us at [LDD@jcor.gop](mailto:LDD@jcor.gop).
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Republican Friends and Supporters,

Thank you to our long-time members for supporting our events, candidate meet & greets and meetings as well as your donations of time and money. We would also like to thank all our new supporters and welcome them warmly to the party.

This email is to announce our up-coming, exciting 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner on March 22 at the Rogue Valley Country Club! Dinner tickets are $120 each, a table for 10 is $1200. This year we're also pleased to offer Sponsorship Opportunities. Please see more information on the attached flyer. After 5pm attire is suggested. If you are interested in attending please send your contact information to [LDD@jcor.gop](mailto:LDD@jcor.gop) . More information on purchasing tickets will be coming soon.

This is the first time we have sent the “Save the Date” in an electronic format and we're excited for the opportunity to reach more people. Please join us for this popular annual event and mingle and celebrate with your fellow conservatives. Also, please share this information with your friends and family.

Warm Wishes,
JCRP Chair, Joyce Michelangelo
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | Sign your DOGE Note of Support for Elon Musk right away!
---
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPmzAQRn-NuQXZY2Pg4ENSkhy221bZVaWekDO2E1c4EOOAtr--IkK5zOHNk76nw9B596VIuSMAV29GAkD4lgDc_8whPv6Gt-PmHn6dNnf5IxTLF76t6gQv-Yb69m_38Z0Kx8ZBdFdzub9N7KWnr8G-5HU0t0H7bqFlkxnFnaEis4qVgokauGTZVZ0BhUZuLBOyxDNKdMgAz5pVTmJtM6-AQkE5rSkvAERO-bkq0AjniqrEEoigz51cBxs9ajamWcfY9yHHPmSduqY0jM-wA4GDDho1Jt_f8minKceewGFMsWB1QVlducpwuaj88EihHftHREt4s38nIBeSbAyEN3NkK0AdBu0vN8KbNVW2u-bYbt-3n23z87hvT_vf7cfn9rRZThaVGWbfdX6UJRH08oxfUicF_wMAAP__r-GCLg)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, **Elon Musk is under fire from Democrats and bureaucrats – for doing exactly what President Trump tasked him with.** President Trump launched the _Department of Government Efficiency_ to slash wasteful spending and put power back in the hands of the American people. Now, Elon and his team at DOGE have exposed one of the biggest slush funds in Washington: **_USAID_.** Let’s show Elon Musk and President Trump that we stand with them. **[**Sign your _DOGE Note of Support for Elon Musk_ today!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPmzAQRn-NuQXZY2Pg4ENSkhy221bZVaWekDO2E1c4EOOAtr--IkK5zOHNk76nw9B596VIuSMAV29GAkD4lgDc_8whPv6Gt-PmHn6dNnf5IxTLF76t6gQv-Yb69m_38Z0Kx8ZBdFdzub9N7KWnr8G-5HU0t0H7bqFlkxnFnaEis4qVgokauGTZVZ0BhUZuLBOyxDNKdMgAz5pVTmJtM6-AQkE5rSkvAERO-bkq0AjniqrEEoigz51cBxs9ajamWcfY9yHHPmSduqY0jM-wA4GDDho1Jt_f8minKceewGFMsWB1QVlducpwuaj88EihHftHREt4s38nIBeSbAyEN3NkK0AdBu0vN8KbNVW2u-bYbt-3n23z87hvT_vf7cfn9rRZThaVGWbfdX6UJRH08oxfUicF_wMAAP__r-GCLg)**
---
[ **Sign the Note of Support** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPmzAQRn-NuQXZY2Pg4ENSkhy221bZVaWekDO2E1c4EOOAtr--IkK5zOHNk76nw9B596VIuSMAV29GAkD4lgDc_8whPv6Gt-PmHn6dNnf5IxTLF76t6gQv-Yb69m_38Z0Kx8ZBdFdzub9N7KWnr8G-5HU0t0H7bqFlkxnFnaEis4qVgokauGTZVZ0BhUZuLBOyxDNKdMgAz5pVTmJtM6-AQkE5rSkvAERO-bkq0AjniqrEEoigz51cBxs9ajamWcfY9yHHPmSduqY0jM-wA4GDDho1Jt_f8minKceewGFMsWB1QVlducpwuaj88EihHftHREt4s38nIBeSbAyEN3NkK0AdBu0vN8KbNVW2u-bYbt-3n23z87hvT_vf7cfn9rRZThaVGWbfdX6UJRH08oxfUicF_wMAAP__r-GCLg)
---
The radicals are furious that DOGE has taken on USAID – and it’s no mystery why. For years this bloated agency and the Biden State Department have funneled your tax dollars into left-wing nonsense like:
---
* **$1.5 million** for DEI in Serbian workplaces
* **$70,000** for a DEI musical in Ireland
* **$47,000** for a transgender opera in Colombia
* **$32,000** for a transgender comic in Peru
* **$37 million** to the World Health Organization
* **$16 million** for gender development contractors
* **$4 million** for a Center for Climate-Positive Development

---
And that’s just scratching the surface. I am grateful to President Trump, Elon Musk, and all of DOGE for exposing this abuse and **ENDING** it. If you agree, then please **[sign your DOGE Note of Support to Elon Musk now!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPmzAQRn-NuQXZY2Pg4ENSkhy221bZVaWekDO2E1c4EOOAtr--IkK5zOHNk76nw9B596VIuSMAV29GAkD4lgDc_8whPv6Gt-PmHn6dNnf5IxTLF76t6gQv-Yb69m_38Z0Kx8ZBdFdzub9N7KWnr8G-5HU0t0H7bqFlkxnFnaEis4qVgokauGTZVZ0BhUZuLBOyxDNKdMgAz5pVTmJtM6-AQkE5rSkvAERO-bkq0AjniqrEEoigz51cBxs9ajamWcfY9yHHPmSduqY0jM-wA4GDDho1Jt_f8minKceewGFMsWB1QVlducpwuaj88EihHftHREt4s38nIBeSbAyEN3NkK0AdBu0vN8KbNVW2u-bYbt-3n23z87hvT_vf7cfn9rRZThaVGWbfdX6UJRH08oxfUicF_wMAAP__r-GCLg)** Fellow Conservative, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors. **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet****on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state****legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and****delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and****candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to****meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000****AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in****with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** **Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens.** And today, with the new Trump administration taking on the rot and waste in Washington, we have an unprecedented opportunity to expand our advocacy and help enact the Make America Great Again agenda. But we need every conservative patriot to stand with us! Because we know what’s coming – the radical left is fighting mad about the overdue audit of USAID, and you can bet they will increase their attacks as President Trump and DOGE continue to cut the waste, fraud, and abuse. We won’t let the left tank this critical project! **Let’s show Elon and President Trump that _We the People_ stand behind their efforts to fix the broken system in Washington. We’ve got to be louder than the radical Democrats lashing out!**
---
[ **Sign the Note of Support** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPmzAQRn-NuQXZY2Pg4ENSkhy221bZVaWekDO2E1c4EOOAtr--IkK5zOHNk76nw9B596VIuSMAV29GAkD4lgDc_8whPv6Gt-PmHn6dNnf5IxTLF76t6gQv-Yb69m_38Z0Kx8ZBdFdzub9N7KWnr8G-5HU0t0H7bqFlkxnFnaEis4qVgokauGTZVZ0BhUZuLBOyxDNKdMgAz5pVTmJtM6-AQkE5rSkvAERO-bkq0AjniqrEEoigz51cBxs9ajamWcfY9yHHPmSduqY0jM-wA4GDDho1Jt_f8minKceewGFMsWB1QVlducpwuaj88EihHftHREt4s38nIBeSbAyEN3NkK0AdBu0vN8KbNVW2u-bYbt-3n23z87hvT_vf7cfn9rRZThaVGWbfdX6UJRH08oxfUicF_wMAAP__r-GCLg)
---
AMAC Action is committed to supporting President Trump’s **America First** agenda – including his fight to shrink our out-of-control bureaucracy and dismantle the deep state. But none of this happens without bold patriots like you standing with us. Your support gives us the strength to take on the establishment and fight for the country we love. That’s why after you’ve signed your _DOGE Note of Support to Elon Musk_ ,[ **I hope you’ll make a generous donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 to AMAC Action to help us supercharge our advocacy and fight for your values.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jkGPmzAQRn-NuQXZY2Pg4ENSkhy221bZVaWekDO2E1c4EOOAtr--IkK5zOHNk76nw9B596VIuSMAV29GAkD4lgDc_8whPv6Gt-PmHn6dNnf5IxTLF76t6gQv-Yb69m_38Z0Kx8ZBdFdzub9N7KWnr8G-5HU0t0H7bqFlkxnFnaEis4qVgokauGTZVZ0BhUZuLBOyxDNKdMgAz5pVTmJtM6-AQkE5rSkvAERO-bkq0AjniqrEEoigz51cBxs9ajamWcfY9yHHPmSduqY0jM-wA4GDDho1Jt_f8minKceewGFMsWB1QVlducpwuaj88EihHftHREt4s38nIBeSbAyEN3NkK0AdBu0vN8KbNVW2u-bYbt-3n23z87hvT_vf7cfn9rRZThaVGWbfdX6UJRH08oxfUicF_wMAAP__r-GCLg) With your support, we can help dismantle the bureaucratic state and restore our nation’s greatness. Thank you in advance for standing with AMAC Action!
---
| | Thank you, friend.
---
For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_** **AMAC Action**

subject: WHOA!!... Democrats have a shot at 2 Senate flips!!!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:
I’m running for Governor in Florida

**MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT:**
I’m OFFICIALLY running for Governor of the State of Florida.
This is President Trump’s _STRONGEST_ Supporter in the House Byron Donalds - first and foremost I want to _**THANK YOU**_ for being a Die Hard MAGA Patriot.
It’s YOUR steadfast resolve that’s inspired me to serve the Great State of Florida.
****Also, THANK YOU to President Trump for already**ENDORSING **me.** MAGA!**

Byron Donalds _****_

name: Aiden Buzzeti
subject: Can I give you a FREE book?
body:
This is the blueprint to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv9uhl1l43u8dq0i8f6fgpgt1r8s6a5tkgnfo810_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | Hi, this is Aiden Buzzeti. I am the founder of a brand new organization called the 1776 Project Foundation. Over the last few years, I’ve spent 24 hours a day FIGHTING to get conservatives elected to school boards across the country. **_The radical left has captured our schools nationwide... And they have an overwhelming presence in our nation’s school boards._** **_And what’s worse is that nearly ALL of the institutions that support, train, and guide school board members are bought and paid for by wealthy, radical left-wing elites!_** That’s why I’ve been working to put more conservatives on school boards all over the country! **But once a school board member is elected... Then what?** **[THAT is where the 1776 Project Foundation comes in. We’re on a mission to deliver CRITICAL training to EVERY school board member in America and we need your help!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z55teqpcfcbr907hcqh0pii9nm5l1uleoccpe5r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6cdh2bs)**
---
[_**UNLOCK FREE BOOK**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgft7pnjn214tf6umbu0n4ooro2u31nkojvdk7ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6cdh2bs)
---
What does the 1776 Project Foundation stand for? We’re conservative to the core... We’re ready to DEMOLISH the radical left’s influence over our schools... And we’re on track to train THOUSANDS of school board members to go into battle against the radical left this year alone! My team and I put together what could be the most important book of the 21st Century – and I want to send you a digital copy of it for FREE today. The book is called **_[**_The First 100 Days: Your Guide to Being an Effective School Board Member_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4irjl6rqkvc8vqagjlv6ngvo4tsgj8e82mckrc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6cdh2bs)_** This book is 167 pages of SOLID GOLD for grassroots conservatives who are new to elected office. **_It gives school board members a comprehensive HOW TO GUIDE on:_** ✅ **DEFEATING** Radical Leftist Propaganda like Critical Race Theory and Transgender Ideology. ✅ **RESTORING** meritocracy and excellence to their schools. ✅ **WITHSTANDING** attacks from the radical left & beating their well-oiled influence machine. **This is our VERY first piece of training material and we want to get it into the hands of every school board member in America...** But we need your help! You see, printing and distributing thousands of books isn’t cheap – especially when you consider that there are over 100,000 school board members, nationwide... ... and it costs around $5 to print a single copy! **_Here are two ways you can help today!_** **_[**_FIRST: Give just $5, $10, $15, or $20 to help us print more of these critical books and deliver them to conservative school board members who could use expert guidance!_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zddp1cnjjmc0b18utskm4t6lopsd7lh97g43isog_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6cdh2bs)_** **_[**_SECOND: UNLOCK your free copy with a donation of ANY amount and send the digital copy of our book to YOUR local school board members!_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztpl0fg9mrdjdb5veinh76kip4c55n9bosu077ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6cdh2bs)_** Thank you and God bless you, Aiden Buzzeti, President 1776 Project Foundation

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo0gu2703r2fj1ev8lpojj2n3oqon1bflorknsp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1p0c0fbcoateotohjbibm86m5u65g5k84m7d91g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6chh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2c51qv9vbrsj13jeb1cffjq00s3bk4f7t57dhag_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6chh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqolpeprcr6igiurv39i208gsp3r6tfohjdna2f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob6chh2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Subject: Facebook CEO slams the Biden administration
body:
Elon Musk made a bold (and expensive) move to buy Twitter after seeing the tech giant de-platform The Babylon Bee simply for telling a joke.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3m93166hr36jf6cr8l6irhfu7pg9q6hk5qp6e9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, Elon Musk made a bold (and expensive) move to buy Twitter after seeing the tech giant de-platform The Babylon Bee simply for telling a joke.While Elon joined The Bee in launching a revolution for free speech, X stood alone in rejecting unquestioning conformity. Censorship remained king on virtually every other social media platform, including Facebook. Despite the woke left's best efforts to silence The Babylon Bee, we haven't feared retribution from advertisers or being 'canceled' by woke social media platforms** because we have freedom-loving Americans like you who support our work.** **[**Subscribers are the backbone of The Babylon Bee, which allows us to battle for freedom of thought, the exchange of ideas, and truth. Your support as a member will allow us to continue creating satirical content and fighting for free speech.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlu21qsjpc7fuk3h4qlt0df5bb43uev5o2rgj7d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zenieird7qv5jccn7tot6tc4svn5befm4kvbtsco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbk9tjprkro957651i0rshj8ce97h0stcsbnskjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)
---
Given Facebook's history of suppressing dissent, it was a huge surprise when Mark Zuckerberg, CEO of Facebook and Meta recently outed the Biden administration for demanding his platform censor opposing viewpoints.Appearing on Joe Rogan's podcast, Zuckerberg said:
---
_** "These people from the Biden administration would call up our team and, like, scream at them and curse**... Basically, it just got to this point where we were like, no, we're not going to take down things that are true... We just said, no, we're not going to take down humor and **satire**."_
---
**I wouldn 't be surprised if Biden's lackeys called up Twitter and demanded they silence The Babylon Bee** after we told a joke about Rachel Levine -- Biden's U.S. assistant secretary for health. It seems satirical that a website that got its start with church humor garnered national attention for telling a joke--but it's true, and it catapulted us into the national conversation on free speech. **[As a subscriber, you can help The Babylon Bee keep delivering fake news you can trust-- no matter what pressures we face from woke, anti-freedom activists.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh6ik82h9auqhq97qkp4dco76n614qibthr5vho_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)**
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z29dnfme3rkjspkhhnunnrts3ec24i99dqlm0uk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)
---
Given what Mark Zuckerberg shared with Joe Rogan, it seems it was common practice for Biden's team to call up social media companies and demand they remove content the administration didn't like.We certainly didn't buy ourselves any favors with headlines including, "_Joe Biden found in dumpster behind DNC Convention Center " _and _" Joe Biden praised for historic rescue efforts to save kid he pushed down a well."_But, this is America, we value freedom, and we aren't going to apologize for writing satire. **Sorry, not sorry, Joe.** Even with Biden out the door, Trump in the White House, X leading Big Tech in its allegiance to free speech, and Facebook making strides to curb its suppression of thought ... _the censorship machine hasn 't dissolved_. **[**As the free speech war wages us, please help The Babylon Bee stand on the right side of history. Join as a member today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpq2h8uspt37s5cgac95e47or5uauotvhlff9i9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmqtdm6tojbos4ctp3jt4ok0f0s1dgg49c1mmsjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob5c5h2bs)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.** Seth DillonCEO, The Babylon Bee
---
|
---

The Babylon Bee, LLC

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znmvdgit4fg2r2rkvb8qbeakffaoaj27vko9lo9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znqigdmvipe78oqte4a1hfc77m6kcco76ictd7k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob2cph2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv4n1hh3v0tv8b68lnk0r175a01mduujlkj86es0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob2cph2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9skteh1rfi5lhrm2unnrrcvmi3b8bdpsf6relb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob2cph2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuadv9bqqpji6ij7g0mn3vblgj9tvsokoio4ppu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli62ob2cph2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: Big News Drops Soon—Don’t Miss It!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=b84b7d8b09&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well and that your 2025 is off to a great start.

I am honored to have recently been elected President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors.

As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, and ensuring equitable access to services for all.

While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help drive the success of my future endeavors.

** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0f4029accb&e=c0babbc643)**

Thank you again for your partnership and for believing in my vision. I look forward to continuing to serve you and our community in the years ahead.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

P.S. Please expect a call from me soon so we can discuss your priorities for the new year and how I can best represent them.

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1745df4dac&e=c0babbc643) **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

clean_body: One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s “Theology 101” online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century. “Theology 101” has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is . You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative. We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of “Theology 101” on DVD. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc20vdqkovvtflfa6ohas6m17upnsohmu6jimsmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli66oj4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeeke4vq3nlgqcf533fe31mbfuhual4flfak8rs8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli66oj4clh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjd6u5it4mrhpki1ragra2v1qmlh2g39n6nq98rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli66oj4clh2bs)

body:

Liberal media outlets are claiming that patriots are "leaving the party in droves." If this is true, we'll be helpless to stop the socialist Far-Left from taking back control, and our country will be doomed.

**[Please do not delay in responding to this message as soon as possible. We urgently need to know where you stand.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh10918n535a9i1me36ffi4j8uqbmab80o4lct68_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zig9bv5i5juebm2741l8j308sgq5l810svd37250_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z532k9ahk9jfvni8503t2f6a831g1j8l7dccghq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr4edpqeqse7kr6sqdjfn35eh3lff6534s7makjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkt82jdteigr3n63plsn8hi7144f2r5rj3h581e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm0j301iqt6hj8b0odbjm6rbj7g13tba12a4pt18_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrn648bih1vmhq85bdl0uodq9lo8tujhuugntm68_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli61o35cdh2bs)
---
My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. name: [Joint Address Alert] GOP Senate Majority
subject: [LIVE] FLASH POLL:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now, his Senate majority needs to know... ARE YOU WITH US?

Friend,

You heard it directly from the President: _YOU_ are finally being put first again.

_And today, we can confidently say our country is WINNING!_

Our Senate majority is working faster than any in history to deliver on President Trump's America First agenda and ensure he has Congress at his back to continue delivering for YOU - _the people._

But after such a great night for our Party, we have to admit, *__this__ * one headline has us deeply concerned...
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE - _(from Gallup Polling)_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj558kkgur9uju243bs0l9rso5j3a8i3rchco6hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli69o72cph2bs)**
So, we have just ONE question for you, friend:
_**[Are YOU still with us?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcaft5f1uqqvli7u769c6m5qic3cvqd7r005uq1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli69o72cph2bs)**_
**[YES](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zofhle69u9u5d2kfaai5beeso9qrdd90pnlrmeug_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli69o72cph2bs)**

**[NO](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlpca913t0nh97d4b7unu885lf72m1ai4gitemn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli69o72cph2bs)**
**[Please complete the"GOP Senate Majority Flash Poll" right away so that the GOP knows we still have YOUR support.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh3abo9udr7ms0fn4roejo86gq1eiok5547rojlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli69o72cph2bs)**
**[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z58bafubgtaa4th0jkmbg2ls7jki93qbcs172qbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4cli69o72cph2bs)**
Thank you,

NRSC HQ
_Polling & Data Department_

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1pb2rrsa1ufnqojjrslonl807rs8c67lp8d0iu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrf74dbe8b136g414sjj9eh0fnota84c7qdcfk4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5j46ptrnvs3kiu4ghoquvv6b1a946ptms4n8ff8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z61ntgaqdfd8oqc2lkj9eggm0j90onlrknen54io_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z29vn7uos5hb8o5ekvruqtjenss7dtu0a80gajo0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbe6h5vq4tuup7giqpj7blka1n6g0n9i7pmjrn88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze4biems8elk1d8u0vqd6ff3gmbrosb48fhefrtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm5gaatpffuhokr2fn59mjqmmq61cpg47froj4p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp9ruqg6g5e9obg590t0eouj3mjik60thuqlgjsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)
---

---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---

| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znkutitec941cq5ltlro8clgpr67v7rglnf7hp9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6i8q9jabc7n2gd24l04fkal2urk0ulnenku66a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3h4rrtl53n2qbi8hst7cqcqlnqidkgsv8481810_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh60pr0c3h2bs)

The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm9bieou69tle3lc2dc1bqbgqgoq7bmmj9r67t50_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqaamteled3up9ehabksoja969moesipu2012o0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7paj6qb5e0sjlljoeues9rof8q04stneimmra78_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zloo0jo5uq5qt4qsl2qqta09acs0epu255k8c2m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8g1h26jljo427ts5vdqiti5pog2tte9iopbvre0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf5k34h2plv0a40cnfhqhir6uvjcu7fienjpia48_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zadng19l2eeamqa32fhclc639phii2os35lmonkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zunbncgoloetq73iu18pp1s1ga00usmh7n769q3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or4c1h2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

I’m OFFICIALLY running for Governor of the State of Florida.
This is President Trump’s _STRONGEST_ Supporter in the House Byron Donalds - first and foremost I want to _**THANK YOU**_ for being a Die Hard MAGA Patriot.
It’s YOUR steadfast resolve that’s inspired me to serve the Great State of Florida.
****Also, THANK YOU to President Trump for already**ENDORSING **me.** MAGA!**

So I’m lighting a **National MAGA Beacon** , calling on EVERY Patriot for aid in this critical hour!
_**[PLEASE, can you chip in a gift of $20.25 so I can begin building my war chest for the fight to come?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z15g6lchcqfdnhg873de5tdtmu9h7fear9cijo00_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh68or0c3h2bs)**_

Byron Donalds _****_

body:

Friend,

You heard it directly from the President: _YOU_ are finally being put first again.

_And today, we can confidently say our country is WINNING!_

Our Senate majority is working faster than any in history to deliver on President Trump's America First agenda and ensure he has Congress at his back to continue delivering for YOU - _the people._

name: [Joint Address Alert] GOP Senate Majority
subject: You heard from the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now, his Senate majority needs to know... ARE YOU WITH US?

Friend,

You heard it directly from the President: _YOU_ are finally being put first again.

_And today, we can confidently say our country is WINNING!_

Our Senate majority is working faster than any in history to deliver on President Trump's America First agenda and ensure he has Congress at his back to continue delivering for YOU - _the people._

But after such a great night for our Party, we have to admit, *__this__ * one headline has us deeply concerned...
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE - _(from Gallup Polling)_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9g41kecjal2ar2bgguo002ujqndksao3mseotbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh62pj4cjh2bs)**

name: Aiden Buzzeti
subject: Can I give you a FREE book?
body:
This is the blueprint to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2dljj8dm7p2aedf26ng34rbo2h4sgh8rdpkdpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh6aoj2cph2bs)
---
| | Hi, this is Aiden Buzzeti. I am the founder of a brand new organization called the 1776 Project Foundation. Over the last few years, I’ve spent 24 hours a day FIGHTING to get conservatives elected to school boards across the country. **_The radical left has captured our schools nationwide... And they have an overwhelming presence in our nation’s school boards._** **_And what’s worse is that nearly ALL of the institutions that support, train, and guide school board members are bought and paid for by wealthy, radical left-wing elites!_** That’s why I’ve been working to put more conservatives on school boards all over the country! **But once a school board member is elected... Then what?** **[THAT is where the 1776 Project Foundation comes in. We’re on a mission to deliver CRITICAL training to EVERY school board member in America and we need your help!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7a7f7efr6m6l8cscth6vh7rmrvhg0hguee1p1pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh6aoj2cph2bs)**
---
[_**UNLOCK FREE BOOK**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbfgvsbrkspcb2tjq27mkdmb8te7iqp3sddl2mt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh6aoj2cph2bs)
---
What does the 1776 Project Foundation stand for? We’re conservative to the core... We’re ready to DEMOLISH the radical left’s influence over our schools... And we’re on track to train THOUSANDS of school board members to go into battle against the radical left this year alone! My team and I put together what could be the most important book of the 21st Century – and I want to send you a digital copy of it for FREE today. The book is called **_[**_The First 100 Days: Your Guide to Being an Effective School Board Member_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjv7sibvfboj2k2qveeteq0v7q71utgkvrdtuscg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh6aoj2cph2bs)_** This book is 167 pages of SOLID GOLD for grassroots conservatives who are new to elected office. **_It gives school board members a comprehensive HOW TO GUIDE on:_** ✅ **DEFEATING** Radical Leftist Propaganda like Critical Race Theory and Transgender Ideology. ✅ **RESTORING** meritocracy and excellence to their schools. ✅ **WITHSTANDING** attacks from the radical left & beating their well-oiled influence machine. **This is our VERY first piece of training material and we want to get it into the hands of every school board member in America...** But we need your help! You see, printing and distributing thousands of books isn’t cheap – especially when you consider that there are over 100,000 school board members, nationwide... ... and it costs around $5 to print a single copy! **_Here are two ways you can help today!_** **_[**_FIRST: Give just $5, $10, $15, or $20 to help us print more of these critical books and deliver them to conservative school board members who could use expert guidance!_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt6de8g59oefe3rtdjdhdp0859l8sb2vcd26bqvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh6aoj2cph2bs)_** **_[**_SECOND: UNLOCK your free copy with a donation of ANY amount and send the digital copy of our book to YOUR local school board members!_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl6ggham8j5poq689b6h5pcc9irvgpf2sk8eo068_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clh6aoj2cph2bs)_** Thank you and God bless you, Aiden Buzzeti, President 1776 Project Foundation
---

name: Advanced Nerve Support
subject: How plants can heal nerve pain
body:
That’s why I’m thrilled to share this new discovery...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20598/6374453/dd4385dec9f7d5dcedce09d712ae79ced8466ef9/611abfc8f84360e25973c1ef738bf8c423f7b6df)
---
| | |
---
_March 9th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
If you’ve been battling numbness, burning, or tingling in your hands or feet, you know how frustrating it can be.

Those are all symptoms of underlying nerve damage... but focusing on the symptoms alone won’t fix your nerves...

And unfortunately, the medical system will prescribe tons of drugs that only give temporary relief from the symptoms to keep you coming back for more.

That’s why I’m thrilled to share this new discovery...

That addresses BOTH the symptoms AND the root cause of nerve pain...

At the same time...

So you get relief from the burning and tingling... and then, it never comes back.

Get the new, exciting details here:

[**= > How to fix the symptoms AND root cause of nerve pain**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20598/6374453/905586c77495dc83f12e575f99061afd847257a1/611abfc8f84360e25973c1ef738bf8c423f7b6df)

My favorite part about this solution is it’s natural and you can do it from home in just a few seconds each morning.

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cb80c4d34394a4a8a20fee7a7122a09&_e=NJ7RXRi50yshseM7jbiroKNLp4U5aWwjro5AhwFBKKt_ROGbaSriD61TG2HSsNqQu55NeKHevDZEVNWltJcfB_M8KEgtOf-Klcqb7VN5Miyt6H3Gv4bcOtYacerFfvi1W3Ej8XSyvr-B5mWURXXPIjmTVzjwI-F-eLRr99OsW_6quvR_Gly23fifNXC0xlvvp0YLyYzmk0OTZdG-20XmrHrsufVOVOJEzAh5L2QML_KJg1D2ItiaYahQKzEpw11KkDZXZ_lyKNiWx-YxZU6BHnBu1gisQ-9mCV7IMSgyJ3K0NZAYdptVhqjJaywoyxgziAdJrEdIRaeXYVxP2SuQw64hAfS-jCkHec9kObExU4CZx1na6Kxiq5bIkb_qwqw9j5NitHletTUcMwK-drusTIKjV_iLoOKnmP78L9JeB4HclIDu9Wd9yTin7lJHnb5b)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cb80c4d34394a4a8a20fee7a7122a09&_e=NJ7RXRi50yshseM7jbiroKNLp4U5aWwjro5AhwFBKKt_ROGbaSriD61TG2HSsNqQu55NeKHevDZEVNWltJcfB_M8KEgtOf-Klcqb7VN5Miyt6H3Gv4bcOtYacerFfvi1W3Ej8XSyvr-B5mWURXXPIjmTVzjwI-F-eLRr99OsW_6quvR_Gly23fifNXC0xlvvp0YLyYzmk0OTZdG-20XmrHrsufVOVOJEzAh5L2QML_KJg1D2ItiaYahQKzEpw11KkDZXZ_lyKNiWx-YxZU6BHnBu1gisQ-9mCV7IMSgyJ3LlA-TpCM6IdiU8sqrMJSRYz6_zTcYGCqY6PsaFZmRZEVImm4Bo9SBZBuY7fdLovGBzmvYqxytRKbvyVTWwcNwio-K76GtLaDJYHzDwlGwEvcsibY8muhTxkH2j_PhLem_rXjaxeGWBtyy9MkmMzukb)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cb80c4d34394a4a8a20fee7a7122a09&_e=NJ7RXRi50yshseM7jbiroKNLp4U5aWwjro5AhwFBKKt_ROGbaSriD61TG2HSsNqQu55NeKHevDZEVNWltJcfB_M8KEgtOf-Klcqb7VN5Miyt6H3Gv4bcOtYacerFfvi1W3Ej8XSyvr-B5mWURXXPIjmTVzjwI-F-eLRr99OsW_6quvR_Gly23fifNXC0xlvvp0YLyYzmk0OTZdG-20XmrHrsufVOVOJEzAh5L2QML_KJg1D2ItiaYahQKzEpw11KkDZXZ_lyKNiWx-YxZU6BHnBu1gisQ-9mCV7IMSgyJ3KNzyl01CXysZRALaDsXQs8ETDioNowkFgLmgP_0IjFT-tkrPnxuh6yJZgyncESbPR_HUy42dfhqAfmuw0qZsZBOVo6XziKO6YDekG6XDnv3Ittd0_1S0lzG76Oo0pDtR3AkEL6YXygMfYRWliAl9n3)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[****](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cb80c4d34394a4a8a20fee7a7122a09&_e=NJ7RXRi50yshseM7jbiroKNLp4U5aWwjro5AhwFBKKt_ROGbaSriD61TG2HSsNqQu55NeKHevDZEVNWltJcfB_M8KEgtOf-Klcqb7VN5Miyt6H3Gv4bcOtYacerFfvi1W3Ej8XSyvr-B5mWURXXPIjmTVzjwI-F-eLRr99OsW_6quvR_Gly23fifNXC0xlvvp0YLyYzmk0OTZdG-20XmrHrsufVOVOJEzAh5L2QML_KJg1D2ItiaYahQKzEpw11KkDZXZ_lyKNiWx-YxZU6BHnBu1gisQ-9mCV7IMSgyJ3KHdc55_yZPuqaPpoa8A4v5a1plwVVuo7BvfiYW2fXjA7qQCt27vbsw-QQq1FyUJfA4PwrW9xnCYJvNYSX--rL3wYywCXe_meGWkpTWnetCMCDwFFgyDy7g-cv2mOu_50rvrbbOYxJlCxI6Tn9Y7Jza)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cb80c4d34394a4a8a20fee7a7122a09&_e=NJ7RXRi50yshseM7jbiroKNLp4U5aWwjro5AhwFBKKt_ROGbaSriD61TG2HSsNqQu55NeKHevDZEVNWltJcfB_M8KEgtOf-Klcqb7VN5Miyt6H3Gv4bcOtYacerFfvi1W3Ej8XSyvr-B5mWURXXPIjmTVzjwI-F-eLRr99OsW_6quvR_Gly23fifNXC0xlvvp0YLyYzmk0OTZdG-20XmrHrsufVOVOJEzAh5L2QML_KJg1D2ItiaYahQKzEpw11KkDZXZ_lyKNiWx-YxZU6BHnBu1gisQ-9mCV7IMSgyJ3K2V5NUTJBn_9Z1LdkOly1GODHMpykFeLfRKJDVyDr_Ug3j4L5qhk0cAwfy3gTHTc35g_2SqzwfqVkTxYFej-9o3Cy8chxrG254-bIVemlnXVQtmIUMFbtY2gumB1h_HDE7cOthEoJkNtjaxK1GhyGB)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT:**
I'm OFFICIALLY running for Governor of the State of Florida.
This is President Trump's _STRONGEST_ Supporter in the House Byron Donalds - first and foremost I want to _**THANK YOU**_ for being a Die Hard MAGA Patriot.
It's YOUR steadfast resolve that's inspired me to serve the Great State of Florida.
****Also, THANK YOU to President Trump for already**ENDORSING **me.** MAGA!**

body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/WX446S7b9_gQ60rG27ZeS3n3S7OZibtdy25J0podUiUbGvm2J_BA_PqMSP5W-0LUl_FF1Pri9bbTUwpM1NaYQ3fE_oRKNZqAz24ODISGDGvUCW86aCH9uGW5kh14jCbXa2xjm8WfaUy7CjR9jbj4NWlRdDVjEj4fHcUaq4cgI45pcwSFre2AqJ_ItW6Y88aX5OmF4jLpDMfPwE32i2twJir9l12A72HRwxCwE-HrQJNd3Ejvu_QpQxkjGpo9hthU55OekNqYmqf29dU0hjamaVuvMdKsom-3codQSLi7zzCU2ZbJrgV6ze9T5ofDjFGRhfioUjF3Bnoqoi3p54jZGZ8djtwIDZ7nX8G_jPYMeS_K7-0G5J4Umif9RC-FXCP3a2h41Klh5JrTFlsI60s_iw-YZkrYfGXmnnr96wjeSfAOzaH5arXA5Cq8UPruNr0_LPIoAuYp_Fv7NB165hjuRkNDLhBP9jn2nHZibmElgJEdVBdmLl1IcXfX/wQXbYCQ_sdJaFqvsoI98c7s8rJ1vGkLG/6) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17d45614-c603-44c4-abf8-2e5572e6041b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
