name: The Flyover
subject: Federal Leakers, Egg Investigations, and the Toughest Tongue Twister
body:
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said Friday that DHS has [identified two "criminal leakers"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfA5uj4zDYHhi6eEvXjhYx53AthgijRPn3lbt3fnqfnt7Xdbl6Tpzvn34n17ayIKDpQHcwLcFzei-9DG4jQtKSnBp6ZZTtR5TRDaMng1ob3IabUpbMCmb1SgcNAfwg2Z0aaJgU4IRwmVbTbzbYAUaL4TaIHihwK_XyXTi3SFt6lyfVy1p2mVxs7XEI_SFwFji3SJFTOjOBcyw7ZXodAmcfds58tOoblyxwNmrUGmwX4tHlQntXPYcukf-hehZkdeHx4pT4sOeG--75z5Xtvw-eDn8DAAD__21dXT0) within its ranks and will refer them to the Department of Justice for felony prosecutions.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdF6ZMb8FRaQV3U2bEg3MGJzYmBhzEXn6iM1KqVKk9OfROaNvvn0MH2idXeev6LlLJgygoJRKS9UOhNZdQ5FRZ5iBdcZdXhd5mVdFA9nS5QrKkbDiZiTMVVlMRptmggbr2pBuM9vdaUqrNlfQgnq0U1mYiqpaNRXQWItCMdkU4uN7sGta2LgrfHJ8TMFnrltS2nahvwjoBfTneT7GiLQTo9vvEQH96MIsoM-VRI-_wiq3aD3LkVc2Nu3yCof0eMk1JPljDafEMRxJ6P5IftjDEScW-vm3WVJCAdX965ns4YV-kt03h9cbT-g3tPMq9PM_W_9olbcTAdU0WHpltK8nTj8HHwjdvU48-I0WjDRj4jfNYkfbaZ2ze3Xbmz1a97KV_nW9zw5-BwAA__9yzJ77) | |
# Sunday, March 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1862, the [first battle between ironclad ships](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAURp8GOgxcQMeC4m_s5m-3NAxcxrtBMUjG-PYbt9_6S75zcr6e89NTpu3936_oWiozSLBCaiHHOXrK12x4dAkRUHN0ajDKqt48gC8OYgg2GWXUw2qvQhqMDKPGZFO0QSEnd79JLUclYQTZjcGa1Md-kI8e4mtgRmKkVmr3XWhrC6Z8lQ_WLpSVZ7e0th9M_2MwMZjO8-wWOlqp170zmFrZKRwMJr9ipeA3EehDWZy-MphevrWMoiSx-HVvZRO1-Hjw6uJ-Us509LfAe_WUf4HtrwAfBz8BAAD__17dXpI) took place during the Battle of Hampton Roads in Virginia. The _U.S.S. Monitor_ ran off the Confederate _C.S.S. Virginia_ (formerly the _Merrimac_) after a four-hour exchange of cannon fire. Ever wonder what your [texting habits](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71ugzAQAOCnsbcg-_wDDB66sKVrR4TtA64yOIJTaN6-Sve-wCd9X_fxPlGhffmcNgw81xEUuJsyN9WPeaLyGq3MYUYENBKDbq122tsO5BowW-u76L2PABpMl6LSkExyLuveOEnhrSmjeq2gB9X0ydnZZ9-qzkOOrbAKM3E9mu9KO684l1d94tGkuskSVubHKcyHgEHAcF1XEw_iJlUBA-MP077c1ikSnwIGeYT8uKgUOv0bXraJyh_E_8WeAX4DAAD__4pjTmc) say about you? Here's today's pro tip: DON'T TEXT IN ALL CAPS! If you're an Amazon Prime subscriber, be sure to check out today's sponsor, [Brad's Deals,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdF6ZMb8FRaQV3U2bEg3MGJzYmBhzEXn6iM1KqVKk9OfROaNvvn0MH2idXeev6LlLJgygoJRKS9UOhNZdQ5FRZ5iBdcZdXhd5mVdFA9nS5QrKkbDiZiTMVVlMRptmggbr2pBuM9vdaUqrNlfQgnq0U1mYiqpaNRXQWItCMdkU4uN7sGta2LgrfHJ8TMFnrltS2nahvwjoBfTneT7GiLQTo9vvEQH96MIsoM-VRI-_wiq3aD3LkVc2Nu3yCof0eMk1JPljDafEMRxJ6P5IftjDEScW-vm3WVJCAdX965ns4YV-kt03h9cbT-g3tPMq9PM_W_9olbcTAdU0WHpltK8nTj8HHwjdvU48-I0WjDRj4jfNYkfbaZ2ze3Xbmz1a97KV_nW9zw5-BwAA__9yzJ77) to take advantage of special deals in Prime you may not be aware of.
|
---
## Hackman Died of Heart Disease, Wife From Hantavirus
Forensic experts have concluded that actor Gene Hackman [died of heart disease](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L-OszAQBPCngc6RWf-LCxdfky5feyVa7DXsxZgIrER5-xPXXzkaafTTfN3HO3LhOv_HlULL2wgSjJBKSD8m5PIZdZ9CJgJSPYXB6cEMVl-hX4LRRjqIxhklSSpvs7FZyYzZGIcQew7nmlTSDxI8yIuPRmebrJNXC2lynZaUuG375Xvj2hbK5bO9aL_Ebe1LWFp7Hp3618Gtgxs-K72PszrD3jgW6uA2UyWxYHysWEUibIuYqB0fgTs-8I2C64uOxjM23qqIXk8QJ51MckjR44DK43WYtE1Tyr7fQ3q-uRQ-7OmbV-Ty62l__fMK8BMAAP__XW9nHA) with complications from Alzheimer’s disease, and his wife, Betsy Arakawa, died of a rodent-borne disease at their home in Santa Fe, New Mexico. The remains of Hackman, 95, and Arakawa, 65, were discovered on Feb. 26. Authorities revealed that Arakawa likely died on Feb. 11 at home from [hantavirus pulmonary syndrome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAURp9GOwxeFMeC4m_s5m-3NFe4jOwgTIAZ4ttv3H67LznJl5PzdV_v6LwLj_94kCo2rsBhZFwwPq8GnT_XoTXKEgGJllQ_Df3Yy-EG7a405ygGq4FLNFZuYthGwSepRa-NIdM6db1xweeewwy8m_U4WGnkxG8SzDY1AyfjSkzdd3Sh7GT9GT-UOh2P1qu9lFduxL8GlgaWWmuntxyo5os3sFzzAjsWViJ7hlgZbvFd2I6h4Meld2avtz9iwHSyfAaT4kHsQYHYjvp5YGDVWWIblXwyTPjEig0sbVLmVZ33LsvL8nGg879W5a9KHwU_AQAA___UDmzw). Hackman, in the advanced stages of Alzheimer’s, apparently was unaware that his wife was dead. Hackman’s pacemaker last showed signs of activity a week later, Feb. 18, the day he likely died. The couple’s dog, Zinna, was found dead in a crate about 10 to 15 feet from Arakawa's body. Their two other dogs—Bear and Nikki – [were found alive](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAYBOCnwRsW_D_GZmCoVHlLl6rqaBEDNimGyBBHefvK3bveSadP932ZLibEkJYPszldfZ6AQUcZUqYma0J8TaKx2jsHDhuneS94x6UYoFn17HkvvPTYGdUPHNHPvpMSlVG96Rg2QZ9rDJniDBSwVs2d8NLKng0S7LUngjkbat7bWw6prs7HVz7c3s55a6Jea70Xgm8ERgKjuc7JPUu75LMmMH59EhgXlxxdzfyzmVQo0PLYj3CEtFCbl0KL8Y4ae3uUemZ-Dy5ZAmOpeX8RHIMl-M65wgEVimbX9v4MMYYiT9yymRD_MPW_cw4NvwEAAP__DdhlSw).
## Columbia University to Address Antisemitism
Columbia University Interim President Katrina Armstrong conceded that the federal government [has “legitimate concerns”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2RyZM5B48NCFLV07ImMfyVXGRvaRlH9f0b3Lt3zS09P7uk93R5HS49OtaHnJEyjopdJSmSk4isfUNcEuiIC6Qdteu7Zvh-4GzdPOGk23eNB92-k2LMEFHZwxrjVDCHpuyJ40pZVpFRhQF-P7bhnCcFW3AcJ8FZ3CQJzL5TtT4icu8cgvLBef1ybaJ_NWhf4QMAoY07HlyuclYDzBAkalz7kJGPcqE76rgHHZU6D0kH7nKjlLX9AxSpd-CPmQPiePJUnH0ue4rzM5uSd6YanEh9wKVgqYWMDYFBu2N8VIdThdH6uj-OfG_7V6WfgNAAD__9GXbGM) as it cuts hundreds of millions of dollars in funding over antisemitism at the Ivy League school. The reaction comes one day after a federal task force convened by President Trump [axed roughly $400 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L-OszAQBPCngc7RejEQFy6-Jl2-9krkP-tkTwYj20nE25-4_srRSKOf5uu-3C0n3h7_7Uqmxbwg4ChgEKCXYDkdi-qDiURIQ09GzkqOclJX7J_mStGjlVGDp2i9Q_RjHPWIyktPIHs25xoMoCWgRrhoP6o4hWmG64TBzZ0CCtxyuXxn3tqTYjrym8rF57VP5tnaXrvhX4e3Dm923-hTz-oMpbFP1OHN5_RaHVvx2vhNpXI7xF5yo9qqsFvjSis3rqvYbaLaeCPBtVhKQnsE7QkUkHITBJwBnQKnPUY3oOyLCfuHU-I6ndbHajn92tpfX70N_gQAAP__H2Fstw) in grants and contracts, citing the school’s noncompliance with anti-discrimination laws. Armstrong wrote [a letter to the Columbia community](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGOqzAQgOHTQAcaj20IhYvX0OW1WyLDjJNZGRsZJ1Fuv8r2e4H_0_91Xa5eoqTbf7-zqyEvCGg70B1MC3mJ78W05AIzsm7ZqdEoqwZzwfbuVuONXWHU1jKqEYi3SRmlPYEluoRW3KcGGiYFOCH002ZNGGgY4TIgrWNjgElqLv13llTvHOI7P7n0W97b6O61Hmej_zU4NzgfhU8hTrXfcnzsq_ie6dHgnPh1NjgXPo-cSNKtC0xcfOz8ViWntjg6XhKjnMOHvO1e4i9R_1p-OvwJAAD___ZyWVg) Friday, expressing her commitment to work with the federal government and take action to combat antisemitism on the campus. She acknowledged that the cancellation of funds would immediately impact students, faculty, staff, research, and patient care.
## Noem Seeks Prosecution of Two Raid Leakers
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said Friday that DHS has [identified two “criminal leakers”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAQBeBfA5uj4zDYHhi6eEvXjhYx53AthgijRPn3lbt3fnqfnt7Xdbl6Tpzvn34n17ayIKDpQHcwLcFzei-9DG4jQtKSnBp6ZZTtR5TRDaMng1ob3IabUpbMCmb1SgcNAfwg2Z0aaJgU4IRwmVbTbzbYAUaL4TaIHihwK_XyXTi3SFt6lyfVy1p2mVxs7XEI_SFwFji3SJFTOjOBcyw7ZXodAmcfds58tOoblyxwNmrUGmwX4tHlQntXPYcukf-hehZkdeHx4pT4sOeG--75z5Xtvw-eDn8DAAD__21dXT0) within its ranks and will refer them to the Department of Justice for felony prosecutions. Noem made the announcement [in a video,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGngW6QMYaEwsVt6HLbLdFgj5NJjI1sJyxvv2L7rY909On_us03ZM_h_h9X0sXFWQrZg-hAjLNF9sesaqsdkaSuJt1eVNu3g7rK-qGNUcYtV0LnrOr6hfqldwoNOtXKBV3N-nwTnRhbIUcpmtH0yg12uIjrIO1yqZQgyyWm5hk5lAc5f8QPpcbEtfb6UcqWq-5fJadKTvu-Ny5-B9rzuVdy2qLnwiZXcnolzoUhRFoh45FBgid8UcqAxrwzWbCcjY-Zwx3YEMSNEhaOIQNbC9u7gMcdKLiYDK0UCnj-UIYnxQ2TPeqk7baz95yHU35fkf2vtPxV7qPlTwAAAP__RYx2HQ) saying two people “ _have been telling individuals about our operations and putting law enforcement lives in jeopardy_.” One leak reportedly allowed alleged members of Venezuelan prison gang Tren de Aragua [to evade capture](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2u4yAQhuGrwd1EePBvQbGNu2y7pWWbISbBjAUkke9-xelPM81Ij159_-7zfXHehcff5SCdLc8osQWpQI6zWZy_5qYy2hIhqYp03Td1W3fNgNWuV9l2iJtclLF9O6xk12ZsugGNUnY0Q-V00aSSYy1xRHkbt7axnel6OXRo1l40kozLHG9PdiHvZP3FH4q3jY_K6z3nMwn1R-AkcArXySmXl8CpwAInqcrpBU7vBIG-SeCUvwxmT-BpeVFM8HXew0oQyVKMZCAzGH6C5QiWPIcLzsiJtnd2HBK8okvZQWA6IC1XIauozVkcl7oS_TgW538i82-jfTT-DwAA__8Twm7M) by ICE agents in Aurora, CO last month. Another immigration operation was reportedly compromised in Southern California in late February.

| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdF6ZMb8FRaQV3U2bEg3MGJzYmBhzEXn6iM1KqVKk9OfROaNvvn0MH2idXeev6LlLJgygoJRKS9UOhNZdQ5FRZ5iBdcZdXhd5mVdFA9nS5QrKkbDiZiTMVVlMRptmggbr2pBuM9vdaUqrNlfQgnq0U1mYiqpaNRXQWItCMdkU4uN7sGta2LgrfHJ8TMFnrltS2nahvwjoBfTneT7GiLQTo9vvEQH96MIsoM-VRI-_wiq3aD3LkVc2Nu3yCof0eMk1JPljDafEMRxJ6P5IftjDEScW-vm3WVJCAdX965ns4YV-kt03h9cbT-g3tPMq9PM_W_9olbcTAdU0WHpltK8nTj8HHwjdvU48-I0WjDRj4jfNYkfbaZ2ze3Xbmz1a97KV_nW9zw5-BwAA__9yzJ77) [**10 Amazon Prime Perks You Need to Be Using**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdF6ZMb8FRaQV3U2bEg3MGJzYmBhzEXn6iM1KqVKk9OfROaNvvn0MH2idXeev6LlLJgygoJRKS9UOhNZdQ5FRZ5iBdcZdXhd5mVdFA9nS5QrKkbDiZiTMVVlMRptmggbr2pBuM9vdaUqrNlfQgnq0U1mYiqpaNRXQWItCMdkU4uN7sGta2LgrfHJ8TMFnrltS2nahvwjoBfTneT7GiLQTo9vvEQH96MIsoM-VRI-_wiq3aD3LkVc2Nu3yCof0eMk1JPljDafEMRxJ6P5IftjDEScW-vm3WVJCAdX965ns4YV-kt03h9cbT-g3tPMq9PM_W_9olbcTAdU0WHpltK8nTj8HHwjdvU48-I0WjDRj4jfNYkfbaZ2ze3Xbmz1a97KV_nW9zw5-BwAA__9yzJ77) Once upon a time we had to make lists and physically go to stores when we needed things. Sometimes we’d have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. Then one day, out of the heavens, came Amazon. For many of us, free shipping and access to exclusive shows and movies is enough reason to fork over the [$14.99 per month to get Prime.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdF6ZMb8FRaQV3U2bEg3MGJzYmBhzEXn6iM1KqVKk9OfROaNvvn0MH2idXeev6LlLJgygoJRKS9UOhNZdQ5FRZ5iBdcZdXhd5mVdFA9nS5QrKkbDiZiTMVVlMRptmggbr2pBuM9vdaUqrNlfQgnq0U1mYiqpaNRXQWItCMdkU4uN7sGta2LgrfHJ8TMFnrltS2nahvwjoBfTneT7GiLQTo9vvEQH96MIsoM-VRI-_wiq3aD3LkVc2Nu3yCof0eMk1JPljDafEMRxJ6P5IftjDEScW-vm3WVJCAdX965ns4YV-kt03h9cbT-g3tPMq9PM_W_9olbcTAdU0WHpltK8nTj8HHwjdvU48-I0WjDRj4jfNYkfbaZ2ze3Xbmz1a97KV_nW9zw5-BwAA__9yzJ77) But if those reasons haven't been enough to entice you to join Prime, maybe some of these lesser-known incentives will tempt you to sign up. [Here are 10 of those perks.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdF6ZMb8FRaQV3U2bEg3MGJzYmBhzEXn6iM1KqVKk9OfROaNvvn0MH2idXeev6LlLJgygoJRKS9UOhNZdQ5FRZ5iBdcZdXhd5mVdFA9nS5QrKkbDiZiTMVVlMRptmggbr2pBuM9vdaUqrNlfQgnq0U1mYiqpaNRXQWItCMdkU4uN7sGta2LgrfHJ8TMFnrltS2nahvwjoBfTneT7GiLQTo9vvEQH96MIsoM-VRI-_wiq3aD3LkVc2Nu3yCof0eMk1JPljDafEMRxJ6P5IftjDEScW-vm3WVJCAdX965ns4YV-kt03h9cbT-g3tPMq9PM_W_9olbcTAdU0WHpltK8nTj8HHwjdvU48-I0WjDRj4jfNYkfbaZ2ze3Xbmz1a97KV_nW9zw5-BwAA__9yzJ77)

**➤****The Seattle Seahawks** have traded two-time Pro Bowl quarterback Geno Smith to the Las Vegas Raiders in exchange for a third-round pick. Smith will be reunited with his former head coach, Pete Carroll. clean_body: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said Friday that DHS has within its ranks and will refer them to the Department of Justice for felony prosecutions. | | | | | | Sunday, March 9, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1862, the took place during the Battle of Hampton Roads in Virginia. The U.S.S. Monitor ran off the Confederate C.S.S. Virginia (formerly the Merrimac) after a four-hour exchange of cannon fire. Ever wonder what your say about you? Here's today's pro tip: DON'T TEXT IN ALL CAPS! If you're an Amazon Prime subscriber, be sure to check out today's sponsor, to take advantage of special deals in Prime you may not be aware of. | Hackman Died of Heart Disease, Wife From Hantavirus Forensic experts have concluded that actor Gene Hackman with complications from Alzheimer’s disease, and his wife, Betsy Arakawa, died of a rodent-borne disease at their home in Santa Fe, New Mexico. The remains of Hackman, 95, and Arakawa, 65, were discovered on Feb. 26. Authorities revealed that Arakawa likely died on Feb. 11 at home from . Hackman, in the advanced stages of Alzheimer’s, apparently was unaware that his wife was dead. Hackman’s pacemaker last showed signs of activity a week later, Feb. 18, the day he likely died. The couple’s dog, Zinna, was found dead in a crate about 10 to 15 feet from Arakawa's body. Their two other dogs—Bear and Nikki – . Columbia University to Address Antisemitism Columbia University Interim President Katrina Armstrong conceded that the federal government as it cuts hundreds of millions of dollars in funding over antisemitism at the Ivy League school. The reaction comes one day after a federal task force convened by President Trump in grants and contracts, citing the school’s noncompliance with anti-discrimination laws. Armstrong wrote Friday, expressing her commitment to work with the federal government and take action to combat antisemitism on the campus. She acknowledged that the cancellation of funds would immediately impact students, faculty, staff, research, and patient care. Noem Seeks Prosecution of Two Raid Leakers Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said Friday that DHS has within its ranks and will refer them to the Department of Justice for felony prosecutions. Noem made the announcement saying two people “ have been telling individuals about our operations and putting law enforcement lives in jeopardy.” One leak reportedly allowed alleged members of Venezuelan prison gang Tren de Aragua by ICE agents in Aurora, CO last month. Another immigration operation was reportedly compromised in Southern California in late February. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Around the World: March 9th, 2025
body:
| | | | | |
---
**_Around the World_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome back to _Around the World_ , No Dem Left Behind’s deep dive into the global stories shaping politics. These aren’t just headlines—they’re events that influence U.S. policy, impact elections, and redefine our place on the world stage. I’m Olya Makarova, and every Sunday, we cut through the noise to show how these stories impact our fight for a stronger America. No Dem Left Behind isn’t here to sit on the sidelines—we’re here to challenge corruption, call out hypocrisy, and ensure MAGA’s dangerous agenda doesn’t go unchecked. Let’s dive in.
---
| | | | **America’s Vanishing Allies**
---
|
---
Trump is burning bridges with our closest allies—and for what? His latest tariffs on Canada and Mexico are based on lies, claiming—without evidence—that fentanyl is pouring over the Canadian border. In response, Canada and Mexico are hitting back with their own tariffs, escalating tensions and threatening key trade relationships. Meanwhile, Trump is turning his back on Ukraine. He’s cutting military aid and refusing to take a stance on Russia’s aggression, all while pretending he wants to “make a deal.” But that neutrality disappears when it comes to Israel—where he’s rushing to approve billions in weapons sales, proving his so-called diplomacy is just another grift. America’s credibility is on the line. If we alienate our allies while cozying up to dictators and oligarchs, what happens when we need the world to stand with us? [** _We don’t have to sit back and watch Trump dismantle America’s standing. No Dem Left Behind is working to elect leaders who will restore our global reputation. Chip in now to help us fight back._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpxv3-vhrtuu-kyd76rh1/) **Join us next week for the latest updates and stay informed with NDLB!**
---
|
---
-Olya Makarova
---

---
We appreciate your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: A revolution for free speech
body:
Despite the woke left’s best efforts to silence The Babylon Bee, we haven’t feared retribution from advertisers or being ‘canceled’ by woke social media platforms

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/m1TOjSFrod1ugXsIl36l_PW1ugUHPUgoFFJrHmLdKncRw-M8t48PDprCOZJSkHP0KR43sCNXGsw4_TJPitFyDY8JKINflrMwXH9Rt4FktVeMnB7qNooWhQQHdv9wTbAsBu_PT-mPvil5CR865Ba9nwC2PxReVFehvAW70mofjgRvB25mq6JI95jqdQoxnQmbiT6IMIQ0hcxN35lMAbOlnnSn8nPf5NiWPHNmnakZ1EUSUzQMZsBoVavFO32he59QAByjlZwvuAzN8ZNFhJxAKkrTVGR5D6HKhDuATzXImay8pWBALG_uUfjt6i8X3B8ym0aLZTZe7mzJHgo_/RXR9e9ni_knysv5b0kWFJOJLut9s-cuW/6)
---
|
---
Friend, Elon Musk made a bold (and expensive) move to buy Twitter after seeing the tech giant de-platform The Babylon Bee simply for telling a joke.While Elon joined The Bee in launching a revolution for free speech, X stood alone in rejecting unquestioning conformity. Censorship remained king on virtually every other social media platform, including Facebook. Despite the woke left's best efforts to silence The Babylon Bee, we haven't feared retribution from advertisers or being 'canceled' by woke social media platforms** because we have freedom-loving Americans like you who support our work.** **[**Subscribers are the backbone of The Babylon Bee, which allows us to battle for freedom of thought, the exchange of ideas, and truth. Your support as a member will allow us to continue creating satirical content and fighting for free speech.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/4QSsV0yKOE8uFxj7wXtUfGm-13E5pHnrTyNdAG53Xeul74P39BaFVmA4_VkuEeyFWQzo3Kc1ERl-Okg5Af2rcZA6_uuM7INJ82UOqhhl7TEaedT6Qzw-rCapnP6yrbs1QebBg7Ko5nj-nHWAzGFlH8FiNbH0Pws-F2J2bXelYcSFvEKP4i5Ctm9aVWcvgKs8n8Nh5DVaOwN34KmxssR8DVUzdnPSSso90Fbq3D1dd1u6hNpAkn3ilQSTJq3R9EtM0MjXjlg4jLREpMbRzM5juotDXI9y-yfqwZyN0vxlPw6xp8kZhH5y32JYTeOxCPQA_GIF91hyMyv-HkMP/d_qo8Go3g3NC8NGggFAs94oXZbkl7E3H/6)**
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/4qBwzgdlwC6hLtZnDYfqUR84OfwjoXtPIYbCrNYCebn6o8OPSbPDtf7dkFowH01IP6iWNxJOpLEgblJSmmPxfMc-PkklZXm5GHTljWmMZK3AV-RPjHMebW2mlq-3mTRDf4_LdOlInIOV3gMcK3mtqcE7OAKwInyqHQh9v-QWOiGyjRR394Uc5izc0Ca9_Xy-L4aZySUKCAJVzjOrHBSufsEPjnRab635Q6tiI1wXD2gPT7AY0-ukNlHVKaZXIcLb0wuom2GQSrwf8L5EyE2FcZfL_BfeS4uDt3B27Syu-aLxNN6mAf2xAbuqd2-ZXETV2F20GHHiNhMhRohd/9pMBR6mQsyrALna3Um7oZdyhdj8XOVXY/6)
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/bPEdR0hVdeErVRVi_JqjDgenTFyGmXqTr8_TBZ2DRLBmHrjR8fus1dD6qEmSORewSJ5c7AZ74XDPt7LVgRBCL7dOe4COf7gh3-VV9IK44EnOJkohwiMziDZ2SLGaCvrXBjoO0gR8kcJVPqGfQ0kaviVHZdjQ1Q92IGrUCvKHGQjiH2eFyHh7DI1uM7HBn4C3dC4x3zJ3ejmjlbqRX0uMdY4g2MghLwQyqBUgCUAzdh0sAy9yDWWvAzQKlVYH1ZcvAB5v_5HI7cyBTIgfUnFBmvx_LbMfgV3jWXF6Ix1MSSvt2HdE65AcmbJdlr5db1Ha7FJNLSs3pzv8dY7M/KWhCWSbCGvwn1alJ3xOUrQD6Kspt2bLf/6)
---
Given Facebook's history of suppressing dissent, it was a huge surprise when Mark Zuckerberg, CEO of Facebook and Meta recently outed the Biden administration for demanding his platform censor opposing viewpoints.Appearing on Joe Rogan's podcast, Zuckerberg said:
---
_** "These people from the Biden administration would call up our team and, like, scream at them and curse**... Basically, it just got to this point where we were like, no, we're not going to take down things that are true... We just said, no, we're not going to take down humor and **satire**."_
---
**I wouldn 't be surprised if Biden's lackeys called up Twitter and demanded they silence The Babylon Bee** after we told a joke about Rachel Levine -- Biden's U.S. assistant secretary for health. It seems satirical that a website that got its start with church humor garnered national attention for telling a joke--but it's true, and it catapulted us into the national conversation on free speech. **[As a subscriber, you can help The Babylon Bee keep delivering fake news you can trust-- no matter what pressures we face from woke, anti-freedom activists.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/JLRj0bCE_IYZJrjEf8WFcmUrmtfFrpvo-7Avf3GMllQjQpAMdKxmdoO6KcBPZ5LUiT3jocyymrKW5CH--1GMTSkNr3KVDzqyUFNW_AsWI_T_tsAxCBv0H77YvSuFxXVPWoiq-1Gadzs3CtKPoQ6Xf5u4V5hL4UdggKgL0F0CJZPzBtmhvZJu223jxU_ZeZEbcGz83uyB80TbeXupOMWbhH-nSrivww4xuS1jff8BtaHDGZmVxmMUQCyn6V6uFivgfFA71xt9NGQDrhYErk55CXudjTSewRpvMVHnZx8wXrjszrFXk9bi1SmzIntf7QKAF87GTXE5B5Ql-54L/4ReLYN1xqhk21QIlKjpLdvrKCR5HK_VX/6)**
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/RsYKC5pm8vHV8MqUOZdrrdXoJm8pLG9VME9UqdDucINLGNJfazgLvI0L3-_bG4mZ0AVd5o4Z9CX3h1Vmjd-8n1HBqHaJ6lI6IJbim8mgNoJWzGSCVEhgmt8SDz5oeHNTJT4iY9zqERqKlA9HJpeRPmwvZubTfS_W_dZ2MTGUqm4bVSB0OUD67rPCJCVhXtBLLGWV2ExU32IQuNBu0E-y8kKI8EoAr14uo9CpqgSowiqGbCItJMoYxg5uDEhdJ8Ihg9bD-XLGJ9KiocLkBJobFT4mFnKJR3bgmwZKNXzVZRzcS7-9TlIADCY4ugaJwtSa4kaDbiObTisrMexu/v-EUhfUEfdPUUk3-WhYj4K8OAAw7Hu3b/6)
---
Given what Mark Zuckerberg shared with Joe Rogan, it seems it was common practice for Biden's team to call up social media companies and demand they remove content the administration didn't like.We certainly didn't buy ourselves any favors with headlines including, "_Joe Biden found in dumpster behind DNC Convention Center " _and _" Joe Biden praised for historic rescue efforts to save kid he pushed down a well."_But, this is America, we value freedom, and we aren't going to apologize for writing satire. **Sorry, not sorry, Joe.** Even with Biden out the door, Trump in the White House, X leading Big Tech in its allegiance to free speech, and Facebook making strides to curb its suppression of thought ... _the censorship machine hasn 't dissolved_. **[**As the free speech war wages us, please help The Babylon Bee stand on the right side of history. Join as a member today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/tBwIc00leGKb9Kp-auW9KrPtdca__jlKzgyKxX7mHMeNVwrTiQJ3vZ31voyH9oNsORfNW87Z7ZrsoK6Y0gTE_C2qIXqjaBIzdvGIS4fYCx2UH6_Tpo-hz5ezEUr9UiZYZb9DuqHmwgbDxtlNu6CnMlJwZW7StBPbu7pHYlZZ5BIGFIPSweX3vbCluw_Tm3cGCYFdiANxTTuVEZ4IkyVRxiUwYhBGLeJ-I1eRYRCRnXanz8deTBx777Wno5JyyMkt0wEwilslCuD1OLkUZb8X0dSH0D3yrYO779qMWrsR4sp930_RSQUj0JspyWEhLNRVBFC33WO57yl9Cfbw/z6NKiz5qkMx1UGhaS-V4XkO8lKg5VFvQ/6)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/o9t6OVhfmrw7yeQ_Wlu1YP_1EDaUqLRRiqvLcXRcgl3JDXkgEOI4yHQya_10ZN1w6PGMmRLCeVv57nKF0U6eNDJBiA5DTwoXALsNsJIn2YwtgdDShGGYI2mB3PkQJx4eF9vOO9t_gtvJDji3eESf9OaA8Zdvs5FulYOdBxF3MrdW_uNyOkMQjz0UTeicGwiUcZS6LUPHvskRXTQq7az2pXner7r3ydsNGcW8aQMO0lqnpHX7up-rqXT4ZxFUXRi7_n3LVT9acpCsuh4JVhZOPfbjvHISML6V8y5Q81S3jjpIplY4WUuQL0S0sVF8X35B_7Ef5oG-Ux_1EXHM/Je5ATtNuI5nv-G-9chEoN53ZSDj8JFzf/6)
---
Thanks for supporting free speech. **We 'll never give up the fight.** Seth DillonCEO, The Babylon Bee

name: [Joint Address Alert] GOP Senate Majority
subject: You heard from the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now, his Senate majority needs to know... ARE YOU WITH US?

Friend,

You heard it directly from the President: _YOU_ are finally being put first again.

_And today, we can confidently say our country is WINNING!_

Our Senate majority is working faster than any in history to deliver on President Trump's America First agenda and ensure he has Congress at his back to continue delivering for YOU - _the people._

But after such a great night for our Party, we have to admit, *__this__ * one headline has us deeply concerned...
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE - _(from Gallup Polling)_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=021715c5f3dd4ca29f105091eb0e8c88&_e=p_Ej7PCC_qWUjRg453DsjnFUI2inx4gbRHwFf-zl4SJ6cJsmvbStOunVvlGrIkJ57_xcujYbruxVzP_v-kCKEcFVASF7IEuA38fopPhakMIhXinW4tvKSNf-GBKAZSjIOSLI4yDsRL2OKwLVgr7lDWI1YXvmw9Pevtdnl1MN9umuc6PvEzIS7XTfKOzFPQOtsaoIbq7EKzxvNKbiSPe25t5tgw1cbr4vMulB4CB51oi4jGdM4DwJZi59Ola1j1q_bs4URUC7H7ZJT4gouPGPfV8fTq9_7dGgptwMmD3sArRpPIZtERjvMqYBkP3rWiAsWGDTwjNRQf4OEg66HLXzaGtjKSYJf6Ofu563ZiYf5kZtB5YDOsVyVMX5Wx8dM7bvwtYE6KKFYTtv8qQTsJEaxCYNURUN8-2wV2es0gsoNmxhNNJGfX7SQ6Zi5dYCGe1KaP3BDAFxqy5sVB2V0vUvblH1aE7m_OMQnuq-fpU8bhY%3D)**

subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/l53MKdjP8mj7_l1KzhEJC7QjXdoxbBOhPxQR15pQ6Y9c2ZnSQMlXqwQO0E9bIc2HTcV8484i4igb1Jc1_fPSTUkggJbGFTlxiu3LNJtL1wi7QLDCea_EK6LoC2sV-MadtOsgEErF98SqRqCiTvfAT_qwvzE2Fk4K0aqPxpOx7euUNDIDO-XqOUq6OIAY_rcUkYSUnhcNrHHILEBt-iEL8vQ_r8rn0T7rC23jsOvdPnIPHAFXKvAqwGkWxht52evEPhE4LpwzO-yYSWhX3iXg8t8R1t9YbEzQLSKnMItF-c9HUlWH9LW5aqqRno3GFjF3NLQt7z48tYiOCiNsolT_QYVzZ_bn2rtx8B4ZkvDliTJ-Llo_yacr4wAbA1pTUkeZ1OQ_wQsthvsSfgl4hgJzH28hQsmgzNNU8G36SeCTkAc7K_a-mWLGHkabQi8YtESMR2QuBSWxM_6gCc_U43pPD3PRQhChxa1TFLZ7uQbItOJp87cfraB-nug7/C495idj07f-GE9LzMW_2Vd8sUwe2syL8/6) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/G-15tkUQ7jKPBWPEK0dYTQOHOg0l_zD6DhYGd7uui5vLzjzO90Vb2bFVMb-MFcqTAsqNNOHnR9vqi6MtoTe6vjjbCd_WYm8tQHUP3p7rI56GVzFvSPCbErlCQeKM8i8O6HoFf9p27vefCVIB4VNxMn0pl2jSN3FSOHivs7P-g-g1avoKkf9QFTB3yX5sepypbTt7MqSLyF-DDhbwMxx2QMovLS5yHN3B1_6ScAqPWnPG1PwKv5oIbOheunU-kTIs0vMVmBUg288PXjWuXHe2eHK2ugS_F-dIBWupCFTofSBeM01xIYEvXikDKIGUJjgMBk6OizHJ2ZBh0vhDhI0P4QlBr8EcTHXBNNQyhqB4oeNneBXWpeD5ZxB-U4f5kM2fHo3sMEuXbPbmgRjtVOxGc3Uf8zL8WyyMnUkIz0NlzEZfRY0LNhI80O9MBOaRCLrd-FBGtvquv8pf6z_DjCEeTsLskwr3ldgtFvVkcGi3ez_JXMOhGltT2PZW/IXbm1RgpyRCvICQ9II9wTsV0zd2b9xMq/6) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/amLgyUrr1X8dtBWYpb2lcw4Dh3yApc9IAOMya4WLebKubF65aOFUJc7cf7NvS84GDdZiH_IQtOSjky4c8zWGDusYNXzuwNRjKkGS8nMnRkg_4ZwHNJy3FNqYAtcBKoPVO3_F3LhyyNr6UBc0m2ExowcgmJqn2FfmRdMRjkiKok96lMaKxmO6A6xn6ksNL2tqQY2j3o8b5tG9-oJgNlqMZpr5tQD1hLbyaYwdhRVsTtUdlBjYHVPDlGeONKvksXBNSbAMKjwqDPHwqrP-LS_n_2qQHnHbrRT204loVcJrRQTyW42UiqayhEUncR7D_xwrR_8NSDPlE8N3pyesTLoLnVsoniyInNkBLcSVVpdlYVFDF_TGuNitPT-mmPXzcbtD9JionvOO7Gc7ZRXjOQiWQPFr_g_qwRz4UBSaBc60LxWXfToTQNskjvOIkXdNaBTYjqnr2hFdZlfrPGdX10mcgvbm8EZ91XuWuvblZswTa0YhzYrys92aONEN/oLSjwvwuEqWyfMqfZSndNy4rA1pbLDIT/6). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/8dDrDEDYGompSkmVtbSWA2oGW0A23T1xYJAIOepkL2wqeT5XQNiBdZy15Aanzbq3yDhIcRlD8Rk71-CeRWTTFhuXJ1Z2sAxoSGDFBsij8fRmvmO21Zi23sy7N0jrtiuKkx9AIAgNeLsMGX0005uz0zenyx0ZMKSwaXhyhMXVPMTQ4yKag7YRbLNFNd-EU5qOZtfEXttZO7VP5pjsIFAW8mry8jvmPMuA2iFx7vLyp634zS3A4-6VvS9B48ql7JQNcdmLlPiF_gmQeU6z4JRmTrOiWc1ULFxZoUso-vfNW6B8zOWPGjraJBp018kBldH14S5qffXh4qVIK_JfjJfdQWQbBgiPA4Zetnm-XMAF3Khl7IbfZF5l_xPqD3YoyFesNF2IXRBL967oJgzynqHhYMiAkNGQ64irfGZ6u2VoCReHq8YeSpqUP4q8tD_ew1OW7Ikwwinjxf9PIylRlzSsmjghK-YypQ4C4erGlRPEdrS2qZ0V4VtpvpHs/b9x05DpnNddjlolGjLQAg1jTDB9K154f/6)** Best regards,

clean_body: Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s “Theology 101” online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century. “Theology 101” has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is . You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative. We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of “Theology 101” on DVD. Secure yours right now at: Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: History Facts
subject: The penny wasn't always the smallest coin
body:
Cash just isn’t what it used to be in America, and that especially goes for pennies, which are often more convenient to drop in a take-a-penny, leave-a-penny tray than your own pocket.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dgy7hmsxqwclds7sarsiej4mtzv37j9ak8o7k8opx491g0tlklzwc4jijv4t68wfk2q1i5gn02dw96m5n7cl1b58awygk640o5ukish4xczwd1vcxgmvy4sppombnq0tj16vs8t3jagwv14&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The U.S. used to have half-pennies.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| C ash just isn’t what it used to be in America, and that especially goes for pennies, which are often more convenient to drop in a take-a-penny, leave-a-penny tray than your own pocket. Many countries have even ditched their 1-cent coins, including Canada, Australia, Sweden, and New Zealand, and the United States may be [next](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---
For now, the penny survives as the smallest unit of U.S. currency — but that wasn’t always the case. When the U.S. Mint was established in 1792, it made 10 denominations of coins, and the smallest was the half-cent. Treasury Secretary Alexander Hamilton [proposed the half-cent](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for two reasons: so America’s poorest residents could buy smaller quantities of items for less money, and so merchants could price their wares more competitively in smaller increments. Average wages in the 1790s were around [$65 a year](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), so a half-penny made sense for purchasing everyday items.
Half-cent coins declined in popularity over the next few decades, and their production waned until they were discontinued in 1857. By that time, they were mostly used by the Post Office, which still made change in half-cent amounts. But not long after they were taken out of the mix, half-pennies generated new interest as collector’s items, and [appeared](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in numismatic publications as early as 1869.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our [Terms of Use](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=2kh5r9m0gvwn78mskmwb4fgijsio40urf3jqfcz82wuiwda100123k2z0tr5kjczke407a6b1n2c4whou8e819bf56rm8fszflh6vjrr7xd5poehqzkwf3loxsyhdmks4z35kut1tja5p3qkxlj4supybmih8oy11mo27iaux20po&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [Privacy Policy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=463ko1dghouzvmup1b9h3hna6ub6manarr61peqxj0j41p3r978pfo0gayawxfsjnct5e9yqfahyv4mxxb37kjpgyyy87t0mmnfjkfk3qqhu6fd4lr9xa98w9jndsb3ef1oy06k9s6xep3gx1fw67tdjinqnge68ze7prw91un1w7q5o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
---

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## The first 1-cent coins were bigger than modern quarters.
When Congress jettisoned the half-cent in 1857, it also downgraded the size of the 1-cent piece into something closer to the modern penny. One-cent coins minted before then, known by collectors as [“large cents,”](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssus8r&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) were 100% copper and around 1 1/16 inches in diameter. This made them quite heavy, at more than 13 grams. Modern quarters, by comparison, are just under an inch wide and weigh under 6 grams.
---

clean_body: Cash just isn’t what it used to be in America, and that especially goes for pennies, which are often more convenient to drop in a take-a-penny, leave-a-penny tray than your own pocket. | C ash just isn’t what it used to be in America, and that especially goes for pennies, which are often more convenient to drop in a take-a-penny, leave-a-penny tray than your own pocket. Many countries have even ditched their 1-cent coins, including Canada, Australia, Sweden, and New Zealand, and the United States may be . For now, the penny survives as the smallest unit of U.S. currency — but that wasn’t always the case. When the U.S. Mint was established in 1792, it made 10 denominations of coins, and the smallest was the half-cent. Treasury Secretary Alexander Hamilton for two reasons: so America’s poorest residents could buy smaller quantities of items for less money, and so merchants could price their wares more competitively in smaller increments. Average wages in the 1790s were around , so a half-penny made sense for purchasing everyday items. Half-cent coins declined in popularity over the next few decades, and their production waned until they were discontinued in 1857. By that time, they were mostly used by the Post Office, which still made change in half-cent amounts. But not long after they were taken out of the mix, half-pennies generated new interest as collector’s items, and in numismatic publications as early as 1869. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Year Abraham Lincoln first appeared on the penny 1909 | | Cost of producing a single penny 3.7¢ | Cost of producing a single penny 3.7¢ | | Cost of producing a single nickel 13.8¢ | | Value of a gold eagle coin in 1792 $10 | Value of a gold eagle coin in 1792 $10 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The first 1-cent coins were bigger than modern quarters. When Congress jettisoned the half-cent in 1857, it also downgraded the size of the 1-cent piece into something closer to the modern penny. One-cent coins minted before then, known by collectors as were 100% copper and around 1 1/16 inches in diameter. This made them quite heavy, at more than 13 grams. Modern quarters, by comparison, are just under an inch wide and weigh under 6 grams. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/7HC3KNWpxHD2NDxaC_QvTnw_35tEiRn2Hc2j3DPKTj_BSmkJ8GbcAAsb6QHzcSS23klRWhowzxaxYQNFQ1iPopB1sDQBaTa7bgFmfLpHtS6yUjBJFj8y69bTJLvSZdPxzpLLB02TTamYsHi3xVhLpUMqVUY6NmKUQ_Cx7HNBqEyTOhquRDGWmKoB4RbMllFY3A0UtJlsRP7DU7ZLxLCIcFNeDI4CPRYF3Ob2DrPZ_fEhbxHdF0nBKuQUmBCt3jQs53Ktd6YRIUe6TvH50O1909gI6JS6NGVhem7SKlwnoDIxciaxs7VWzxGNzIkZwFPRvwJ_38OPxYSktpXwP9adpKiPOZaBkeG60CZXSyzhtMijx7Yfd2m3Uv5tEL1ATmzt36Uptl6hpQQ9YaJi4VgN2eHibCEY4tTLK6n7a7953N98Zg6jVKZ4cXblZFCA98XRFk4coefJwk7eWgDmBl7qHOjymWIFGZIwAiEUNFG1hi8UZ1Y5OeSrVDF2WQ/LaByQt3ckgKskOMdMBBez68NusHs754L/6)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/dpB45fcBbnaFuIa38qUC1OLKPJfvhyq2_4A7yYP-29KwR9C7GSLPnQ1y95xTmGPp2KitAhl3bIB6ayOg-ywOCxU3QU-0yHuyX9qERXw99SRKp3_IXMNSDYMkh40Iag18uanyuYQc5sqfrKDUsWnrxPFUQgAhXCs1VkE6DUQHY10vJ28zcMkiTy-R1dPRKL5On1hWEkJL7mYAA7igPMmGLZJ8DkysAPw0ubXmbshVn2G9cVUV48byWpuEg2OFhT64J7tryVsmLHCQo_oVi0UnEiYDhaIzbposjxjrsuxz6FYrWVI0mgd45JtsTG98B9KRZhPuBM8LEIkI_iuDSAMc2AjORJru0VtkiTitl5eAfbZvaiM0OgFf-YsgUnfgGvIr2r2bEVH1BHlUX9jWYF71v_1aKzLfFutEtO5s034yUbpk4V994s4cMO7JNHwBO0ZFDMoN7xG4paIXuuIWeSiZiahJkHx0e5nG7A87NZrRPp0PyMiDxGhZ0w_Flg/twPH9vrqI7UseFfnRhQoX3P4h14Nr7Fa/6)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/j1NdNYpBoDvM2a7OaeiNEv3MsugaVsoYQg4YJLYzNTbqYKMyL0NriXhIAZ-zK4VRLKHQA3sq4UsUK-mQUSiXW1O3F_PRAjFACJ2AySvtdr4VnWL_XzuUxaobzRH0OBhrJbJR6EmBN_awnL8aUG9C5k6CsfvYCIWz721e719pJUGCBwJHoH8oIiEN4FyvwVcUPq14JRa2NaCmK_fvQAIHXVrQS7tQvXpd1Zwwe-qprNWzmZFGgqxT8pUmsnfyxM84wskQ9_TdjCEMmPcD2-KG7pNANk40ywBcqWaCXyhFZdDCmPwAFjh0SuCV7uEphWvfiHpt218VN35t60cd18vFTdO1QPgKtPhuj-o-26E2OjGcTM5o7hpTrXTyJ3gJPgovE7nNOAX287_9G2tAlCJSnYUr0_g1lvrSES2dOQELORGvEbPADdBn1J8M92hRtDEjd_3dfhiPetjEK_fJe5qgB0UyrFg7ZdjlUDwSa9x0DLDiRf__bcxtwi4BgA/PbC6SozmBx2z-8FYG5GnHL4Bewca1zZg/6)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/q-vHmDWpP4NJagUIFrAHmBWZ_dsCXOUtyCUA0UsOAvNaZJRVdzJRPtEl7E5a5_Tu05_BT4IS5J34yQwQuljt4ERueBuqBB6K9mep6EDobGLXfx3jykIbjy6l55GRUdi3D6S-GdBUJkIZSvotev8EVOqMC7JSRh-4eO8Ko8X4o8FN8u_GptbTZtt-5UN5nu0ROz5VsjyaabX432D97M0b-lKUVOttTGBjP9uJHcWwBZYkggYf9krpgz0wqjw-oQ4oGUCBpPf4mSjWAv5ALV63KVHbTyEw_Z0Oi7UazcUW_ZlS6LbqpVuPwsMD67CUbrY03v5OkpqQEJ4M5WeghcLgJWKU23-4APxPwjraQIa3M9rhXo6uK6gaVMsoI8fvMYLqeCotaY7o10Mq-q1apz9OVMMl9nkEheLkr8cfL7X_iJgs59FMcWn6_wOMV-qVGn13MHu2vIG06zbCdt6ddSC788EbiLiE8dKSRX0JZb2CkxVWkwCPHXV-FxRraw/pNdjdZHISCM3ebJOt_NDxfD8sueq9rIW/6)**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/1ErcaIFWaQZRyAW0BoeUAhsIg6j7ZWpX2Nk4l1L6sFNeerb5FusXskhBsg2rnsOEgD1BoS0RPRKgmWMgEAXvGlGIcJxnjg8g5f5TzwQ2mORoCuOTbm7j83GQ21PMhZVUBat4N0se7htDDySc1xWsGZsFq_yiPLgvXIOyK_tx0E4YG_tDM1Bpms2B902UMAo2t7xvvrIT_Hc4Ifp5hGFD-vbWAFM4R1uK7vfWmV3s_tkk3n21pYsXPNvH-aZENhGaoLqOwHttCNGIt5i_zG6aDZo615gLgxggEWJVcQaVjIYXb2K2bkpSwsOcuOGUQm2WwSJ3cy-GjRsKb3tJilyIF_g1wgeJ9zvSIECs1apoHIvgKQTSV-LRetnIf8zkrU-PmBSVMEyr4lMZeMLzTixlVLdeh2kJferT5ywHBzSSQrFzsRViQphg1N1F9NH_9OXEQAlvzVFEZslXHb-mtzJQUphswkzTgto0iYfBGWzz1D7g0ppp1ykrwIr6bg/bpyWnk6e_6KtA6u8rv60lg3w69fTa2xK/6)

clean_body: These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "," now available on DVD. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below: ) Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

clean_body: But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19181%2E878179%2EdEE6Tp). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19181%2E878179%2EdEE6Tp).**

subject: We need more people like him

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39500%2E3422442%2EKVcfQN)
Derek,
Josh Riley narrowly won _one of the most competitive_ House races last November, winning by 2.3 points.
**[Will you help keep Josh in Congress by splitting a donation between his campaign and Truth to Power today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250309-1?refcode=em20250309-39500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39500_3422442_KVcfQN&akid=39500%2E3422442%2EKVcfQN)**
As Democrats look for new messengers in Congress, Josh has been at the forefront of calling out Trump’s BS. When Trump announced the federal funding freeze, Josh called it out for what it is:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250309-1?refcode=em20250309-39500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39500_3422442_KVcfQN&akid=39500%2E3422442%2EKVcfQN)
We need Josh–and more people like him–in Congress fighting for us.
At Truth to Power, we’re making our plan to take back the House in 2026, which means protecting battleground seats like Josh’s and finding more candidates whose messages will resonate with voters.
**[We’re asking you to split a donation of $5 or more between Josh’s campaign and Truth to Power today. Your contribution will help us elect Truth to Power candidates across the country in 2026.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250309-1?refcode=em20250309-39500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39500_3422442_KVcfQN&akid=39500%2E3422442%2EKVcfQN)**

Thank you,
Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250309-39500&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39500_3422442_KVcfQN&akid=39500%2E3422442%2EKVcfQN)**

My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---

clean_body: But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges | | | My situation is in your hands, Friend. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Friend. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community mttns so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Vivek
subject: My Dad’s words of wisdom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
As Governor, I'll bring the same bold leadership I showed as a CEO to the statehouse.
I'm not fighting for a campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of Ohio.
Be so good they can't ignore you.
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=037006d380474d558335914bca240db4&_e=OiezmC_YRIu0RBk0rR66WnIun_TmgBTkxv8zAdgodUqIoWwHdVS7HcEOAUS5t9qyvzZcjvSl-LGqBigDxJAcaqKEiWfDo6cTBvzDleT6Sz1Das6p3X58Nw8c5ZzTCZl6tU4ujp47Si2Oi0HK_rF6fzR_ktwUpl1eq_KzJEikYJ9BhJmJkOWSd3oj46SOiurZQBzir9Cjp49cNtag_dO8GM9IzkAeW0dKqpLw1KZFqHGfIhxmdeYNSp7X6WshhSofvJunSv9DWovuRGyUMu-d69B_PvkaG8-ZqlshhEplV6liwLD9qrYWMEGWwgn4Pk21B4MGHW7Bz8ZgNFA5DfrATJ5ifWw3DdlVigX3oH1cry8uLFaNucGxIW9EVV84HjIkSs305mPghGyzOlWgF3S1f6mHD2dCEKpMMbP4su-aF-C5bIbi8H342znyZGQFmuKx)
---
_**"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." **_
* * *
---
My father instilled those words of wisdom in me, and I've lived by them ever since.
Peter, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm not just talking about my own success. I'm talking about the future of our great state of Ohio. Born and raised in Cincinnati, I've spent my life building businesses, creating jobs, and fighting against the woke agenda.

The radical Left and their media allies have taken notice, dubbing me _"The C.E.O. of Anti-Woke."_

**But I'm not done yet. I'm just getting started.**

As Governor, I'll bring the same bold leadership I showed as a CEO to the statehouse. I'll fight for a state where merit matters, free speech reigns, and We the People are in charge. No more mediocrity. No more victimhood. No more excuses.

But I need your help to make it happen. I'm not some cookie-cutter politician who only cares about climbing the political ladder. I'm also not beholden to special interests, mega-donors, or the Establishment.

Because of that, my campaign is fueled by everyday folks like you doing what they can to help. Sometimes that means kicking in a few bucks. Sometimes more. Regardless of the amount, I would be deeply honored if you'd be willing to pitch in and help my campaign keep running through the finish line.

Your support - no matter what the amount - would be a huge help.

**[So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=037006d380474d558335914bca240db4&_e=OiezmC_YRIu0RBk0rR66WnIun_TmgBTkxv8zAdgodUqIoWwHdVS7HcEOAUS5t9qyvzZcjvSl-LGqBigDxJAcaqKEiWfDo6cTBvzDleT6Sz1Das6p3X58Nw8c5ZzTCZl6tU4ujp47Si2Oi0HK_rF6fzR_ktwUpl1eq_KzJEikYJ9BhJmJkOWSd3oj46SOiurZQBzir9Cjp49cNtag_dO8GM9IzkAeW0dKqpLw1KZFqHGfIhxmdeYNSp7X6WshhSofvJunSv9DWovuRGyUMu-d61Ad4H_w3rr87phSY2M8RlBDYAaibQWhQvl_1QPwG4dpMu1BlAO53g2fwda8abIL1GYq_NfMVBB5P1agcS7LovBusvS5P7ZsdtJ-deUIlA8fARixT2bk1XcA3d8wc6Ohn4Qq9JNQ9aZGMMiwapnRQ4YY2D149997lR1lsRGpFTLk "So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.")**

I'm not fighting for some cheap campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of our state, and our country along with it. I'm also fighting for the state where my wife, Apoorva, and I are raising our two boys.

**I don 't want to just make Ohio stand out a little more - I want it to be OUTSTANDING!**

**[So I'll ask you again: are you with me?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=037006d380474d558335914bca240db4&_e=OiezmC_YRIu0RBk0rR66WnIun_TmgBTkxv8zAdgodUqIoWwHdVS7HcEOAUS5t9qyvzZcjvSl-LGqBigDxJAcaqKEiWfDo6cTBvzDleT6Sz1Das6p3X58Nw8c5ZzTCZl6tU4ujp47Si2Oi0HK_rF6fzR_ktwUpl1eq_KzJEikYJ9BhJmJkOWSd3oj46SOiurZQBzir9Cjp49cNtag_dO8GM9IzkAeW0dKqpLw1KZFqHGfIhxmdeYNSp7X6WshhSofvJunSv9DWovuRGyUMu-d6x1vDy1v6-0x-0ud_URETj3UE1mzNeW6vke9ETeOT0_ffoALiFNAOTGpdUZ8NCn4QHNIiB14jk_Sde1zVDp6OKC9FzMpxT0u1fl7orixqA0_h-gGSryH00hK_W4Fpa5a2AShadR0vXJROxuc8YNPibLgS4pj-pDO8l7D_-tyXYAW "So I'll ask you again: are you with me?")**
---

| | [**PLEASE DONATE NOW**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=037006d380474d558335914bca240db4&_e=OiezmC_YRIu0RBk0rR66WnIun_TmgBTkxv8zAdgodUqIoWwHdVS7HcEOAUS5t9qyvzZcjvSl-LGqBigDxJAcaqKEiWfDo6cTBvzDleT6Sz1Das6p3X58Nw8c5ZzTCZl6tU4ujp47Si2Oi0HK_rF6fzR_ktwUpl1eq_KzJEikYJ9BhJmJkOWSd3oj46SOiurZQBzir9Cjp49cNtag_dO8GM9IzkAeW0dKqpLw1KZFqHGfIhxmdeYNSp7X6WshhSofvJunSv9DWovuRGyUMu-d6z731Aygs0XyaItC86d9JHe311HlBWp6Qox_R-5ZUEK1NjN7BOi27ca2GFwVuiu5SBDtzr3MOHhRoFO7nJxg0BZFQHiOuYh6gZjTURaqCazHu5eciUkarbDbwSymGjcC3lMdPxeKX1Jiptu0VFQ8btcpgv22BhtfHyJvc5eqTQdo)
---

God Bless you and God Bless America,

Vivek Ramaswamy
Candidate for Governor of Ohio

---
| | [](https://Link%0Ahttps://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/inner-circle-f?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250309_CS-GAP90.116205_t1612140-3623&ex_tid=20250309_CS-GAP90.116205_t1612140-3623)
---
**It 's Vivek Ramaswamy - I wrote you a personal message now that I OFFICIALLY launched my campaign:**

I am running to be a key partner to President Trump in my home state of Ohio. But I really need your help to win. That's why I am humbly asking you to join my inner circle and become a Founding Donor to my campaign today.

_It would be an honor to have you aboard._
---
| | [**JOIN MY INNER CIRCLE!**](https://Link%0Ahttps://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/inner-circle-f?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250309_CS-GAP90.116205_t1612140-3623&ex_tid=20250309_CS-GAP90.116205_t1612140-3623)
---
To victory,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|

Columbus, OH 43201

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Northern PA's surprising challenge
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0b6fb23cb9&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[How northern Pennsylvania is being left behind](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3a5164f7a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Seth Higgins_
Within the last year, several institutions that the communities of northern Pennsylvania depend upon — including healthcare services, a college branch campus, and two correctional facilities — have been snuffed out or find themselves on life support. Officials in Harrisburg have proven unable or unwilling to intervene. If trends continue, this region may soon find itself in an economic and demographic death spiral from which it cannot recover. There is still time, but it is running out. **Why It Matters.** The residents of this vast rural expanse tend to be older, lower-income, and less educated than the rest of the Commonwealth. Given the distances between communities, most residents must travel greater distances to access basic services, such as healthcare, educational institutions, and economic opportunities, than people living elsewhere. Within the last year, several pillars of northern Pennsylvania have crumbled or are under threat. This trend began last winter when Penn Highlands Healthcare, which is the sole provider of healthcare for many communities in western Pennsylvania, closed the labor and delivery service at its Elk County facility.[ I’ve written](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d97fd01ab8&e=b7b3eddce2) about this issue before. Despite the community’s efforts, Penn Highlands’ executives refused to change course. This decision created a[ maternity care desert](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=572fc005b0&e=b7b3eddce2) the size of Delaware. These closures point to a broader, underlining issue. Many healthcare systems in Pennsylvania are[ under financial pressure](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2f95c9bcfa&e=b7b3eddce2). Penn Highlands’[ financial situation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9c78368d1a&e=b7b3eddce2) is especially bleak. Although Penn Highlands’ executives have suggested otherwise, this may make other cuts to healthcare services inevitable.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eecffe15f5&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Thank you, Democrats](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8634d44e6e&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Thank you, Congressional Democrats, countless Democratic Governors and mayors and the well-funded (often by taxpayers) left-wing activist, professional agitators. Thank you.

Rather than feeling angry, or shouting back, I offer you my sincere thanks.

In case any taxpayer or any citizen thought this past election was merely a contest between two people running for President, or simply a battle between two political parties, the last five weeks have helped us all see that what is at stake is much, much bigger than one election or even one session of Congress.

The major differences between the two parties are not over policy. The major battles are over priorities, values and goals. The Democrats and Republicans are not trying to achieve the same things, just by different policies

So, I wish to thank all the left-wing activists, talking heads, and politicians. We now have complete clarity of all that is at stake.

**Why It Matters**. These are not merely two parties with disagreements on how to make America great again.

There are genuine, Grand Canyon-sized differences on what America is and what it should be.

The Democrats in Congress, their gubernatorial and mayoral allies, and countless well-funded professional rally activists have told us what they value. What they will fight tirelessly for, in the courts, in halls of Congress, in capitols and in the streets.

So, on behalf of those of us voting for and wanting common-sense, results-oriented government and stability in our communities and lives: you have made the choice crystal clear.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e35ebdd66e&e=b7b3eddce2)

|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**

* **[Schorn runs for full Bucks DA term, potentially facing ex-solicitor Khan](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6b03518b0c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Twenty-year-old cold case still lingers over South Philly](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3b1862f8ff&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kyle Sammin: Are Republicans already tired of winning?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7beede5643&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Tom DiBello: Federal resources are needed to support election workers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f382c79266&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: The Oscars, like diamonds, are forever — just tune out the nonsense](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=be23fa8cc3&e=b7b3eddce2)**

|
# **4\. PA's #1 Export is Not What You Think**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7d8e5c7a78&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| Rep. Bryan Cutler shares an [unexpected story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=706b5f379e&e=b7b3eddce2) on the [_Voices of Reason_ podcast](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=79966a563a&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
“Congratulations, attention-hungry House Democrats: You stole the spotlight from Donald Trump on Tuesday night. Your reward? Undercutting your own message in the fight against Trump, making your party look small and desperate, and making Trump look like the commanding figure he desperately wants to be.” So writes [POLITICO’s Rachael Bade this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6b6f10279b&e=b7b3eddce2) in a forceful yet thoughtful examination of the tactics adopted by some of the minority party’s wackier members.

It’s a strange thing — and maybe one reason for Trump’s success — that he drives his opponents so crazy that they lash out in ridiculous ways, making Trump look sane and calm by comparison. Sixteen years ago, Democrats lambasted a Republican representative for loudly (and rudely) calling out one of President Obama’s lies. Now, they’re even louder and ruder, and it’s not just one rep but an organized cadre. So much for the promise of normalcy.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Seth Higgins Within the last year, several institutions that the communities of northern Pennsylvania depend upon — including healthcare services, a college branch campus, and two correctional facilities — have been snuffed out or find themselves on life support. Officials in Harrisburg have proven unable or unwilling to intervene. If trends continue, this region may soon find itself in an economic and demographic death spiral from which it cannot recover. There is still time, but it is running out. Why It Matters. The residents of this vast rural expanse tend to be older, lower-income, and less educated than the rest of the Commonwealth. Given the distances between communities, most residents must travel greater distances to access basic services, such as healthcare, educational institutions, and economic opportunities, than people living elsewhere. Within the last year, several pillars of northern Pennsylvania have crumbled or are under threat. This trend began last winter when Penn Highlands Healthcare, which is the sole provider of healthcare for many communities in western Pennsylvania, closed the labor and delivery service at its Elk County facility. about this issue before. Despite the community’s efforts, Penn Highlands’ executives refused to change course. This decision created a the size of Delaware. These closures point to a broader, underlining issue. Many healthcare systems in Pennsylvania are. Penn Highlands’ is especially bleak. Although Penn Highlands’ executives have suggested otherwise, this may make other cuts to healthcare services inevitable. | | 2. By Guy Ciarrocchi Thank you, Congressional Democrats, countless Democratic Governors and mayors and the well-funded (often by taxpayers) left-wing activist, professional agitators. Thank you. Rather than feeling angry, or shouting back, I offer you my sincere thanks. In case any taxpayer or any citizen thought this past election was merely a contest between two people running for President, or simply a battle between two political parties, the last five weeks have helped us all see that what is at stake is much, much bigger than one election or even one session of Congress. The major differences between the two parties are not over policy. The major battles are over priorities, values and goals.
