name: Phil Izon
subject: Frozen Odds, Lisa Murkowski, George Soros, Hansjorg Wyss, Alaska…
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67cdac1e9c06ee20d3918bd5&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67be7d40c85c9562abb24dfd%26ss_email_id%3D67cdac1e9c06ee20d3918bd5%26ss_campaign_name%3DFrozen%2BOdds%252C%2BLisa%2BMurkowski%252C%2BGeorge%2BSoros%252C%2BHansjorg%2BWyss%252C%2BAlaska%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-03-09T14%253A56%253A41Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67be7d40c85c9562abb24dfd&l=en-US&s=GPer-Mu3ML4NFktyOcLs_SIOlHg%3D) |
---|---
| [**Click Here to Help Finance the Film Project**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67cdac1e9c06ee20d3918bd5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67be7d40c85c9562abb24dfd&l=en-US&s=ZueHUjC3kZy4faLDHBrspp36_j4%3D)
---
#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Spending the money I did on this camera setup was to capture Alaska politics like never before.****Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised 30% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**
---
---
|
---
[_ _ Click Here to Join Frozen Odds Film Project _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67cdac1e9c06ee20d3918bd5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67be7d40c85c9562abb24dfd&l=en-US&s=ZueHUjC3kZy4faLDHBrspp36_j4%3D)
---
#### **ANNOUNCEMENT : RC Maxwell Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert**
**We’re excited to announce that RC Maxwell, a fearless journalist and advocate against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV), will be featured in Frozen Odds, a groundbreaking documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight to repeal RCV.****RC Maxwell has an incredible story to tell. Years ago, he exposed Sen. Lisa Murkowski’s ties to RCV, helping reveal the system’s deeper implications. His investigative work with Project Veritas, with James O’Keefe, played a key role in spreading awareness about the dangers of RCV. He has since continued his work with at Newsmax, even interviewing me last year as we battled RCV in Alaska.****Personally, RC Maxwell was pivotal in my journey to challenge RCV. His early reporting helped shape my understanding of the issue, ultimately leading me to write the repeal and lead the grassroots movement against RCV in Alaska. Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of meeting him at CPAC and in Arizona, where I was educating others on the dangers of RCV.****We are honored to have RC Maxwell join us in filming Frozen Odds this summer. His firsthand experience and relentless commitment to election integrity will bring critical insights to this documentary.****Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to uncover the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections!**
---
#### **ANNOUNCEMENT: Captain Seth Keshel and Dr. Chris Mattmann Join Frozen Odds Movie as Featured Experts**
**We’re honored to announce that Seth Keshel, MBA, will be featured in Frozen Odds, the powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).****Seth Keshel is a former Army Captain of Military Intelligence and Afghanistan veteran. His analytical method of election forecasting and analytics is known worldwide, and he has been commended by President Donald J. Trump for his work in the field. He most recently made headlines by correctly forecasting a 312-226 Trump victory in the Electoral College, with accurate picks in all 56 races for electoral votes.****Captain Keshel proposes 10 Points to True Election Integrity and has identified Ranked Choice Voting as one of the eight cardinal sins of election administration. He toured Alaska in the spring of 2022 while fighting the information battle associated with promoting election integrity.****In Frozen Odds, Captain Keshel will bring his expert analysis and firsthand experience to expose the flaws of RCV and its impact on election integrity.****Dr. Chris Mattmann Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert****We’re thrilled to announce that Dr. Chris Mattmann, a leading AI and data expert, will be featured in Frozen Odds, a powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).****Dr. Mattmann’s career is nothing short of extraordinary. He is the Chief Data and AI Officer at UCLA, former Chief Technology and Innovation Officer at NASA JPL, and President of Mattmann.ai. An accomplished author and industry leader, he has played key roles in advancing AI, big data, and technology across multiple fields.****With firsthand experience in RCV from his time at the Apache Software Foundation, Dr. Mattmann will break down its flaws in Frozen Odds, sharing his expert insights and concerns based on real-world applications.****Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to reveal the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections.**
---
---
|
---
**Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**
---
|
---
**I have three petitions coming soon.****My competition spends millions to do a project that costs me 0.1% what they spend. Of course I’m going to continue.****1\. Voter ID / US Citizenship requirements / Election Integrity****2\. Ban foreign funding of ballot initiatives****3\. Remove voting machines for State and Federal elections in Alaska**
---
---
|
---
---
|

ANNOUNCEMENT: Captain Seth Keshel and Dr. Chris Mattmann Join Frozen Odds Movie as Featured Experts We’re honored to announce that Seth Keshel, MBA, will be featured in Frozen Odds, the powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).Seth Keshel is a former Army Captain of Military Intelligence and Afghanistan veteran. His analytical method of election forecasting and analytics is known worldwide, and he has been commended by President Donald J. Trump for his work in the field. He most recently made headlines by correctly forecasting a 312-226 Trump victory in the Electoral College, with accurate picks in all 56 races for electoral votes.Captain Keshel proposes 10 Points to True Election Integrity and has identified Ranked Choice Voting as one of the eight cardinal sins of election administration. He toured Alaska in the spring of 2022 while fighting the information battle associated with promoting election integrity.In Frozen Odds, Captain Keshel will bring his expert analysis and firsthand experience to expose the flaws of RCV and its impact on election integrity.Dr. Chris Mattmann Joins Frozen Odds as Featured ExpertWe’re thrilled to announce that Dr. Chris Mattmann, a leading AI and data expert, will be featured in Frozen Odds, a powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).Dr. Mattmann’s career is nothing short of extraordinary. He is the Chief Data and AI Officer at UCLA, former Chief Technology and Innovation Officer at NASA JPL, and President of Mattmann.ai. An accomplished author and industry leader, he has played key roles in advancing AI, big data, and technology across multiple fields.With firsthand experience in RCV from his time at the Apache Software Foundation, Dr. Mattmann will break down its flaws in Frozen Odds, sharing his expert insights and concerns based on real-world applications.Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to reveal the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections. | Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down? | I have three petitions coming soon.My competition spends millions to do a project that costs me 0.1% what they spend. Of course I’m going to continue.1\. Voter ID / US Citizenship requirements / Election Integrity2\. Ban foreign funding of ballot initiatives3\. Remove voting machines for State and Federal elections in Alaska | | | | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113 Eagle River 99577 United States

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I want you to hear this directly from me:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.
I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.
I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.
| |
---
| | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: _I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. _
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZS-4kQEYA14Iq-7CivKgyaF-R4cjGNdk0S_86Jlydls4Huc8stcDI_MmIgjiXQmzHb7qTm7wsRID9PgdQYsBQqRGOX2avaATbo_o_HKa15pH46qCodV0JKTKOD0ZR3u1mktxr-V-D3aV7q3u5kIxAkE%3D)
---
**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign - but first, I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZeJdlwyk4F3Jv7vddmDts2C954l5zK7IA-QYSORKwTDEr-GUPrqkiLl39ZGeULOUULKwkqSsl6RPsqf4i4kKHknj7bV4YQ8QneNGTXSTAE0KCEAPvWqnJwPcoSxPUQ3rUK7vhqYFouXaVoKziUrKRVo%3D "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.")**

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZbIr7ySp4wK4fLc-xuaSkCD9XrYT6obxI_wppxAVcKGzh_LjXtL4TCV5_-QryKo-txiLMyrqHF__PF5lvbaro7TuWNF1vcMYlt5ZS1NJXWRtrZeMC-iH0jBzSqTqUAxy61NXNEIlPX28LgxfxThQMAM%3D)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZWM0hYvdXOjbSl0eG3jaIfGyZTUw2KITnxrbXIzbSx6_-nwPCficLfWpB08CKzWzK-LDHQw1qjDiW1Yd0gJxDdPyf09Z_jmf8d3SzrWUCzvEYcKd_HngAi5R9Yj7GbkhzBarTdo0uv4Uit26y_KUW3A%3D)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZZAd9JXU66QT2MlcM7biwooLM9Cz5X44k5dJLddWdl_oHO7l88AC7wn1esxOK8OyK-rFcPjf7tLZMIXGiz8Sj0_ONUTqkRsMjaZPS4H9t0_s7A3TWfARzlGnkqiOXVF3InPaIVgTzsTHp8FAie-y12s%3D)
---
The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. [As Governor, I'd be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZXRvF8IUCbM9fTuFzxm8p9-lJyn4hsRTmj1bI2sBSJAOnQQeMlaAmneDf9mSJhwpk4opCBYQ3z5gvCYZjxFq7f76ACnFmYkM401ERZNd98Kk4Q47m_3rCcjEWKMXHGffuuBlSReMq1kIw7xAuQCnfkg%3D "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for.")
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZR9SPn7Atp-_sPqymHrjD1YPmOLn8YbV3j2I0b-zEA-q1mobD7TGUAG3al6ab46CZR7bua7bFyjiyGpVZzEn-m6wTuN4vAr8-mKSzLPtHj7D4S-xi4uAlefATEB-dLznaSeBIKsX_dJx0UeMobEOzEQ%3D)
---
** WHY GOVERNOR? **
---
Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZcSukreiTyK6hgL17CiIVxCwIymhzYFvMApuYpKcToiywBl2YXudwWaVXzaqsD7cgD7dMmb7Oa3hAHgbS44loLa7HHth-hWrBmm8Ep5UO_f03tRWp3NpVrfac5Q32igI_dUCt287yS8AentIJYL_b1w%3D)
---
We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZXhLPX_-tG10bYtbPfG7ngDMCpJtRkfc_M5LcacAgFTobKIPMu1P3r2DDqSzgkWivyVl7KqDD57E6tZ575n4OH7WBiRrLKCQn10vBi1PTPueuQrgtsXz4n2ZJfhHEhwZqQZJDD8UVOYfeoWDoRrSn7o%3D)
---
That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. [I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-ZejHO0Z1zZu5Kk-yWW-glRiK6YjZ-yyRGAOh2xvGAocaNzHHmpyuM-ndTQ1DYYEpK8YazHfAHg2B1iIKJBRtveOVVrS2myAx1rd8K2jHkcSPPY_UMx13csxcNlGk8SXC56yvpTLU5YqWSkQtujbJ_5Q%3D "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country.")

So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor.

**[It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I've officially launched my campaign. I'm humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fff06107549745cc8251c65b19b8bc77&_e=P-BEXOcW844cqEcLvH7khEC6cM_VkqoOI6KDacwCtxi5ED8koRcBWFMXJ7a8fipCm4nmwk50816Y2DGoABdKHYsiUJgu-svgte8CHF2SUjy01urxGBo9p63x7lMFhlfyLnEdZg65PLjUCuUJYIToZ6Ncb_sVPRdcToPq0tr-Zke6Jk7Z3oUlcS7gyzN0hHZtHTBDejg4dGxtZFWIw8sNCK1Ab-xqLANTkBwQhxeEIytDV7V9_vOSyXYhP8Q_yXjXViVHnOAq9EONqHZ9Id5-Ze6xT2oP1mImR6O7wyC0aTwSpnUyGXvr6cTOBngkWEaqR5NXDYUB96rrLguooMIdn3V6Rru5YHb50teE2cM527x5pJWNA3CWmt3im1HPQ1xYzAD5IQ9L3_sXFvZauEmUR78B9zPQRpAWSBnez5zx1Y8%3D "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size.")**

clean_body: I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country. I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment. I'd like to explain why if you'll indulge me for a moment. | | | | | Hi, it's Vivek Ramaswamy. I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. | "In a moment, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to this historic campaign – but first, I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment." WHY RUN NOW? President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote. | It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally. | Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely. This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America! But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW! WHY OHIO? This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno. | The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. "As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for." | WHY GOVERNOR? Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. | We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. | That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country." So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor. "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size." | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time. God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

**You see, with multiple special elections just WEEKS away, our House majority could fall to a mere _TOSS-UP_ in the blink of an eye.**

And I’ll tell you why that spells trouble...

**_...The Democrats have _already_ filed sham IMPEACHMENT articles against President Trump!_**

Look, I’ll be blunt, but I don’t think it’s any mystery when I say that _everything_ is now on the line.

I know just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this past November.

name: The Squad
subject: Re: We don't have the luxury of waiting
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250309-1260-foote&t=1001&akid=1260%2E342411%2EOoFdJ6 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The stakes have never been higher as far-right vultures wait in the wings
to determine how strong our support is for Ayanna, Alexandria, Ilhan and
Rashida.

During Trump's address to Congress on Tuesday night, he attacked Democrats
and silenced voices of dissent – even removing Rep. Al Green from the
House floor – all while demonizing vulnerable people and spreading brazen
lies.

We knew that Trump will stop at nothing to silence and censor progressives
who advocate for truth and accountability. Now, they’re going as far as
threatening to remove Democrats who stood with Al Green from their
committee assignments - including members for our Squad.

Now more than ever, we need leaders who will uphold integrity in the face
of this chaos. March is here, and with it comes our Squad’s first FEC
fundraising deadline in the new Trump administration – this one is
critical.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250309-movement.ICxzQG&refcode=em20250309-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1260%2E342411%2EOoFdJ6 ]If you stand with our Squad, will you chip in $5, $10, $20, or more to
kick off our March fundraising?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250309-movement.ICxzQG&refcode=em20250309-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1260%2E342411%2EOoFdJ6 ]Contribute ››

As we head into the final month of the quarter, we need to make sure we
have the resources to organize our communities against the far-right’s
destruction and amplify key legislation that pushes back on Trump’s chaos.
We can't afford to sit back while billionaires and special interests pour
endless resources into silencing the opposition.

At the end of the month, we’ll have to assess our resources to accurately
plan how we can support progressive changemakers like Alexandria, Ayanna,
Ilhan, and Rashida at full capacity as they fight for us in Congress. That
means we don’t have the luxury of waiting until the end of the month to
play catch-up.

We’re proud to rely on grassroots supporters like you to help us build the
foundation for success.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250309-movement.ICxzQG&refcode=em20250309-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1260%2E342411%2EOoFdJ6 ]Will you help us kick off our March fundraising early and set us up
for a strong finish to this monumental quarter?

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1260%2E342411%2EOoFdJ6

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

During Trump's address to Congress on Tuesday night, he attacked Democrats and silenced voices of dissent – even removing Rep. Al Green from the House floor – all while demonizing vulnerable people and spreading brazen lies. We knew that Trump will stop at nothing to silence and censor progressives who advocate for truth and accountability. Now, they’re going as far as threatening to remove Democrats who stood with Al Green from their committee assignments - including members for our Squad. Now more than ever, we need leaders who will uphold integrity in the face of this chaos. March is here, and with it comes our Squad’s first FEC fundraising deadline in the new Trump administration – this one is critical. [ ]If you stand with our Squad, will you chip in $5, $10, $20, or more to kick off our March fundraising? [ ]Contribute ›› As we head into the final month of the quarter, we need to make sure we have the resources to organize our communities against the far-right’s destruction and amplify key legislation that pushes back on Trump’s chaos. We can't afford to sit back while billionaires and special interests pour endless resources into silencing the opposition. At the end of the month, we’ll have to assess our resources to accurately plan how we can support progressive changemakers like Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida at full capacity as they fight for us in Congress. That means we don’t have the luxury of waiting until the end of the month to play catch-up. We’re proud to rely on grassroots supporters like you to help us build the foundation for success. [ ]Will you help us kick off our March fundraising early and set us up for a strong finish to this monumental quarter? Together, The Squad

subject: Look, Rep. Jeffries just broke his silence:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Read this NOW >>
| **_Team, Hakeem Jeffries just BROKE HIS SILENCE »_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87722?t=6&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T) THIS is the type of leadership Democrats need, _now more than ever._

Rep. Jeffries is working tirelessly to hold Trump, Elon Musk, and all of their MAGA buddies accountable, and we couldn’t be more grateful. [**So we’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. Claim your spot ASAP before we hit send: SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87722?t=7&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87722?t=8&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87722?t=9&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87722?t=10&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87722?t=11&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19182%2E878179%2EPzDV-T).**

subject: Check our math - a 218-217 Dem majority is possible this year

Friend,

As of today, Congress has **218 Republicans** and **215 Democrats** , with two vacancies.

The two vacant seats are Florida's 6th and 1st Congressional Districts. The 6th district was held by Michael Waltz who is now Trump’s National Security Advisor and the 1st was previously held by Matt Gaetz.
An additional vacancy is expected in New York's 21st Congressional District, which is held by Elise Stefanik (R-NY), who is expected to resign once confirmed as Trump’s Ambassador to the United Nations. That means the GOP majority drops down to 217.

**With that in mind here’s the math for how a Democratic house**** _in 2025_** is possible:

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA3NDkzNjg5NjA3MjIxLFwiclwiOjE0ODQwNzU1ODY5NzEyNTUxMn0iLCJzIjoiYzk5MjRjZDQyYWIyNDQ1YSJ9)
---
|

I teach math for a living. These numbers check out. Check them for yourself.

**There is something tangible we can do to stop Trump and the Project 2025 agenda**** _right now_****.

** This is all contingent on us winning our race. We _will_ uphold our end of this. We’re knocking ten to fourteen thousand doors a day, have hired over a hundred canvassers, have thousands of volunteers, and have pushed to raise nearly seven million dollars in two months.

Republicans know the math too and _cannot_ afford to lose here. That's why on Sunday they dropped their first wave of attack ads against me titled, “**The horrifying truth about Josh Weil**.”

_When we reach a voter before their ads, we_ __take__ that vote. When MAGA gets to the voter first we stand to __lose__ that vote.

|

name: Survival Food Kit
subject: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de?message_id=ImRmNWRlMTYwLWRmNDctMDEzZC0wMGUxLTVhMmUzZjVhMDQzY0BuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/337757929f15c0f972a95ce3dc51b73a4190dc43/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de)
---
---
|
---
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis**
---
---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/8d663d525de8753c368eb0eb8178999fb4a23ece/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/8d663d525de8753c368eb0eb8178999fb4a23ece/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/8d663d525de8753c368eb0eb8178999fb4a23ece/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20595/6374453/8d663d525de8753c368eb0eb8178999fb4a23ece/0913ce2ca9cfaf6806e8540fc372df5ade31a2de)

body:
| |
---
National Ground Game is proud to release a brand new entitled “This Is Not A Disaster Movie” that underscores the chaos of the Trump administration and underscores the importance of voting Democrat on April 1. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA5MzcwNjI5MTEyODQ4LFwiclwiOjE0ODQwOTM5NDg4Njg3MDE5M30iLCJzIjoiZjhhMmE4NDVhZWE1MTBjMSJ9)

---
| Team, as I’m sure you know: Two CRUCIAL Special Elections are happening in Florida in LESS THAN FOUR WEEKS!

Democrats Gay Valimont and Josh Weil are fighting against Trump’s hand-picked extremists, and they need the help of grassroots organizations like ours to get over the finish line.

With that in mind, **National Ground Game is proud to release a brand new ad** entitled “ _This Is Not A Disaster Movie_ ” that underscores the chaos of the Trump administration and the importance of voting Democrat on April 1.
**
We’re inviting top-level supporters like you to get a first sneak peek at the ad, which you can do so by clicking the button below** :

---
| [➡️ **WATCH OUR NEW AD HERE** ⬅️](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA5MzcwNjM3NTAxNDU4LFwiclwiOjE0ODQwOTM5NDg4Njg3MDE5M30iLCJzIjoiNmY3NGY1N2FkNzk0YWI2OSJ9)****

---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA5MzcwNjQwNjQ3MTg3LFwiclwiOjE0ODQwOTM5NDg4Njg3MDE5M30iLCJzIjoiMzYzMDI5NjQ3MGJhZDAyYyJ9)
---
| Trump’s handpicked extremists are hoping Democrats sit this one out. They think we’ll let them waltz into Congress unopposed. **They have another thing coming.

****We’re hitting the airwaves, digital platforms, and every screen we can._

_**_But ad buys aren’t cheap_ – and we need your help to get this ad in front of every last voter in these districts.

[**Chip in today to help us expand our ad buy and turn out the voters we need to WIN!**](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA5MzcwNjQ0ODQxNDkyLFwiclwiOjE0ODQwOTM5NDg4Njg3MDE5M30iLCJzIjoiMWMyMmEwMjgyNTQyNWU5YSJ9)

---
|
---
| | [ CHIP IN >> ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA5MzcwNjQ5MDM1Nzk3LFwiclwiOjE0ODQwOTM5NDg4Njg3MDE5M30iLCJzIjoiYTdhMGVmZThlOWYxOGE3YyJ9)
---
|
---
[](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDA5MzcwNjUyMTgxNTI2LFwiclwiOjE0ODQwOTM5NDg4Njg3MDE5M30iLCJzIjoiM2JhYjBmZjIwNDA1MWI4OCJ9)**National Democrats aren’t investing enough in these must-win races. That’s why we stepped up – but we can’t do it alone.

** If we flood these districts with our message, we can flip these seats. If we sit back, MAGA wins.

It’s that simple.

The choice is clear: **Let’s make history. Let’s win.**

In Solidarity,

**National Ground Game Team**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you take my focus group? —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable me to work alongside Senator Schumer to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250309-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=19720_9716520_fnu1nf&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=19720_9716520_fnu1nf&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19720%2E9716520%2Efnu1nf)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. And that last piece is why I want to hear from you. | | Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue. The Senate is our best chance at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate your invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face. The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and , we'll build our strongest majority yet. With gratitude, Kirsten Kirsten Gillibrand DSCC Chair If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Strength. Loyalty. Courage.
These are qualities military K-9 teams exemplify every day in the face of unimaginable dangers. **_And they ask nothing of us in return._**
That's why we've set a critical goal to get 20,000 signatures on our card to show K-9 teams the support and appreciation they deserve. **But the deadline is at midnight tonight, and we 're still falling short!**

clean_body: K-9 team heroes need to hear from you. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ | | USO Supporter, Strength. Loyalty. Courage. These are qualities military K-9 teams exemplify every day in the face of unimaginable dangers. And they ask nothing of us in return. That's why we've set a critical goal to get 20,000 signatures on our card to show K-9 teams the support and appreciation they deserve. But the deadline is at midnight tonight, and we 're still falling short! Military working dog teams rarely get the recognition they deserve for their bravery and sacrifice. Thank you for standing with our K-9 teams and all our military heroes. --The USO United Service Organizations, Inc. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Shapiro’s agenda and paving the way for far-right attacks on voting, abortion access, and workers’ rights. | | | | | ---|--- Democrats are facing a must-win special election in Pennsylvania this month. If we win, we’ll defend our hard-won majority in the PA House and fend off a right-wing takeover of the chamber. If we lose, the GOP will take full control of the legislature, blocking Democratic Gov. Shapiro’s agenda and paving the way for far-right attacks on voting, abortion access, and workers’ rights.With a Republican trifecta in D.C., we cannot risk losing ground in the states. My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned?
Friend - Yes, I’m a proud black conservative, and it drives liberals crazy!
| |

| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6d00dceb1e544be9b58b19d45756b35c&_e=Ka367nY9WSu2Cf2ALdon28OZ0uNurU4LuADGyfnqDf34Ly7u6HFh8mTuuUkL0Wgub0iWf280hjQVoso0WxtgtMVvK7nrEum9lejBXH6OUt0oDYk2_jaH5TW0SPL-ymZR5MmzaP-F0vy1108GeyJiXfTfYa8t3ajH9vSamx3YhLSk8eRuspubKh8DxpgPQ11uhShLjewIVKrDyg9F5rV5cho7y2CLGiJUK_QgRljYH1OAZ98up-VmhjdMU82Uk708LoTGHxedxdnIPLtbDiDjw-tgA3cJxCMGDbyM4FYc3TU16LyJpg1xR6KEU26-brci-NqIYuoOXdJV8VaS7D5kZhno6j0aPkc9cMlTVIMwZ2U0YyBqP-qq9SKDq6bYGzdjN4ToK1inpvi7Ft8-fO2ZmQ%3D%3D)

---

Friend, I'm tough. I'm battle-tested. I am ready to take on the liberal media head-on and call them out for their hypocrisy.

My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. _Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned?__

Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.

When I became the first woman Lt. Governor of Virginia - of either party - the liberal media just couldn't handle that I was a conservative Republican.

Trust me, I have been called lots of names over the years. But these attacks from the liberal media only embolden me to keep fighting to spread our conservative message. _

---
| | | [HELP SPREAD OUR CONSERVATIVE MESSAGE HERE >>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6d00dceb1e544be9b58b19d45756b35c&_e=Ka367nY9WSu2Cf2ALdon28OZ0uNurU4LuADGyfnqDf34Ly7u6HFh8mTuuUkL0Wgub0iWf280hjQVoso0WxtgtMVvK7nrEum9lejBXH6OUt0oDYk2_jaH5TW0SPL-ymZR5MmzaP-F0vy1108GeyJiXfTfYa8t3ajH9vSamx3YhLSk8eRuspubKh8DxpgPQ11uhShLjewIVKrDyg9F5rV5cho7y2CLGiJUK_QgRljYH1OAZ98up-VmhjdMU82Uk7081ChNdKG-sBcy_EeKK73m-qoz9jWgnVDcxuMgjcsZnfV1omGeMJCxPC0_l0Kd70JWc09dkjhpzUnotvcO39B8iUYriWkngMdbSXEGifHcokDqw0Ra8EBaG4KhDBwBSyUW8znAuC3_tUBr9kXxYqPRog%3D%3D)
---

**Here 's the truth:****I used to be a Democrat. I believed that the Democrats were the party that would put average people like me first. Guess what? I was wrong!

Republicans are the ones fighting to lift folks out of poverty and away from being dependent on the federal government -- access to a quality education -- free of indoctrination. Good-paying jobs in the private sector and a safe and secure community are the principles I am fighting for every single day.

Frankly, when I hear liberals on MSNBC attacking me, I know I must be doing something right! **
---

Peter, I know all of the chaos in the news lately feels overwhelming – the constant attacks on our freedoms, our democracy, and our future.
**But I need you to know this: That is _exactly_ what they want.**
By flooding us with chaos, disinformation, and division, right-wing politicians in Washington hope we'll become too despondent to fight back. But we can't afford to back down – not when so much is at stake.
**That is why we must band together and rise above the noise. We must stand tall in the face of this administration's tactics. And we must gather the resources we need to fight back.

[_It's going to take all of us if we're going to throw off these attempts to undermine our rights, freedoms, and our progressive values – including you, Peter. As New York's attorney general, I've dedicated my career to standing up to bad actors – no matter how powerful they are. And I will continue to hold true to that commitment. I will continue to fight in the name of justice. And I will continue to ensure our most cherished freedoms remain protected.
**But I can't do it alone. When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Peter -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. Your support helps us win races and pass legislation that improves lives.
Thanks to you we’ve won races that wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. We’ve killed repeated efforts to privatize the VA, to cut or shortchange care. It passed the PACT Act and expanded care to millions. It got hundreds of Veterans and National Security professionals elected last year, and they are the ones holding the line against Trump now.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with the VA under attack like never before in its history, with Veterans being fired across the government, and with our commitment to our allies in question, all that matters is that you are chipping in to an organization that is leading the fight against Donald Trump every single day.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important moment in modern American political history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective ads in politics, or taking the fight to Trump in Washington, or supporting our lawsuits against Elon Musk’s overreach seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e4a2861-2bf7-4777-b7e7-18011bc03e48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Wendy Kinney**
It was a speech for the history books. President Trump delivered a bold, uncompromising vision for America--one rooted in strength, sovereignty, and prosperity. He spoke with clarity, conviction, and an undeniable presence that reminded the nation why he remains the dominant political force of our time. The audience saw a leader in control, outlining a blueprint for an American resurgence. But if you turned on CNN or scrolled through X (formerly Twitter), you'd be forgiven for thinking you had just witnessed the coronation of a dictator.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xjmR9ghyCwH-gnhyqpk2Jm9p34dp5KITBd9jTVgW7pI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158589335)
**The Right Saw a Leader; The Left Saw a Nightmare**
For Trump's supporters and independent observers, the speech was a moment of presidential clarity. He laid out a clear vision: securing the border, reviving the economy, strengthening law enforcement, and dismantling the bureaucratic rot that has crippled Washington. His delivery was measured yet forceful, proving he is more focused than ever on winning back the White House and setting America back on course.
But within minutes, the left-wing media had entered full meltdown mode. Pundits breathlessly described the speech as 'terrifying,' 'autocratic,' and even 'fascistic.' Social media was flooded with hyperbolic takes, warning of 'the end of democracy' and the 'darkest speech in American history.' If you only consumed mainstream media, you might believe Trump had just declared war on half the country rather than outlined a path to national revival.
**The Media 's Predictable Playbook**
This isn't new. The establishment media has spent years perfecting a formula: take a Trump speech, strip it of context, inject hysteria, and manufacture a crisis. When Trump calls for securing the border, they hear 'xenophobia.' When he pledges to dismantle the deep state, they cry 'authoritarianism.' When he vows to rebuild the economy, they scoff at his 'delusions.'
Their alternate reality is so entrenched that no amount of truth can shake it. The same pundits who spent four years insisting Trump was an existential threat to democracy now ignore the open-border policies, lawfare tactics, and censorship collusion eroding American liberties under the current administration. Their outrage is performative; their credibility, long lost.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xjmR9ghyCwH-gnhyqpk2Jm9p34dp5KITBd9jTVgW7pI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158589335)
Take MSNBC hosts Nicolle Wallace and Rachel Maddow, for example. Their reactions to Trump's speech were heartless and entirely untrue. When Trump honored brave DJ Daniel, a young boy battling brain cancer, Maddow and Wallace dismissed it with political derision. These reactions were not just wrong--they were morally bankrupt. Trump had called for their terminations, knowing full well that such rhetoric deserves no place in serious discourse.
DJ's father even had to publicly criticize Maddow, telling her to "shut your mouth." The utter lack of humanity in these media figures' responses was appalling, making their already tarnished credibility sink even further. This wasn't just media bias--it was a blatant disregard for the human stories being presented and an attack on the dignity of these families.
_**(Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By Gundry MD](https://substack.com/redirect/105cf647-0b20-4305-ac6c-fd7ed9ec131d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Heart Surgeon Begs Americans:"Stop Doing This To Your Berries"](https://substack.com/redirect/105cf647-0b20-4305-ac6c-fd7ed9ec131d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/105cf647-0b20-4305-ac6c-fd7ed9ec131d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Are you turning healthy fruits into highly unhealthy fruits, without even realizing it?
Fruit can be one of the healthiest things you can put into your body, but the majority of Americans are guilty of making **[this single mistake](https://substack.com/redirect/105cf647-0b20-4305-ac6c-fd7ed9ec131d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that can counteract all of the health benefits of fruit.
Eliminating this mistake could forever change the way we help increase energy levels, decrease brain fog, support digestion, and even lose weight.
**[Click here to learn the top 3 common foods](https://substack.com/redirect/105cf647-0b20-4305-ac6c-fd7ed9ec131d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that you would have never guessed were the cause of your fatigue.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/105cf647-0b20-4305-ac6c-fd7ed9ec131d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**The Left 's Meltdown in Real Time**
The left's meltdown didn't stop at media pundits--it was on full display in Congress. Take Representative Al Green's outburst--interrupting the President and making such a scene that even members of his own party looked uncomfortable. Instead of being embarrassed, the left made him a martyr. When the House censured him, Democrats responded by breaking into song, belting out "We Shall Overcome," treating Green's antics like civil rights defiance.
Then there was the so-called 'paddle protest,' where Democrats waved signs reading "False" and "Musk Steals" during Trump's address. The absurdity of the protest was so great that even some media outlets mocked it, with MSNBC's Symone Sanders comparing it to a bingo game. If that wasn't enough, a couple of days after the speech, members of the left took to TikTok, posting dance videos while the country faced real, pressing issues. It was a spectacle of irrelevance, a side-show that made their behavior look even more unhinged and out of touch in the wake of Trump's serious address.
**The Inhumanity on Full Display**
But perhaps the most disturbing part, both during and after the speech, wasn't the media's hysteria--it was the Democrats' utter lack of humanity.
One would think that the brutal murder of 22-year-old Laken Riley by an illegal migrant, the courageous Devarjaye "DJ" Daniel battling brain cancer, or the heartbreaking loss of 12-year-old Jocelyn Nungarary, would transcend politics. Surely, even the most hardened partisans could find some shred of empathy in those stories.
But the Democrats didn't. They sat stone-faced, unwilling to acknowledge the suffering of these families. When Trump honored Riley's mother and called for justice, many Democrats didn't just ignore it--they scowled, as if acknowledging her pain would somehow hurt their political cause. When brave DJ, a young boy fighting cancer, was recognized, there was no bipartisan applause--just chilling coldness from the same party that claims to champion 'compassion.'
This wasn't just indifference--it was a moral void. It was a refusal to see the humanity of those families, a deliberate rejection of their pain, all for the sake of partisan gamesmanship. It was as if their suffering was an inconvenience to the Democrats' agenda.
Yet, when Senator Elizabeth Warren finally applauded, it wasn't for those American families--it was when Trump mentioned continuing the war in Ukraine. Her priorities couldn't be clearer. The Democrats' moral compass is broken beyond repair.
**The Manufactured Illusion of Division**
The idea that America is split down the middle is a myth. Recent polling reveals a more unified America, with a strong majority supporting Trump's policies. A remarkable 76% of Americans approved of Trump's speech, showing broad support for his vision. Furthermore, about 80% of Americans back his policies on immigration and the economy, aligning with the public's desire for a more secure border and economic revival. Yet, the media portrays a fragmented nation, inflating the importance of fringe views and radical ideologies. Their influence is fading, as evidenced by their collapsing ratings, signaling that the American people are tuning them out.
**The Danger of Competing Realities**
These competing realities aren't just a political spectacle--they're a national crisis. When millions of Americans are fed a steady diet of lies and fear, meaningful conversation becomes impossible. How can we debate policy when one side refuses to acknowledge basic truths? How can we move forward when the media deliberately stokes division instead of striving for honesty?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xjmR9ghyCwH-gnhyqpk2Jm9p34dp5KITBd9jTVgW7pI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158589335)
**The Urgency of Election Integrity**
The battle ahead isn't just about 2026--it's about securing every future election. Without election integrity, nothing else matters. The left's rejection of basic principles of fairness should serve as a wake-up call to every American. We must ensure our elections are secure, transparent, and free from manipulation. The American people overwhelmingly support voter ID, ballot security, and transparency--but the left fights them at every turn. Why? Because they know they can't win in a fair system.
**The Choice Before Us**
Americans must rise above the hysteria and demand honest conversation. The left's panic over Trump's speech reveals more about their own insecurities than it does about the man himself. The real 'threat to democracy' isn't Trump--it's the institutional forces that spent years trying to silence him, criminalize his supporters, and manipulate public perception. The people saw through it, and that's why they elected him in 2024. As we look ahead to the midterms, the fight is far from over--and it's up to us to ensure that the progress we've made isn't undone.
History will remember Trump's speech for what it was: a defining moment in the battle for America's future. But history isn't written yet--we must continue pressing forward, never weakening. Our country is on the road to recovery, but we must never let go, or we will lose our republic. As Benjamin Franklin famously said after the Constitutional Convention of 1787, when asked what kind of government had been created, he replied, "A republic, if you can keep it." These words weren't just a reflection on the new government, but a challenge--a reminder that a republic demands vigilance, unity, and an unwavering commitment from its people. We took our nation to the brink, but through resilience and unity, we are saving America. We reclaimed our republic from the brink. Now, it is our duty to safeguard it for future generations.
* * *
**About the Author**
Wendy Kinney is a devout Christian, legal strategist, attorney, and entrepreneur committed to free speech, financial freedom, and the Constitution. As Founder & CEO of Revere Payments, she protects businesses from financial censorship, ensuring American enterprises remain free.
She speaks truth to power with conviction, standing firm in faith, justice, and the unwavering belief that freedom must always be defended. Her work is rooted in light, guided by principle, and fearless in the fight for truth.

This isn't new. The establishment media has spent years perfecting a formula: take a Trump speech, strip it of context, inject hysteria, and manufacture a crisis... Mar 9 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- By Wendy Kinney It was a speech for the history books. President Trump delivered a bold, uncompromising vision for America--one rooted in strength, sovereignty, and prosperity. He spoke with clarity, conviction, and an undeniable presence that reminded the nation why he remains the dominant political force of our time. The audience saw a leader in control, outlining a blueprint for an American resurgence. But if you turned on CNN or scrolled through X (formerly Twitter), you'd be forgiven for thinking you had just witnessed the coronation of a dictator. The Right Saw a Leader; The Left Saw a Nightmare For Trump's supporters and independent observers, the speech was a moment of presidential clarity. He laid out a clear vision: securing the border, reviving the economy, strengthening law enforcement, and dismantling the bureaucratic rot that has crippled Washington. His delivery was measured yet forceful, proving he is more focused than ever on winning back the White House and setting America back on course. But within minutes, the left-wing media had entered full meltdown mode. Pundits breathlessly described the speech as 'terrifying,' 'autocratic,' and even 'fascistic.' Social media was flooded with hyperbolic takes, warning of 'the end of democracy' and the 'darkest speech in American history.' If you only consumed mainstream media, you might believe Trump had just declared war on half the country rather than outlined a path to national revival. The Media 's Predictable Playbook This isn't new. The establishment media has spent years perfecting a formula: take a Trump speech, strip it of context, inject hysteria, and manufacture a crisis. When Trump calls for securing the border, they hear 'xenophobia.' When he pledges to dismantle the deep state, they cry 'authoritarianism.' When he vows to rebuild the economy, they scoff at his 'delusions.' Their alternate reality is so entrenched that no amount of truth can shake it. The same pundits who spent four years insisting Trump was an existential threat to democracy now ignore the open-border policies, lawfare tactics, and censorship collusion eroding American liberties under the current administration. Their outrage is performative; their credibility, long lost. Take MSNBC hosts Nicolle Wallace and Rachel Maddow, for example. Their reactions to Trump's speech were heartless and entirely untrue. When Trump honored brave DJ Daniel, a young boy battling brain cancer, Maddow and Wallace dismissed it with political derision. These reactions were not just wrong--they were morally bankrupt. Trump had called for their terminations, knowing full well that such rhetoric deserves no place in serious discourse. DJ's father even had to publicly criticize Maddow, telling her to "shut your mouth." The utter lack of humanity in these media figures' responses was appalling, making their already tarnished credibility sink even further. This wasn't just media bias--it was a blatant disregard for the human stories being presented and an attack on the dignity of these families. The Left 's Meltdown in Real Time The left's meltdown didn't stop at media pundits--it was on full display in Congress. Take Representative Al Green's outburst--interrupting the President and making such a scene that even members of his own party looked uncomfortable. Instead of being embarrassed, the left made him a martyr. When the House censured him, Democrats responded by breaking into song, belting out "We Shall Overcome," treating Green's antics like civil rights defiance. Then there was the so-called 'paddle protest,' where Democrats waved signs reading "False" and "Musk Steals" during Trump's address. The absurdity of the protest was so great that even some media outlets mocked it, with MSNBC's Symone Sanders comparing it to a bingo game. If that wasn't enough, a couple of days after the speech, members of the left took to TikTok, posting dance videos while the country faced real, pressing issues. It was a spectacle of irrelevance, a side-show that made their behavior look even more unhinged and out of touch in the wake of Trump's serious address. The Inhumanity on Full Display But perhaps the most disturbing part, both during and after the speech, wasn't the media's hysteria--it was the Democrats' utter lack of humanity. One would think that the brutal murder of 22-year-old Laken Riley by an illegal migrant, the courageous Devarjaye "DJ" Daniel battling brain cancer, or the heartbreaking loss of 12-year-old Jocelyn Nungarary, would transcend politics. Surely, even the most hardened partisans could find some shred of empathy in those stories. But the Democrats didn't. They sat stone-faced, unwilling to acknowledge the suffering of these families.
