name: Tamie Wilson
subject: They will never break us
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Yesterday, the world celebrated International Women’s Day, and all month long, we honor the fearless women throughout history who have fought, bled, and sacrificed so that we might have a shot at freedom.
But let’s be real: this is not just a celebration—it’s a call to action.
Even if Trump uses his executive orders to “cancel” Women’s History Month or erase our contributions from history books, he will fail—because we are making history every single day.
We weren’t given the right to vote—we fought like hell for it.
We weren’t granted protections from domestic violence and workplace harassment—we demanded them after centuries of silence.
And we sure as hell didn’t ask for our bodily autonomy to be ripped away—but they did it anyway.
They think we’ll just accept it. That we’ll cower in the face of their bans, their pay gaps, their blatant disregard for our safety and dignity.
But if history has proven anything, it’s that women do not stay silent.
If you believe, like I do, that we will be the ones to lead this country out of the darkness, then I need you in this fight. Chip in today to help us defeat Jim Jordan and every extremist who wants to take us back in time. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250309_womens_history_month_link1]
Because the truth is, they know they’re losing.
This is the last, pathetic gasp of a dying breed of patriarchal control—an outdated, Leave It to Beaver fantasy where white, male power sits unchallenged at the head of the table.
It’s a relic of the past, desperately clawing to stay relevant in a world that has already moved on.
They see women rising, taking charge, demanding our place in boardrooms, in Congress, in movements that shape the future.
And instead of adapting, instead of embracing a world where equality is the norm, they are doubling down on their fear and lashing out with everything they have left.
They are gutting reproductive rights, forcing women into financial and medical crises just to prove they still have power over our bodies.
They are stripping away protections in the workplace, erasing DEI initiatives, attacking contraception, and making it harder for women—especially women of color—to succeed.
They call it “traditional values,” but let’s be honest: it’s nothing more than panic from a crumbling patriarchy that is terrified of being replaced.
They know their time is up, and they are trying to burn everything down on their way out.
But here’s the thing: we fight harder.
We have spent generations forcing progress into existence, and we’re not about to stop now.
For every right they try to rip away, we will build a movement stronger than before.
For every attack they launch, we will stand together, louder, bolder, and more determined.
They want us exhausted, demoralized, afraid—but they will never break us.
Jim Jordan isn’t working to pass equal pay legislation. In fact, he’s voted against it 3 times! He isn’t fighting for affordable childcare. He isn’t lifting a damn finger to help the women in his district who are struggling to make ends meet while the cost of living skyrockets. He votes against us every chance he gets.
Worse, he writes legislation to make things harder for us. Luckily his bills didn’t pass because they were too extreme back then, but times are changing. Someday, one of his radical bills may go through. I cringe at the thought.
For now, he’s still using his power to attack our rights, peddle conspiracies, and do Trump’s dirty work.
But we are stronger. We are relentless. And we will not stop until every woman in this country has the freedom and equality we deserve. ARE YOU WITH ME?
Help us take on Jim Jordan and his anti-woman extremism—donate today to fuel this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250309_womens_history_month_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

Tamie Wilson For US

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is an email about oversight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek, Adam here.

As I do all I can in the Senate to deliver for families like yours, it's
important for me to pull back the curtain and offer a behind-the-scenes look at
my work to provide oversight and accountability, legislate to stop the abuses of
the Trump Administration, and share how I'm communicating directly with this
work.

I'll continue to share regular updates like the one below. Thank you for reading
and staying engaged.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Derek –

There are a lot of ways to hold the administration accountable — through
litigation, legislation, mobilization, and more. And this email is about
just one of them:

Investigation.

Oversight isn’t just impeachments or clashes at big hearings, although
those things are really important.

For example, I have already shared some of my efforts to expose Kash
Patel’s shady dealings, extreme views, and attacks on the rule of law. But
just as a reminder...

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Democrats demand Patel information in special counsel's classified
documents report

And I took him on during his confirmation hearing — repeatedly:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]FBI nominee Patel, California's Adam Schiff battle in Senate
confirmation hearing

But there is a lot more to the process of investigating Trump
administration corruption and exposing it:

First up, Elon Musk – the world’s richest man who is attacking Social
Security and calling it a Ponzi scheme, who is illegally firing federal
employees, and who appears to be stealing the private data of the American
people to feed his ego or his AI algorithms. All while he is using his
position to enrich himself and expand the billions in contracts his
businesses already enjoy. And, attacking me and anyone else who will stand
up to him. Constantly.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Democrats demand conflict-of-interest answers over Elon Musk 'Doge'
role. Adam Schiff warns in letter to White House that Trump ally may use
role to 'shield his companies from federal scrutiny'

Despite the fact that no one elected him to do anything, Elon Musk has
been empowered by Trump to make massive cuts to the federal government in
violation of law and court order.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Schiff presses White House on Musk conflicts of interest, ethics

Whether it’s the FAA suddenly installing Starlink satellite terminals...

Hundreds of jobs cut at the Transportation Department which was
investigating Tesla...

DOGE targeting the SEC (also investigating Elon)...

The State Department having a $400 million order for armored Teslas...

Or gutting jobs at the U.S. Department of Agriculture (also investigating
an Elon company)...

Each of these flagrant conflicts of interest need to be called out and
investigated. And evidence gathered for the courts so they can enforce
their own orders and make the illegality stop.

My work has also clearly been noticed by Donald Trump:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Trump removes top government ethics czar

We need to dig into issues both big and small — and explain to the
American people how Donald Trump is cutting billions from Medicaid and
food programs to provide tax breaks to his fellow billionaires.

He’s also putting lives in danger.

Donald Trump decided to detain immigrants in federal prisons as part of
his push to cruelly target immigrant communities and undocumented
immigrants.

As part of my oversight efforts, I recently released testimony from a
Bureau of Prison’s whistleblower in California raising significant
concerns, and asking hard questions about how to safely manage
interactions between incarcerated criminals and civil immigration
detainees, and how staff will be trained to manage this.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Federal prison officer alarmed about inhumane handling of migrants; 2
U.S. Senators want hearing

We need to use all the tools at our disposal to hold Republicans
accountable and expose their malfeasance to the American public.

Just a couple of days ago, Ruben Gallego and I took to the Senate Floor to
force a vote on a resolution pushing back against Trump’s coddling of
Russian dictator Vladimir Putin and his attacks on Ukraine — from calling
Zelensky a dictator to falsely saying that Ukraine started the war.

I’ve held the Senate Floor overnight. I’ve pushed back on GOP efforts to
stop dangerous nominees like RFK, Jr. and Tulsi Gabbard. And I’m not going
to stop:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Senate Democrats Hold the Floor in Overnight Protest of Trump Nominee

Oversight is critically important. And it’s one of the best tools at our
disposal right now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]If you want to chip in a small amount to help us continue this work, I
hope you’ll give to our campaign right now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em.sOF3cu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q12025_abs_em.yoPhsC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em.rGpVdd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em.zzYphW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q12025_abs_em.KUIsEV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m going to share some of my oversight work on a regular basis. And
thanks for all you’re doing to stand up to Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and
their cruelty.

Thanks,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q12025_abs_em.-jDD3p&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=8348%2E5257348%2EYIU0-v ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m a Minnesotan — not a D.C. insider. | [](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=oqxinIeXDiNI&amount=25)
---
**Peter, I want you to be the first to hear this: I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate.**

I’d like to take a moment and tell you why I’ve decided to run for the Senate — but first, I need to ask: [_**will you split an $25 donation between Fight For Progress PAC and me today to become a Founding Donor to my campaign?**_](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=mLVSESaL69bk&amount=25)
| [ DONATE » ](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=cU32UDgRmNCC&amount=25)
---
Throughout my life and career in state and local government, I’ve seen and lived the impact the federal government can have on people’s everyday lives.

I was raised by a single mom in St. Louis Park. **We had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher, and public programs helped my mom afford lunch at school, health insurance coverage, and child care.**

My lived experience has informed my belief that we should wrap our arms around our neighbors in need.

I believe Minnesota is a potluck state. People can come from all walks of life, have different experiences, and yet share the same values. If it snows, we’ll shovel your driveway. If you move into the neighborhood, we’ll bring you a hotdish or bars.

Now, I get to pay back the investments my neighbors made in my family through my career in public service.

**I’ve served on the Minneapolis School Board, in the Minnesota House, and now as Lieutenant Governor.** It has been the honor of my lifetime to serve people from every walk of life and every corner of the state.

Throughout my career, **I’ve championed the kitchen-table issues** that impact our children and families every day, including raising the minimum wage, paid family and medical leave, and free school meals.

**Peter, I’m a Minnesotan — not a D.C. insider.** I’ve lived here my whole life, and my Ojibwe relatives have called this land home since time immemorial.

**If we win this race, I’ll become the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate.**

[_**Peter, my Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman’. I’m asking for your help to speak in a loud and clear voice for all of Minnesota in the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split $25 between Fight For Progress PAC and me before midnight to become a Founding Donor to my campaign?**_](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=DvbTKaU1SsGH&amount=25)
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=DWj1i6ywvFfv&amount=5)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=S15pCqD7GiNs&amount=10)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=xpEUOJcDT02H&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=IpoNiXoBNIMS&amount=50)
---
| [ OTHER AMOUNT ](https://fight4progress.org/flanagan?t=zg9F01I3R1eH)
---
With gratitude!

Peggy Flanagan

P.S. If I haven’t earned your endorsement yet, I understand. I hope you’ll keep engaging with me — reading these emails, saying hi at events, and asking questions you want to hear my thoughts on. I’m excited to work to earn your support.
* * *
| | [

](https://fight4progress.org/l/Lf80mZCFCyVR)
---
Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
Fight for Progress PAC
PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003
United States
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://fight4progress.org/l/jofbeQyo0yam)
---
[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](https://fight4progress.org/l/TQozQjL1vl5B)
---
Emails are crucial for communicating with top members of the Fight for Progress PAC team. However, If you would prefer to receive fewer emails, [_click here_](https://fight4progress.org/l/cEJlfqvoJluq).

If you would like to stop receiving email communications from us, please [_unsubscribe here_](https://fight4progress.org/l/TwMt6bveZXia)

| | Team,

Peter, Donald Trump promised on the campaign trail that he would protect essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. To no one’s surprise, _**Trump lied.**_ More than 100 million Americans rely on these programs for healthcare and retirement benefits. Now, House Republicans endorsed a budget resolution that would cut them. They’re falling right in line behind their self-proclaimed “king” Donald Trump to rip these benefits away from the American people — all to line the pockets of their billionaire buddies. **That’s why I just joined my Democratic colleagues in demanding House Republicans keep their hands off Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.** Let’s be very clear, Peter: While Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and House Republicans construct their plans to get richer off the backs of the American people, Democrats are fighting to deliver real results. _**[If you’re with us, please rush a contribution of any amount to support my work now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103542132/532496869/1386712341?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250309_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY3OWZhNS0wN2ZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R81u8PBhfOt0KZO0ukl9Z9OZG0nDtwRt_eIPlnGZZLg=)**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103542134/532496871/1386712341?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250309_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY3OWZhNS0wN2ZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R81u8PBhfOt0KZO0ukl9Z9OZG0nDtwRt_eIPlnGZZLg=)

clean_body: | Peter, Donald Trump promised on the campaign trail that he would protect essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare. To no one’s surprise, Trump lied. More than 100 million Americans rely on these programs for healthcare and retirement benefits. Now, House Republicans endorsed a budget resolution that would cut them. They’re falling right in line behind their self-proclaimed “king” Donald Trump to rip these benefits away from the American people — all to line the pockets of their billionaire buddies. That’s why I just joined my Democratic colleagues in demanding House Republicans keep their hands off Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Let’s be very clear, Peter: While Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and House Republicans construct their plans to get richer off the backs of the American people, Democrats are fighting to deliver real results. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Where we go from here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
On Tuesday night, we heard the longest address by an Executive to the Congress in history. I want to be clear that nothing about this Presidency – including his attacks on the civil service and the Constitution – is normal. I attended the Joint Address because I feel it is an important symbol of Congress as a co-equal branch of government, especially when the Executive is trying to test the limits of its powers.
Despite its historic length, the President spent less than two minutes of his speech on the high cost of living that so many Americans are burdened by every day. He did not commit to protecting Social Security, Medicare, or veterans benefits – all while Elon Musk is taking a sledgehammer to the civil servants responsible for delivering those critical services for Americans. In fact, he spent 13 minutes in ludicrous rants about fantastical (and wildly false) waste in Social Security and elsewhere in the federal government. He neglected to mention that we can’t end childhood cancer while DOGE, blessed by the White House, is slashing cancer research funding at NIH and House Republicans are poised to gut Medicaid – the largest health insurer of children – by $880 billion.
As hard as it was to sit through the name-calling and outright lies spoken on Tuesday night, I remain steadfast and laser-focused on the two things that matter most: in the long-term, winning the majority back for House Democrats in 2026 and in the short-term, finding three House Republicans who can help us legislate a stop to this calamity and nonsense.
The difficult truth is that one-third of the American people voted for President Trump, one-third voted for someone else, and one-third did not feel passionately enough, heard, or represented to even vote. I’ll be focused on listening and winning the hearts and minds of folks and colleagues in all three groups. We all have a role to play here and I will be humbly asking all of you to pitch in. Apathy is simply not an option.
We have to start building these coalitions now. Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-03-09]

Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

subject: President Elon Musk?!

Let’s be blunt: Donald Trump is not running the show in Washington — Elon Musk is.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-crockett-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-crockett-25]This unelected, unvetted, unconfirmed individual has been given the authority to refashion our government and our democracy in his own horrifying image.

And worst of all, Mike Johnson and his MAGA House Majority will rubber-stamp whatever “President” Trump and Elon Musk demand.

The only way to put a stop to their horrific agenda and save what’s left of our country is to defeat these extremists at the ballot box next year. I’m already working to do just that, and I’m counting on your help now more than ever. Can I count on you to step up when it matters most? Will you split a donation between myself and the Texas Organizing Project PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-crockett-25?amount=10]

body:

Peter,

Last week, a brutal stabbing took the life of a 16-year-old high school student in Washington State—an innocent victim of the violence fueled by our broken immigration system. This tragedy is not an isolated incident but a direct result of _**lax policies that have left our borders vulnerable.**_

Under President Biden, our borders were wide open, risking American lives. But thanks to President Trump, Secretary Noem, Border Czar Homan, and our brave immigration officials, incredible progress has been made.

Still, much work remains. Stronger enforcement is essential to protect American families and prevent further senseless violence. **We must secure our borders and DETAIN and DEPORT every last illegal alien in this country before more lives are lost.**

name: Team Tina
subject: Tina’s new proposal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
We need to build more housing — but while we do that, we also need to ensure that people have a place to go to get the help they need to get back on their feet. |
#
---
Peter, addressing Oregon’s homelessness crisis has been one of Tina’s top priorities. Since day one, she’s been laser-focused on expanding the availability of affordable housing across the state by cutting the red tape and making it easier to build homes that people can afford. We need to build even more housing — **but while we do that, we also need to ensure that people have a place to go _now_ to get the help they need to get back on their feet. ** That’s why Tina has proposed legislation to create a statewide homeless shelter program that would provide _anyone_ experiencing homelessness the opportunity to find shelter anywhere in the state. In 2023, Tina declared a homelessness state of emergency to address the growing crisis and since then, local governments, shelters, and other services have stepped up to provide shelter for homeless Oregonians. Tina’s proposal would formalize this approach by establishing a system of regional coordinators tasked with overseeing local shelter funding. To be clear, growing the system of shelters is only part of the solution — **but widely accessible shelters are a critical component of Tina’s ultimate objective, ending the homelessness crisis in Oregon.** [**If you support Tina’s efforts to ensure that shelters are available to every Oregonian experiencing homelessness, please add your name to our petition today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103543265/532500115/161845376?contactdata=0sax5kx1C0PcQwkWW25Iu8VM+21jooFdHmgV6YgjHx8WjvxN+xgnQNMyan5EJ1HfVLO5Q7G4UsMn0g0lexHxDn3NTNBOdeOQ64G5i6IzgW+bKeG80WQPiH4E2TOBQy4uquP3hF6FaUKM8S2Scrz69NuqGJfsa0Wbgmmv6+dWnb4=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNkMzg2ZS0wOWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56ll6jJCsZduFN7I7Zgg_e7dZVuuVNxntmjyX14y4sY=&emci=e1cd386e-09fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f4cd386e-09fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103543267/532500117/161845376?contactdata=0sax5kx1C0PcQwkWW25Iu8VM+21jooFdHmgV6YgjHx8WjvxN+xgnQNMyan5EJ1HfVLO5Q7G4UsMn0g0lexHxDn3NTNBOdeOQ64G5i6IzgW+bKeG80WQPiH4E2TOBQy4uquP3hF6FaUKM8S2Scrz69NuqGJfsa0Wbgmmv6+dWnb4=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNkMzg2ZS0wOWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56ll6jJCsZduFN7I7Zgg_e7dZVuuVNxntmjyX14y4sY=&emci=e1cd386e-09fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f4cd386e-09fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)

clean_body: We need to build more housing — but while we do that, we also need to ensure that people have a place to go to get the help they need to get back on their feet. | Peter, addressing Oregon’s homelessness crisis has been one of Tina’s top priorities. Since day one, she’s been laser-focused on expanding the availability of affordable housing across the state by cutting the red tape and making it easier to build homes that people can afford. We need to build even more housing — but while we do that, we also need to ensure that people have a place to go now to get the help they need to get back on their feet. That’s why Tina has proposed legislation to create a statewide homeless shelter program that would provide anyone experiencing homelessness the opportunity to find shelter anywhere in the state. In 2023, Tina declared a homelessness state of emergency to address the growing crisis and since then, local governments, shelters, and other services have stepped up to provide shelter for homeless Oregonians. Tina’s proposal would formalize this approach by establishing a system of regional coordinators tasked with overseeing local shelter funding. To be clear, growing the system of shelters is only part of the solution — but widely accessible shelters are a critical component of Tina’s ultimate objective, ending the homelessness crisis in Oregon. | Thank you, Kotek HQ | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
---
[ **Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=692d495a17704add8a83259070b33bb5&_e=NQXIVHJPPbeI0j94k-FpTXMC7gh1zGExYYyaMuJ5jVpTXbRb_OTUBvK4keu1skrCiUMbZLXlshZl4F4vX1he2l4XnWHDwDnINbC5J-GWanx-AiG-CmQSgczyPAd8XWim-5I7ZEbUJ0ubP3Mz0usrhcK8gFpdqsK2kgS8IuWDnimkcFlYYl5Nf9-LW1wQ2IR2PV6AzEvdTYsfHzkF-NV4w-G6slePGk2gQX8228dB-SjIVKACeBZjTvDgG2U2bdtwuD-l58KAIpwf7ZIjBR14e4vh6Ynsyj68scm4au5lYqpCqWqTYHwLm0msUrtzvY2gIchaMS1s3bICcoFweuxpzPFll-0e8i_pWqJdc-QVMCN7T74P7xzDRkD7aIvNRc2ExLQpE12NvdJWRpJlC78-GkETQPDmD41iwXY9ecqjGco%3D)
---
Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Team Truth to Power
subject: Attacks on our postal service, again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39507%2E3422442%2EhDPZwP)
Derek,
Elon Musk is back at it with yet another dangerous idea for Trump’s cronies to make a quick buck, at the expense of a critical government service we all rely on.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250309-2?refcode=em20250309-39507&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39507_3422442_hDPZwP&akid=39507%2E3422442%2EhDPZwP)
The U.S. Postal Service has a mandate to deliver for all Americans. Every single one of us benefits from this important resource, but it’s a lifeline for some of the most vulnerable communities.
Veterans, seniors, and people with disabilities rely on USPS to get life-saving medications. Rural Americans count on the postal service to stay connected, because those routes aren’t profitable for private companies. USPS unlocks economic opportunities for small business owners across America.
To save USPS, we need to speak up.
**[Help us send a strong message to Elon Musk and Donald Trump. Chip in $5 to tell them that we love our postal service, and we aren’t going to let them dismantle it to enrich their buddies.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250309-2?refcode=em20250309-39507&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39507_3422442_hDPZwP&akid=39507%2E3422442%2EhDPZwP)**
Onward,
Team TTP

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250309-39507&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39507_3422442_hDPZwP&akid=39507%2E3422442%2EhDPZwP)**
---

subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9dwwcp1vvjyzato1p92pgj5oxzvrb9038b8q42ejm65j9cljijhb36gzp2lpx2c0o65daiajlqsxncqx6&__stmp=ssv9z1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

| | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h) Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**. If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_. This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h)

---
|
---

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ssv9z1&__onlt=h)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

clean_body: We are tired of billionaires buying elections. | = Hey Peter, Did you know Pennsylvania does not have a law limiting gifts to politicians? Guess how many PA legislators take money from major MAGA donor and richest man in Pennsylvania, Jeffrey Yass? | | = = = = We have power, Peter. “The most common way people give up their power is by thinking they don’t have any.” Billionaires have banded together and are using their money as influence to make the rules to their liking. They don’t want us to know that we have the power to call the shots, if we get organized. Organized people can and will defeat the wealthiest few. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — One PA | One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Elon is bankrolling another GOP candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Elon Musk and Republicans in Wisconsin are trying to flip the state Supreme Court to conservative control.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250309-4836-footer&t=1&akid=4836%2E420207%2EsvhqQ2)
Peter,
Elon Musk poured hundreds of millions of dollars into the effort to elect Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans last November, and he’s been rewarded with unprecedented control over the federal government.
**Now he’s using the same playbook to try and flip an important Supreme Court race in Wisconsin, where Republicans are trying to defeat Susan Crawford and flip the court to conservative control.**
**[Peter, we can't let him succeed. Will you split a $3 donation between my campaign and Susan Crawford today so we can stop Elon's chosen candidate from flipping the Wisconsin Supreme Court?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250309?refcode=em20250309-4836&amount=3&refcode2=4836_420207_svhqQ2&akid=4836%2E420207%2EsvhqQ2)**
**[Split your donation now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250309?amount=3&refcode=em20250309-4836&refcode2=4836_420207_svhqQ2&akid=4836%2E420207%2EsvhqQ2)**
Although this race is happening in Wisconsin, we shouldn’t lull ourselves into believing that its effects will be limited to there.
If Elon Musk and his billionaire allies succeed in flipping the court, they could lock in Republican gerrymanders that make it even harder for Democrats to win control of Congress in the future.
We should also remember that Wisconsin is a pivotal swing state in presidential elections. When Trump lost Wisconsin in 2020, he challenged the results in front of the state Supreme Court. And although they ruled against him at the time, the conservative candidate being bankrolled by Elon has refused to say whether the decision was the right one.
**We cannot leave the future of our democracy in the hands of corrupt, unaccountable billionaires like Elon Musk, Peter.**
[**That's why I'm asking every member of this movement to split a donation between my campaign and Susan Crawford today. The future of our democracy is on the ballot, and we must do everything we can to defend it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250309?refcode=em20250309-4836&amount=3&refcode2=4836_420207_svhqQ2&akid=4836%2E420207%2EsvhqQ2)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250309?amount=3&refcode=em20250309-4836&refcode2=4836_420207_svhqQ2&akid=4836%2E420207%2EsvhqQ2)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250309-4836-footer&t=2&refcode2=4836_420207_svhqQ2&akid=4836%2E420207%2EsvhqQ2)**

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Trump just enacted the largest tax increase in a generation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
These tariffs are expected to raise costs for families by thousands of dollars per year

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103544430/532502951/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTQ3YjFjOC0wZGZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ixnm-c9A8yiBSpJa4sopA0hgOpN4ZZbgD9q9X32D7s=) _**Trump tariffs could amount to 'largest tax increase in at least a generation'[1]**_ Earlier this month, President Trump implemented a 25 percent tariff on imports from Canada and Mexico, two of the United States’ largest trading partners. **Because of these tariffs, the cost of cars, housing, gasoline, groceries, and so much more are expected to dramatically rise in the coming weeks.** At a moment when Kansans are already feeling the squeeze, this reckless economic plan will raise costs even further for Kansas families and put even more pressure on Kansas’ agricultural sector. And don’t be fooled by the President’s spin: **These tariffs are simply another tax on the American people.** Less than a month after cheering on the passage of a $4.5 trillion tax cut for the ultra-wealthy, President Trump is forcing the rest of us to make up the difference. In the coming weeks, we could even see gas prices rise by as much as _**70 cents per gallon**_ — a dramatic increase that would make it even harder for Kansas families to keep up with everyday expenses. While President Trump continues to enact policies that exclusively benefit big corporations and the ultra-wealthy, I’m working every day to ensure Kansas families, farmers, and small businesses aren’t left behind — but I can’t do it alone. [_**So please, if you can, chip in today to help me fight back against the President’s senseless economic plan. We wanted to check in with you after these first few hectic weeks of Trump’s presidency and let you know that we’re still fighting here at Their Future PAC.

As the FIRST & ONLY PAC for kids, we work hard every day to take back the House with Kids First candidates. We believe kids deserve a real voice in our nation’s capital. If you agree, we want your input.

**_[Will you take our quick survey to tell us your top issues plaguing this nation’s youth?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Q8aA1LuWFTakDfNbJQFCsZ6egHKL6JOpn64mughjcINBP9LVolVQ67bcuLZK-cpUPyeQkQQZ8Z_HXossZL81IQOLGnFIi5CRj8w7DBYHc5b_4rbX9M93cIpmon72EdjzYhhi_wfAcXnOkRcZ1QT7PjBwm_G-8MDBMCpesA2is6BZ-eDzQ-8ghTsejHd2pVuWVSxOCYMWnCvHYAVgZGPmRILSTVrearIATrnJ1iquG5AsJv0aQ8PNcA93iPz5e3OIW_dPj6sNnBNxSt6nXCivHOCgRjrjaHwS2CuDMLCYQqDbORwZAJ67TT7jtDlwtN5ynXwsETJQe9XeWB3wAEERq5ddUXQb53JjqTHAm-LoOKoom0x5dfyQwgX6bUAeo214/4en/_MfV9jFxS4S4peZF63Sd9w/h1/h001.cae5Rv0jvbc5Yho-b26WH6GwgFuvGYXWGwuFNG8Reno)_**

To be successful, kids must have access to health care, a quality education, and a safe environment. But to ensure this for all children across the country, we must elect leaders who put kids first.

That’s why Their Future PAC is not going anywhere. It’s frustrating to see leaders in Washington continue to ignore the needs of kids across the country. We’re fighting to put Kids First Candidates in office who won’t make devastating cuts to Medicaid—only to fill the pockets of billionaires.

**_[Their Future PAC is here to stay, so we want to hear from you. Click here to tell us your top issues>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Q8aA1LuWFTakDfNbJQFCsZ6egHKL6JOpn64mughjcINBP9LVolVQ67bcuLZK-cpUPyeQkQQZ8Z_HXossZL81IQOLGnFIi5CRj8w7DBYHc5b_4rbX9M93cIpmon72EdjzYhhi_wfAcXnOkRcZ1QT7Pf5ogK_ACu_w3pDMfH0oHC-G0PjNU90PIB-QCq7dWT12liWXzFOPKDTT8IzyfoD97jYiD6vOkAaWMOznNU7HkD7NH7gQl1J8jiSmCOe04_Jhd89tBuEk9QHEnSU8waYGj7TUu6-P7uVJKPMqqI9iBg261iP-zm_KNIg1dIIuLuRpX7ClZbwxLpWRiedyXn5B-ADbXopE1suJSeE5L9jadJ_sg8nY1JZ9qbGQbm6IMRR8/4en/_MfV9jFxS4S4peZF63Sd9w/h3/h001.PU0z0QL3g5e6Rj514W4OMzIYJm3eAkQIeGd8e-B9R0g)_**

Dr. Annie Andrews

Peter Willis — Bernie is
in Wisconsin this weekend to build the movement to fight Trump and Musk’s
Oligarchy AND stop Musk from buying yet another election. Groups backed by
Musk have now spent $5.2 million against Susan Crawford in the crucial
upcoming Wisconsin Supreme Court election.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22367?t=1061&akid=7813%2E5885482%2EBeNJ84 ][IMG]

Bernie and Our Revolution know how important Wisconsin is. On April 1st,
voters will go out to the polls and vote for a new state Supreme Court
justice that will DECIDE the majority on the court. Elon is trying to
outright buy that majority, which will decide key cases on free and fair
elections, abortion rights, and corporate power.

In order to defeat Musk in Wisconsin, we need to raise $47,067 more to
fully fund our Get Out The Vote operation. Every single dollar we raise
will help us reach 6 voters by email and text and remind them to vote by
April 1st.

donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

The stakes of this race couldn’t be more important. If Musk defeats Susan
Crawford, what Bernie calls the “United States of Elon” will become a
reality. And we can’t let that happen.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22367?t=1060&akid=7813%2E5885482%2EBeNJ84 ][IMG]

Right now, the Wisconsin Supreme Court is led by a liberal majority that
has worked to protect our free and fair elections, voting rights, and
abortion rights in the state. And with the court poised to guarantee a
right to abortion and make new redistricting maps more balanced, Wisconsin
could be the state that decides the next congressional and presidential
elections.

Musk wants to ensure that the Wisconsin Supreme Court flips in his favor.

That’s why Bernie and Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team are working
around the clock to lift Susan Crawford to victory. But we need a SURGE of
grassroots support to make it happen. 489 Our Revolution supporters have
already chipped in to fuel our GOTV work — now we need even more support
to hit our Wisconsin fundraising goal!

Groups backed by Musk have now spent $5.2 million against Susan Crawford in the crucial upcoming Wisconsin Supreme Court election. [ ][IMG] Bernie and Our Revolution know how important Wisconsin is. On April 1st, voters will go out to the polls and vote for a new state Supreme Court justice that will DECIDE the majority on the court. Elon is trying to outright buy that majority, which will decide key cases on free and fair elections, abortion rights, and corporate power. In order to defeat Musk in Wisconsin, we need to raise $47,067 more to fully fund our Get Out The Vote operation. Every single dollar we raise will help us reach 6 voters by email and text and remind them to vote by April 1st. [ ]Will you donate any amount RIGHT NOW to help us take on Elon Musk in Wisconsin? Musk wants to ensure that the Wisconsin Supreme Court flips in his favor. That’s why Bernie and Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team are working around the clock to lift Susan Crawford to victory. name: Jane Fonda
subject: Tell me: What do you give a damn about?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I want to hear what fires you up.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103544805/532504385/1328794144?refcode=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhN2I0MTc4LTBmZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6-lzysvLVjTWYMOyQMBJKT3VzkpXH0HTHLh3Gp_q980=&emci=b22d9557-83fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
I meant what I said on that stage. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103544806/532504386/34830148?refcode=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhN2I0MTc4LTBmZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6-lzysvLVjTWYMOyQMBJKT3VzkpXH0HTHLh3Gp_q980=&emci=b22d9557-83fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105) Empathy isn’t weakness. It’s power. The greatest movements in history didn’t come from apathy. They came from people who gave a damn and refused to back down. That’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC — to build a movement of people who refuse to let politicians and Big Oil corporations sacrifice our environment for their greed. But this isn’t just my fight. _It’s ours._ Now, I want to turn this over to you. **_What do you give a damn about?_** Maybe for you, that means fighting for clean air and water. Maybe it’s protecting voting rights or fighting for reproductive freedom. Or maybe it’s something deeply personal — something that keeps you up at night and pushes you forward every day. **[Whatever it is, I want to know. What’s the one thing you refuse to stop fighting for? Because naming what we care about — speaking it out loud — is the first step toward building an unstoppable movement.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103544807/532504387/34830148?refcode=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhN2I0MTc4LTBmZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6-lzysvLVjTWYMOyQMBJKT3VzkpXH0HTHLh3Gp_q980=&emci=b22d9557-83fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)** | [**MESSAGE JANE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103544808/532504388/34830148?refcode=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhN2I0MTc4LTBmZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6-lzysvLVjTWYMOyQMBJKT3VzkpXH0HTHLh3Gp_q980=&emci=b22d9557-83fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7a7b4178-0ffd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

Let’s flood this movement with voices that refuse to be ignored.
Onward,
xx Jane

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Stand with the U.S. African Development Foundation — Defend Global Progress and Accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear friend, this is Gay Valimont.
This week, a dangerous confrontation unfolded at the U.S. African Development Foundation (USADF), an agency that has worked for over 45 years to support communities in Africa through critical development aid. Staff from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), acting under orders from the Trump administration, attempted to forcibly take control of the agency, in direct defiance of both legal protections and the will of Congress. We only have 22 days to stop this, together.
USADF has provided over $100 million in grants to African farmers, entrepreneurs, and community organizations. This is not just foreign aid—it is a lifeline for communities working to build better futures. Yet, under Trump's executive orders, this vital agency has now become a target for dismantling.
The standoff at the foundation is only the latest move in the Trump administration’s broader effort to gut essential government programs. The Department of Government Efficiency is attempting to reduce USADF to a shell of its former self, cutting off support to critical projects that help those most in need.
We cannot allow this to happen.
As a candidate for Florida's 1st Congressional District, I am committed to protecting not only our domestic priorities but also the programs that extend our nation’s promise of progress and opportunity to the world. The work of USADF is invaluable, and it must be preserved.
But to protect agencies like USADF, we need yo ur help. Join me in standing up against this dangerous overreach. Your support will ensure that we can continue to fight for programs that make a real difference in the lives of millions—both here and abroad.
Click here to donate today and help me defend the values that have made our country a beacon of hope around the world. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

clean_body: [] Dear friend, this is Gay Valimont. This week, a dangerous confrontation unfolded at the U.S. African Development Foundation (USADF), an agency that has worked for over 45 years to support communities in Africa through critical development aid. Staff from the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), acting under orders from the Trump administration, attempted to forcibly take control of the agency, in direct defiance of both legal protections and the will of Congress. We only have 22 days to stop this, together. USADF has provided over $100 million in grants to African farmers, entrepreneurs, and community organizations. This is not just foreign aid—it is a lifeline for communities working to build better futures. Yet, under Trump's executive orders, this vital agency has now become a target for dismantling. The standoff at the foundation is only the latest move in the Trump administration’s broader effort to gut essential government programs. The Department of Government Efficiency is attempting to reduce USADF to a shell of its former self, cutting off support to critical projects that help those most in need. We cannot allow this to happen. As a candidate for Florida's 1st Congressional District, I am committed to protecting not only our domestic priorities but also the programs that extend our nation’s promise of progress and opportunity to the world. The work of USADF is invaluable, and it must be preserved. But to protect agencies like USADF, we need yo ur help. Join me in standing up against this dangerous overreach. Your support will ensure that we can continue to fight for programs that make a real difference in the lives of millions—both here and abroad. Click here to donate today and help me defend the values that have made our country a beacon of hope around the world. name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: ⚠️ Dangerous Ohio Legislation You Don't Know About!
body:
Learn about recent dangerous legislation in Ohio. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8f6c1d137e&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e926c5cbf9&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION! WE NEED YOU!
THERE'S A DANGEROUS VOTER ID PLAY
BEING LED BY HOUSE REPUBLICANS!
STOP HB78! • STOP HB78!**

---
| There is a new bill in the Ohio House of Representatives that's been discovered by grassroots conservative activists that could be **incredibly dangerous to our elections** in Ohio.
There are 3 Ohio Republican legislators who are pushing a bill to have us give the state more biometric information by which to track & control us. It's a bill to allow for digital driver's licenses and digital state IDs. And **the legislation could allow these digital IDs to be used to vote**. It's baked into the bill, and the proposed amendment we've seen does nothing to fix this problem.
We are educating and activating Ohio's electorate to oppose HB78 in advance of Tuesday's (3/11/2025) proponent testimony (**[10 AM LIVE on The Ohio Channel](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c1ffeebb04&e=5c740fa3e2)**). **Please SHARE this email with everyone you know!**
If you watch the video shown below, you'll know everything you need to know to communicate with your elected representatives and committee members who will possibly vote on the bill THIS WEEK!
Starting Monday morning, we need to launch a statewide effort to call and write the legislators listed below to oppose HB78 and its amendment (AM_136_0123). **With the proposed DEMOCRAT "Ohio Voter Bill of Rights" constitutional amendment on the horizon—threatening to eliminate Ohio’s hard-won election safeguards—this is a top priority.**
All committee members and constituents who care about protecting election integrity safeguards (like Voter ID) and preventing a centralized digital control system must speak out.
**Governor DeWine announced in July 2024 that Ohio driver’s licenses and IDs can now be added to Apple Wallets. He and other Republican and Democrat legislators are pushing for digital ID, bringing Ohio one step closer to online voting.**

**CALL TO ACTION:**

Contact these GOP HB78 Sponsors & tell them: "**STOP WORKING ON HB78, THE DANGEROUS DIGITAL ID BILL"**

**Rep Thomas Hall** , [Thomas.hall@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:) & [Rep46@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-5094
**Rep Gary Click** , [Rep88@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-1374
**Rep Josh Williams** , [Rep44@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-1418

Contact these GOP Ohio House Technology & Innovation Committee Members & tell them: "**VOTE NO ON HB78, THE DANGEROUS DIGITAL ID BILL"**

**Chairman Thad Claggett** , [Rep68@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-1482
**Vice Chair Heidi Workman** , [Rep72@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-2004
**Rep Steve Demetriou** , [Rep35@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-5088
**Rep Ron Ferguson** , [Rep96@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-3735
**Rep Adam Holmes** , [Rep97@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-6014
**Rep Adam Mathews** , [Rep56@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-6027
**Rep Ty D. Mathews** , [Rep83@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-3819
**Rep Riordan McClain** , [Rep87@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 644-6265
**Rep Melanie Miller** , [Rep67@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:), (614) 466-0961

**HB78 DIGITAL ID SUMMARY HIGHLIGHTS:**
###
**Key Issues with HB78 and Digital ID Implementation**
* **Undermines Ohio’s Voter ID Law** – Weakens physical photo ID verification for in-person voting.
* **Unreliable Identity Verification** – Voting systems (e.g., e-pollbooks) cannot authenticate or verify mobile driver’s license data.
* **Lack of Government Oversight & Transparency** – No public access to records due to private third-party contracts.
* **No Security or Privacy Standards** – No mandated consumer protection for biometric data storage and use by private vendors.
* **No Oversight of Private Vendors** – Third-party vendors (e.g., BMV & AAMVA) operate without public accountability.
* **No Vendor Liability** – No disclosure requirements for data breaches, compromises, or theft of personal information.
* **Risk of Data Interception** – No guarantees that biometric data transmission won’t be intercepted by compromised telecom or internet systems.
* **Use of Out-of-State Digital IDs** – Allows verification via other states’ digital IDs without defining security standards.

### **Additional Concerns**
* **Potential for Government Overreach** – A private vendor-controlled digital ID system could lead to surveillance, social credit scoring, and restricted access to essential services (e.g., financial, medical, travel).
* **Pathway to a New Constitutional Amendment** – Enables the **Ohio Voter Bill of Rights** , which would make physical voter ID checks optional, replacing them with unverifiable digital ID—potentially enabling online voting.
* **No Cost Analysis** – The bill lacks a fiscal review, despite likely requiring **tens of millions of dollars** in IT system upgrades and security enhancements.
* **Opposes Radical Government Transparency** – HB78 contradicts efforts to restore oversight and accountability in government activities.
* **Contradicts Trump’s Voter ID Goals** – Goes against President Trump’s push for universal **physical voter ID verification** across all 50 states.

**EPISODE: "Ohio Republicans are Pushing Surveillance-State Legislation"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=276662a1aa&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| | ** **
**DON'T FORGET!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!**

---
| Are you aware there's an Ohio bond issue on the primary ballot in May? If not, you're not alone!
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

clean_body: SHUT DOWN the Democrats’ new impeachment hoax. | Peter, They truly never learn... “Donald Trump Impeachment Articles Filed. Here's What Happens Next” [Source: Newsweek] Voters like YOU made your voices heard loud and clear last fall when you sent President Trump back to the White House with Republican majorities in Congress. But the Democrats couldn’t care less about the will of the PEOPLE. In fact, the Radical Democrat who filed these articles even claimed that impeachment doesn’t require a crime at all. He simply said, “the word misdemeanor means misdeeds.” In other words, the Democrats believe they can IMPEACH the duly elected President of the United States so long as they don’t like him. That’s how little the Left respects our Republic. Peter, make no mistake, there’s only ONE thing that should “happen next:” These sham articles of impeachment should be thrown to the ash heap! Which is why I’m reaching out to every grassroots patriot I can to ask that you sign your name to demand the Democrats' latest sham impeachment hoax be SHUT DOWN IMMEDIATELY. Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=defc2cf607f441ebb1884a5e84bcb938&_e=yb4sYaedDJPx8tuD_b18dacIGtVdlYUqZzVzBotzg0vuFf2O3yLdqmaeCtutaVkX1z5LklyXtxk5tkpD310-L9rPVptQVFUmbY9TpfwVWQt0eVn0MgIdTU9Nj_jvYAZqjAB2bcfcA_Pgh_znCcrPUNNUknqtHY1vI69OnTx8oRc0LDWpn2_oBMeg9XNvJMpFoOyOGQ7HdYf35CHciO8Nv0T5w1BOicqfO_ztsjiwpmJCEpkaX8Z0fmTxDjqh2bspRSkxXOkRRJNZCxVsoG4OfN0m23hGrbsk1dSwrPmsEjqHkXOglapODDohGk527-23k2k290G0kVV5qxvxhV57CtLzUAm_0Fs0kNEucM2gNFlDmLIJ0T-qzh3wkbFiRH7i5WVobyhq65n6FW-J3fO9Nw%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=defc2cf607f441ebb1884a5e84bcb938&_e=yb4sYaedDJPx8tuD_b18dacIGtVdlYUqZzVzBotzg0vuFf2O3yLdqmaeCtutaVkX1z5LklyXtxk5tkpD310-L9rPVptQVFUmbY9TpfwVWQt0eVn0MgIdTU9Nj_jvYAZqjAB2bcfcA_Pgh_znCcrPUNNUknqtHY1vI69OnTx8oRc0LDWpn2_oBMeg9XNvJMpFoOyOGQ7HdYf35CHciO8Nv0T5w1BOicqfO_ztsjiwpmI5soQCG3TYOcd2kbEX5pOKsU4rAQX0p_SBw2z5tPcAxxeAct1blVnezEJnH6joCvUnfYmn7htdphfefJfEOizEal8R9oj7rskjqTU5VzuiaP1xWwHCoaMypcTmaFUlFbh79Dt67Wef2Tb_eHE8nsOS4MWrot2aJTYXz0_Wro6bKA%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=defc2cf607f441ebb1884a5e84bcb938&_e=yb4sYaedDJPx8tuD_b18dacIGtVdlYUqZzVzBotzg0vuFf2O3yLdqmaeCtutaVkX1z5LklyXtxk5tkpD310-L9rPVptQVFUmbY9TpfwVWQt0eVn0MgIdTU9Nj_jvYAZqjAB2bcfcA_Pgh_znCcrPUNNUknqtHY1vI69OnTx8oRc0LDWpn2_oBMeg9XNvJMpFoOyOGQ7HdYf35CHciO8Nv0T5w1BOicqfO_ztsjiwpmIm5fCnWN29OlrsMxyYYc1u98JR9iC7c0BXyjJXJIN1LrWPAq83JjjFF4GkdCndLT7X05HgrwCwvpMRGzyqggpJQePPdQENZcSe_IHxggGA0EtfkZQovc_X2BtBisNyMJSMO2Km2XZH7e2-poAXlg7mo_DA6BZ9_GWRKOfmpfaToA%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=defc2cf607f441ebb1884a5e84bcb938&_e=yb4sYaedDJPx8tuD_b18dacIGtVdlYUqZzVzBotzg0vuFf2O3yLdqmaeCtutaVkX1z5LklyXtxk5tkpD310-L9rPVptQVFUmbY9TpfwVWQt0eVn0MgIdTU9Nj_jvYAZqjAB2bcfcA_Pgh_znCcrPUNNUknqtHY1vI69OnTx8oRc0LDWpn2_oBMeg9XNvJMpFoOyOGQ7HdYf35CHciO8Nv0T5w1BOicqfO_ztsjiwpmK75808TYP_2ch9FOoWa2_N5apHg5pe8VUQnPr3yPwWHm1w-clWNa-LXIsAO5MfDhQdL6jfsQu4dxOfknrOM_tAacA71VaAC-AoDmyhIPltx3hhzAXofgw247BBHVP1iCjDIuwrPYVTSVu-w8QRRT5kzveEkPJF6_lv_SdJ9F-kBA%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=defc2cf607f441ebb1884a5e84bcb938&_e=yb4sYaedDJPx8tuD_b18dacIGtVdlYUqZzVzBotzg0vuFf2O3yLdqmaeCtutaVkX1z5LklyXtxk5tkpD310-L9rPVptQVFUmbY9TpfwVWQt0eVn0MgIdTU9Nj_jvYAZqjAB2bcfcA_Pgh_znCcrPUNNUknqtHY1vI69OnTx8oRc0LDWpn2_oBMeg9XNvJMpFoOyOGQ7HdYf35CHciO8Nv0T5w1BOicqfO_ztsjiwpmJef-42_9CnpwZtvvRrhhxAQpemiPzIrls0Sf2I76rihuH2RJQD9OHFpPL1_SmACVzIBWNYYZV_tyo75BtMQhJABQ7EA_z9eNAxyqhN6mPwk7vtQKfbA-_ZYsRxO4BHdUzcINcPWSlqWNVkQLg-A3Cu-LkxcoGNLXslKFXI85En0Q%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you.
