_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Guzman for Virginia
subject: Flip a red seat blue - 51-49 majority at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | **Virginia’s House of Delegates elections this year are an early chance to deliver Donald Trump and Elon Musk a big defeat - and I’m knocking doors to get on the ballot right now.
**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6IYRCPCEIno9_cUeUCdTaVnl0T20hy5KVJr9Wl3-ZXFdz5HA6YbIzC7dfb5_MHRpoB9cJvtNu-ajSEK0V9xikHeRxrefY7r10mfjqEMlSUqZWmTEl1BH4z4Ia_8VtglL6auUzuZyXkQ9CThohbI6e6TJqzrB17RspmWYbNbmHtx61h716soTygMQYa4Mcn1W8mxa1dtFmRq3xNIhYi1usqzSbkKYIBXildpzSyJpR7MqdEsB_Otuy_rQs3wNGlYHCA/4en/Sho3pHEQRQ-cI_d_BsIS8Q/h0/h001.q8fVg5v711fnuFm8pfpDjPs-x2qVxMgqFjRAc0GtSgs)
**[Help expand a 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates by flipping a red seat that Donald Trump lost. Donate to my campaign today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviHu21jm6riLAujn4LCnyBgk0dmSd3zCP_Tg92cfLm9gtg9MvapFpQ3w9eNU2nAV7YZ6p1M85I4fdVMgAUBz2nSJWlSdTaH_xdj69bcox91AMONEWFFEtD71DDjlWk55AUnIlCQbBFDHDLa2NEGNkF7IPrQ43HeJJHmwfyeRVwqnD1c6M9FkPCBaQPPcP-V45ZBAmkPBWxf_kj14uQJHAZci5Ch2qN6vrDoO8LnHY8Ij2sd8wtJMJ_wI59ebp1TUbJw/4en/Sho3pHEQRQ-cI_d_BsIS8Q/h1/h001.d8OXlNz4UxN7RYUPrvB9Qn6FSuaKXoulSb5vSsJqzCw)**
* * *
As I knock doors in Northern Virginia to gather the petition signatures I need to get on the ballot, I’m hearing a lot of voters worried about Trump.
Federal workers are losing their jobs or afraid of being next to face Elon Musk’s illegal firings.
Veterans are worried about cuts to the VA, seniors worried about Social Security, and families on Medicaid worried about their health.
And what are Virginia Republicans saying? They’re praising Trump and Musk as they wreck our economy.
**We need Democrats in state legislatures who will resist Trump and Musk, and fight back for our communities.**
**I’m Elizabeth Guzman - a mom, social worker, union leader, and immigrant - in other words, Donald and Elon’s _worst nightmare._**
If Republicans take control of the Virginia General Assembly this November, they’ll rubber-stamp Trump’s agenda - and I need your help to stop them.
**[Fight back in our state legislatures and deliver Donald and Elon a big defeat. Our average online donation so far is $38 - pitch in to my red-to-blue campaign today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnpAFVM3YRZpOAAZ0mOj7ctpsja31SbbNij8f1-0XrLz5agvg_6Xf7SOSB71J_zdux4O1WUDNsHpivsR8RF4SSFO6A56O0N92XDZoUq0S7AqZSqwLv75yo7PgPL4OFL2A9CMayCZ7x1wwTd5fJFM65xID0n0E7jNccsfuc-oTLCtfxGl8VVvALeYp5XEbeRxTjJBsUZHlkIUdikbYx_Iu8apDdbwSJQNZNeQt6DppE1JwrZoCIzfh33RQjo7RMVhAeg/4en/Sho3pHEQRQ-cI_d_BsIS8Q/h2/h001.PuhThga88SxiAEPSoAiT6N2xEwNFk_VDE_x0dwXzhHM)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Virginia’s House of Delegates elections this year are an early chance to deliver Donald Trump and Elon Musk a big defeat - and I’m knocking doors to get on the ballot right now. As I knock doors in Northern Virginia to gather the petition signatures I need to get on the ballot, I’m hearing a lot of voters worried about Trump. Federal workers are losing their jobs or afraid of being next to face Elon Musk’s illegal firings. Veterans are worried about cuts to the VA, seniors worried about Social Security, and families on Medicaid worried about their health. And what are Virginia Republicans saying? They’re praising Trump and Musk as they wreck our economy. We need Democrats in state legislatures who will resist Trump and Musk, and fight back for our communities. I’m Elizabeth Guzman - a mom, social worker, union leader, and immigrant - in other words, Donald and Elon’s worst nightmare. If Republicans take control of the Virginia General Assembly this November, they’ll rubber-stamp Trump’s agenda - and I need your help to stop them. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Huge thank you to helping me raise 30% of the entire film budget in less than a week. Help push us further, there is a business sponsorship opportunity now too.**

#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Spending the money I did on this camera setup was to capture Alaska politics like never before.****Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised 30% what we expected for the entire film to cost.****A huge Thank You,****Phil Izon**

#### **ANNOUNCEMENT : RC Maxwell Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert**
**We’re excited to announce that RC Maxwell, a fearless journalist and advocate against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV), will be featured in Frozen Odds, a groundbreaking documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight to repeal RCV.****RC Maxwell has an incredible story to tell. Years ago, he exposed Sen. Lisa Murkowski’s ties to RCV, helping reveal the system’s deeper implications. His investigative work with Project Veritas, with James O’Keefe, played a key role in spreading awareness about the dangers of RCV. He has since continued his work with at Newsmax, even interviewing me last year as we battled RCV in Alaska.****Personally, RC Maxwell was pivotal in my journey to challenge RCV. His early reporting helped shape my understanding of the issue, ultimately leading me to write the repeal and lead the grassroots movement against RCV in Alaska. Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of meeting him at CPAC and in Arizona, where I was educating others on the dangers of RCV.****We are honored to have RC Maxwell join us in filming Frozen Odds this summer. His firsthand experience and relentless commitment to election integrity will bring critical insights to this documentary.****Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to uncover the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections!**
---
#### **ANNOUNCEMENT: Captain Seth Keshel and Dr. Chris Mattmann Join Frozen Odds Movie as Featured Experts**
**We’re honored to announce that Seth Keshel, MBA, will be featured in Frozen Odds, the powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).****Seth Keshel is a former Army Captain of Military Intelligence and Afghanistan veteran. His analytical method of election forecasting and analytics is known worldwide, and he has been commended by President Donald J. Trump for his work in the field. He most recently made headlines by correctly forecasting a 312-226 Trump victory in the Electoral College, with accurate picks in all 56 races for electoral votes.****Captain Keshel proposes 10 Points to True Election Integrity and has identified Ranked Choice Voting as one of the eight cardinal sins of election administration. He toured Alaska in the spring of 2022 while fighting the information battle associated with promoting election integrity.****In Frozen Odds, Captain Keshel will bring his expert analysis and firsthand experience to expose the flaws of RCV and its impact on election integrity.****Dr. Chris Mattmann Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert****We’re thrilled to announce that Dr. Chris Mattmann, a leading AI and data expert, will be featured in Frozen Odds, a powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).****Dr. Mattmann’s career is nothing short of extraordinary. He is the Chief Data and AI Officer at UCLA, former Chief Technology and Innovation Officer at NASA JPL, and President of Mattmann.ai. An accomplished author and industry leader, he has played key roles in advancing AI, big data, and technology across multiple fields.****With firsthand experience in RCV from his time at the Apache Software Foundation, Dr. Mattmann will break down its flaws in Frozen Odds, sharing his expert insights and concerns based on real-world applications.****Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to reveal the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections.**
---
---
|
---
**Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**
---
|

clean_body: Please send to your friends and family | | | | | ---|--- | Many have asked and now you can now contribute $100 to help make the film a reality. The movie angels have got us started and that level is not available anymore. Huge thank you to helping me raise 30% of the entire film budget in less than a week. Help push us further, there is a business sponsorship opportunity now too. Frozen Odds - Spending the money I did on this camera setup was to capture Alaska politics like never before.Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised 30% what we expected for the entire film to cost.A huge Thank You,Phil Izon | ANNOUNCEMENT : RC Maxwell Joins Frozen Odds as Featured Expert We’re excited to announce that RC Maxwell, a fearless journalist and advocate against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV), will be featured in Frozen Odds, a groundbreaking documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight to repeal RCV.RC Maxwell has an incredible story to tell. Years ago, he exposed Sen. Lisa Murkowski’s ties to RCV, helping reveal the system’s deeper implications. His investigative work with Project Veritas, with James O’Keefe, played a key role in spreading awareness about the dangers of RCV. He has since continued his work with at Newsmax, even interviewing me last year as we battled RCV in Alaska.Personally, RC Maxwell was pivotal in my journey to challenge RCV. His early reporting helped shape my understanding of the issue, ultimately leading me to write the repeal and lead the grassroots movement against RCV in Alaska. Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of meeting him at CPAC and in Arizona, where I was educating others on the dangers of RCV.We are honored to have RC Maxwell join us in filming Frozen Odds this summer. His firsthand experience and relentless commitment to election integrity will bring critical insights to this documentary.Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to uncover the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections! ANNOUNCEMENT: Captain Seth Keshel and Dr. Chris Mattmann Join Frozen Odds Movie as Featured Experts We’re honored to announce that Seth Keshel, MBA, will be featured in Frozen Odds, the powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).Seth Keshel is a former Army Captain of Military Intelligence and Afghanistan veteran. His analytical method of election forecasting and analytics is known worldwide, and he has been commended by President Donald J. Trump for his work in the field. He most recently made headlines by correctly forecasting a 312-226 Trump victory in the Electoral College, with accurate picks in all 56 races for electoral votes.Captain Keshel proposes 10 Points to True Election Integrity and has identified Ranked Choice Voting as one of the eight cardinal sins of election administration. He toured Alaska in the spring of 2022 while fighting the information battle associated with promoting election integrity.In Frozen Odds, Captain Keshel will bring his expert analysis and firsthand experience to expose the flaws of RCV and its impact on election integrity.Dr. Chris Mattmann Joins Frozen Odds as Featured ExpertWe’re thrilled to announce that Dr. Chris Mattmann, a leading AI and data expert, will be featured in Frozen Odds, a powerful documentary on Alaska’s citizen-led fight against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV).Dr. Mattmann’s career is nothing short of extraordinary. He is the Chief Data and AI Officer at UCLA, former Chief Technology and Innovation Officer at NASA JPL, and President of Mattmann.ai. An accomplished author and industry leader, he has played key roles in advancing AI, big data, and technology across multiple fields.With firsthand experience in RCV from his time at the Apache Software Foundation, Dr. Mattmann will break down its flaws in Frozen Odds, sharing his expert insights and concerns based on real-world applications.Stay tuned—Frozen Odds is coming soon to reveal the truth behind Alaska’s fight for fair elections. | Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down? | I have three petitions coming soon.My competition spends millions to do a project that costs me 0.1% what they spend. Of course I’m going to continue.1\. Voter ID / US Citizenship requirements / Election Integrity2\. Ban foreign funding of ballot initiatives3\. Remove voting machines for State and Federal elections in Alaska | | | | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113 Eagle River 99577 United States

🔵 Friend, please read this email from start to finish... 🔵
Right now, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are waging an all out war on our democracy and the institutions keeping it strong.

We saw sweeping pardons for Jan. 6 insurrectionists. We watched his administration try to subvert the 14th Amendment by putting an end to birthright citizenship.
And this is just the very start.

We need to be prepared for the inevitable onslaught of challenges in the courtroom, but we can’t do this alone. We need grassroots supporters in this fight.
If everyone reading this email chipped in $3 right now, it would fully power our critical legal fund in an instant.

That’s why we’re urgently asking:
Will you send in $3 to the DASS Legal Fund today? Your support will help us defend democracy in the courtroom and attacks on our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dass-legal-q1-2025?refcode=em-3.9.24-all-rs]

name: EMILYs List Press
subject: NEW: Republicans are running scared from their own town halls
body:
EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler released the following statement: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103547624/532513880/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE316_20250309_GOPCowardsRS_ALL_RA&sourceid=1055787&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIwOTlhZi0xOGZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4G1Rf8tfLjh0vPdOU090zyegJBvvmmewRN4lxAFWFU8=) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **EMILYs List Statement on Republican Lawmakers Running Scared from Their Own Town Halls** WASHINGTON, D.C. — Today, the National Republican Campaign Committee — the U.S. House GOP's campaign arm — instructed Republican lawmakers to **stop holding in-person town halls** in response to constituents expressing their anger over mass federal layoffs and Republican efforts to raise prices and rip away health care from millions of Americans. EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler released the following statement: **"House Republicans are total cowards. **If we flip the House,_Trump can’t pass his far-right agenda._**

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19170%2E878179%2EpLqkrI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19170%2E878179%2EpLqkrI).**

name: Melton for Iowa
subject: Melton for Iowa 2024: A Quick Survey Ask to Help me Learn and Decide on '26
body:
| | |

---
|
# Melton for Iowa 2024
---
---
| Hello Peter,
Hello all,
Now that we're into March, and considering folks are encouraging me to run for the 4th or other offices on a weekly basis, I thought it'd be good to provide an update on my '26 plans, and to then ask for your input via a quick anonymous survey per below. I'm still in recovery mode but am progressing towards normal. Running a campaign for Congress while working a full time job and raising a family is exhausting, especially in a district that is one of the biggest geographically and most conservative in the country.
Reflecting on things, I'm really proud of what we accomplished together in '24: -improved our total % vote share by roughly 3% from 2022 to 2024, -improved in our total % vote share in 34 of 36 counties from '22 to '24 while holding steady in the other 2, -forced numerous conversations in our district that my opponent Randy Feenstra doesn't talk about that are now becoming increasingly bipartisan state-level conversations, among things like cancer, water quality, and the CO2 pipelines, -earned an unprecedented endorsement of my general election opponent's primary Republican challenger that sent the Iowa GOP into a week of panic tweeting and made national news, that led in part to earning the votes of tens of thousands of non-Democrats, -helped to drive a 7-candidate increase in the number of Democrats in our congressional district that ran for state house from '22 to '24, -helped develop an energy on the ground in the 4th that has continued to sustain itself with increased Democratic activism that continues through today despite how conservative our district is, -hit Cook Ratings expectations in a district they rated 5 points more conservative post-2020 redistricting than the 2020 election while earning roughly the same % of vote in the district of our presidential candidate that raised a heck of a lot more money than we did, while not taking a penny of corporate PAC money.
Thank you to those who have reached out and encouraged me to run again. I'm grateful for the confidence you have in my volunteers, family, and I.
My two main goals here are to not overstay my welcome, and to be of service in the biggest way possible. To do that, just like after my first campaign, I'm sending you an anonymous survey, asking you for your honest assessment of how you think we did in '24 and whether you'd like to see me run again in '26. After we get those results in, I'll mull it over with my family and will let you all know. Regardless of what I do in '26, I pledge to remain engaged, and just like when I was asked in '24 by some to leave the district to run in a less conservative race, I'm not going to do that in '26. I'm dedicated to the 4th, and fighting the good fight with my friends here despite the odds, so if I run for Congress again, it would be in the 4th CD.
Here's the anonymous survey link: https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/C6VHGL5

Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton

---
| |
---
| |
---
|

name: Winsome Sears [R-VA]
subject: You won’t believe what this MSNBC liberal said, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I used to be a Democrat. I believed that the Democrats were the party that would put average people like me first. Guess what? I was wrong!
Friend - Yes, I’m a proud black conservative, and it drives liberals crazy!
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=681524d6f1b8444e88875d9725d88c1f&_e=HFXMB4XZsXAjoZk489Fu5X9a64ddm1IUULhhMcsbG3qWPN6z1OGCK2zAzz736t3jHTMFODRMTR0xN4TS_IqFvporikBVX-ukZEDSGhb69HGHaoKJXqBwrvWPPMYXraesOViWtFIabt277R0UgSBuSHobIwBE39nUtFCmt8k_juqI8HQ2OBn9ZvN9tPaV7YvjAIR42bSViQRGvjsG_NX4IFZyTBnU9245VzAU3XHj61upot5zB5ZY4KLkJeEQyuA904K7rjLrPVH3mIH4ZZk7r8C5JKzdrcLH5q31ztBy-mexDDzicUK9ZWuxKpa5KqLy9q7vlIdaVs4I_fMSUrz6ULfL2NQeyXZklUY9tKkhBqBPrNOUeF_UHhyNCbxwdr-EnHw9CslOaQGgpjIw0eSdhgN09yQGEidkAVjNAMZecK0%3D)

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=681524d6f1b8444e88875d9725d88c1f&_e=HFXMB4XZsXAjoZk489Fu5X9a64ddm1IUULhhMcsbG3qWPN6z1OGCK2zAzz736t3jHTMFODRMTR0xN4TS_IqFvporikBVX-ukZEDSGhb69HGHaoKJXqBwrvWPPMYXraesOViWtFIabt277R0UgSBuSHobIwBE39nUtFCmt8k_juqI8HQ2OBn9ZvN9tPaV7YvjAIR42bSViQRGvjsG_NX4IFZyTBnU9245VzAU3XHj61upot5zB5ZY4KLkJeEQyuA904K7rjLrPVH3mIH4ZZk7rxILix7G6VmGbxLT3Ug8B5y5j8APteNifJG7FWU6LjdvuHt624R5Ota_dfCLMXWJSqmcsX8gTV6lw0hbou4If7A7t49hFKHUVaNylgGw3k_bputt-Z81zKp-s2FTss_iQkrh_vx8yo6zDKbA96YARUQ%3D)
---

Friend, I'm tough. I'm battle-tested. I am ready to take on the liberal media head-on and call them out for their hypocrisy.

My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. _Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned?__

Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.

When I became the first woman Lt. Governor of Virginia - of either party - the liberal media just couldn't handle that I was a conservative Republican.

Trust me, I have been called lots of names over the years. But these attacks from the liberal media only embolden me to keep fighting to spread our conservative message. _

---

subject: House Republicans want to make it easier to sell off public lands

body:
Republicans see our public lands as a commodity. I see them as our birthright. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103548355/532515941/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDMyMmJlYi0xYWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xn4mBNRBx6GFYih_7pvWNLTJLfcjqh4r4UhE5mKCw8=&emci=cc322beb-1afd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cd322beb-1afd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)
---
Hey team, Republicans are launching a direct attack against our public lands, all to deliver handouts to their billionaire donors. Let me connect the dots: You might be aware of the court case Utah brought that aims to take __18 million acres__ of your public lands and have them transferred to the state, to then sell them off to be privatized. Then, in January, House Republicans changed the rules to make it easier to sell off public lands. Now, Trump and Elon Musk have laid off thousands and thousands of Forest Service employees, Park Service rangers, National Fish and Wildlife habitat specialists — you name it, all to make it harder to manage our federal public lands. Let me tell you what their next play is. They want to claim that federal public lands are being mismanaged — _forget the fact that they just canned all the people who steward these lands_ — so millions of acres can be transferred to the states and sold off to the wealthiest bidder. **You can help us halt the heist.** [**By chipping in any amount today, you’re not just helping my campaign in the work to protect public lands. You’re helping us support rising Democratic leaders who respect our public lands and understand the need to protect them. So what do you say? clean_body: Republicans see our public lands as a commodity. I see them as our birthright. Hey team, Republicans are launching a direct attack against our public lands, all to deliver handouts to their billionaire donors. Let me connect the dots: You might be aware of the court case Utah brought that aims to take 18 million acres of your public lands and have them transferred to the state, to then sell them off to be privatized. Then, in January, House Republicans changed the rules to make it easier to sell off public lands. Now, Trump and Elon Musk have laid off thousands and thousands of Forest Service employees, Park Service rangers, National Fish and Wildlife habitat specialists — you name it, all to make it harder to manage our federal public lands. Let me tell you what their next play is. They want to claim that federal public lands are being mismanaged — forget the fact that they just canned all the people who steward these lands — so millions of acres can be transferred to the states and sold off to the wealthiest bidder. The best response will hopefully be shared directly with President Trump!

I'll go first, Friend, and then I'd love to hear from you:

For decades, America's ruling class wrote the checks and communities like mine paid the price.

We were ignored by the corrupt elites. Mocked by the ruling class. Scorned by the very government meant to fight for us.

That all began to change in 2015, when a guy named Donald J. Trump descended that golden escalator, offering a vision for the future that is so simple and yet so powerful.
_**We 're done importing foreign labor, we're fighting for Americans.

We're done catering to Wall Street, we're supporting the working man.

We're done buying energy from people who hate us, we're getting it right here in the USA.**_
But it wasn't until 2024 -- when President Trump reclaimed the White House -- that we got America back on course toward a new era of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity.

Because this movement has always been so much bigger than you, me, or even President Trump.

It's always been about the auto worker in Michigan whose job went overseas, the factory worker in Wisconsin supporting a family on one income, and the energy worker in Pennsylvania whose livelihood Joe Biden and the radical left attacked.

That's who President Trump fights for, that's who I'm fighting for, and that's who will reap the benefits when we unleash America's unlimited potential.

clean_body: I promise it’s an easy one, but please take your time. | | I hope this isn't too personal, but since we trust each other, I'm going to ask it anyway. Why do you support President Trump and our America First movement? The best response will hopefully be shared directly with President Trump! I'll go first, Friend, and then I'd love to hear from you: For decades, America's ruling class wrote the checks and communities like mine paid the price. We were ignored by the corrupt elites. Mocked by the ruling class. Scorned by the very government meant to fight for us. That all began to change in 2015, when a guy named Donald J. Trump descended that golden escalator, offering a vision for the future that is so simple and yet so powerful. We 're done importing foreign labor, we're fighting for Americans. We're done catering to Wall Street, we're supporting the working man. We're done buying energy from people who hate us, we're getting it right here in the USA. But it wasn't until 2024 -- when President Trump reclaimed the White House -- that we got America back on course toward a new era of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity. Because this movement has always been so much bigger than you, me, or even President Trump. It's always been about the auto worker in Michigan whose job went overseas, the factory worker in Wisconsin supporting a family on one income, and the energy worker in Pennsylvania whose livelihood Joe Biden and the radical left attacked. That's who President Trump fights for, that's who I'm fighting for, and that's who will reap the benefits when we unleash America's unlimited potential. Thank you for reading this message all the way through, Friend. Every day, more and more federal workers in Virginia are being fired from their jobs at the whims of Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Meanwhile, Republican Governor Youngkin and Republican Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears remain fully aligned with Trump, choosing to stand by these cruel and harmful policies that hurt Virginia families.

Hi there, it's Senator Lisa Blunt Rochester. Last week marked the end of Black History Month, and this year it was even more special to me.**I'm just one of 5 Black women to ever serve in the U.S. Senate.** I closed out Black History Month by appearing on PBS with my sister Senator, Angela Alsobrooks. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103549208/532518013/-1359317236?amount=other&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.09_PBS_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjg3NDc1Zi0yMGZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8IY0ITjxtbg7hV34_u26TaRxKaFbyyxcT0F-f6CMU6U=) I said this the other night, and I'll say it right now: **My eyes are on the prize.** That's making sure people have good jobs. That they have clean drinking water and healthcare. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: PUBLIC HEALTH UPDATE: WHAT TO KNOW ABOUT MEASLES
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169646.172376.246&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169646.172376.246&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169646.172376.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13807)
# **PUBLIC HEALTH UPDATE:**
# **WHAT TO KNOW ABOUT MEASLES**
_One case of measles has been reported in Montgomery County. As of now, there is NOT an outbreak in Pennsylvania, but public health officials are monitoring the situation and stand ready to respond._ The [Pennsylvania Department of Health](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169646.172376.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13808) has confirmed that one case of the measles has been identified in Montgomery County. The case is related to international travel and not a domestic outbreak. **While there is no immediate risk to the general public,** we want to make sure everyone understands what the disease is and how to stay healthy. Public health officials are [monitoring the situation closely](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169646.172376.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13809) and have processes in place if more cases are confirmed in Pennsylvania. Individuals can also play a part to keep communities healthy and safe.
* * *
_**According to the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP)**_ **What is measles?** Measles is a highly contagious, viral respiratory illness. Measles can cause:
* Cold-like symptoms, such as runny nose/congestion, cough or fever
* Red, watery eyes, also known as pink eye (conjunctivitis)
* Small white spots, known as Koplik's spots, inside the mouth that develop about two to four days before rash onset but quickly disappear after rash appears
* A distinct blotchy, red rash that appears two to four days after the first symptoms (though this can vary) and starts on the face and neck and spreads downward

Some people with measles may experience complications, such as pneumonia, swelling of the brain, seizures and -- in extreme cases -- death. **What can I do to protect myself and my family from the measles?**
* Make sure all children and adults in your household are up to date on their recommended vaccinations. Vaccine save lives.
* Take precautions with children who are under 12 months and cannot be vaccinated, have weak immune systems, or who cannot get the vaccine for medical reasons. Consider keeping these individuals away from anyone with a fever, cough, or other respiratory symptoms.
* Wash your hands regularly

**Is the measles vaccine safe?** According to CHOP: Yes! The vaccine is safe and effective. Once a common childhood illness that affected mostly preschool- and school-aged children, measles has been relatively nonexistent in the U.S. in recent years. This is the result of widespread vaccination. Measles vaccination is highly effective in preventing infection. Unfortunately, we are seeing rising cases of measles in the last few years because of decreases in vaccination rates. **Can my child get vaccinated before they 're 12 months old?** According to CHOP: A mother who has been immunized with the measles, mumps and rubella (MMR) vaccine or previously had measles passes on antibodies to her unborn baby. These antibodies provide protection for up to six months, and possibly longer. Babies are not routinely recommended to get the vaccine before 1 year of age because the antibodies they're getting from their mom might interfere with how well the vaccine works before that time. _This recommendation has not changed.Your providers will continue to monitor guidance for vaccination recommendations. If an official outbreak comes to Pennsylvania, providers may recommend that children younger than 12 months get the vaccination._ Keep in mind, the MMR vaccine is still recommended for children 6 months and older at least two weeks prior to any international travel. **What should I do if I think me, or my child has the measles?** If you suspect you or anyone in your family has the measles, contact your healthcare provider before you go to a doctor's office or hospital. They will give advice on precautions to take before entering any facility to avoid potentially exposing others. For more information, refer to the [Pennsylvania Department of Health](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169646.172376.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13808) or [Children's Hospital of Pennsylvania](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169646.172376.246&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13810).
* * *

clean_body: If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can . | Share On | ---|--- PUBLIC HEALTH UPDATE: WHAT TO KNOW ABOUT MEASLES One case of measles has been reported in Montgomery County. As of now, there is NOT an outbreak in Pennsylvania, but public health officials are monitoring the situation and stand ready to respond. The has confirmed that one case of the measles has been identified in Montgomery County. The case is related to international travel and not a domestic outbreak. While there is no immediate risk to the general public, we want to make sure everyone understands what the disease is and how to stay healthy. Public health officials are and have processes in place if more cases are confirmed in Pennsylvania. Individuals can also play a part to keep communities healthy and safe. According to the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) What is measles? Measles is a highly contagious, viral respiratory illness. Measles can cause: Cold-like symptoms, such as runny nose/congestion, cough or fever Red, watery eyes, also known as pink eye (conjunctivitis) Small white spots, known as Koplik's spots, inside the mouth that develop about two to four days before rash onset but quickly disappear after rash appears A distinct blotchy, red rash that appears two to four days after the first symptoms (though this can vary) and starts on the face and neck and spreads downward Some people with measles may experience complications, such as pneumonia, swelling of the brain, seizures and -- in extreme cases -- death. What can I do to protect myself and my family from the measles? Make sure all children and adults in your household are up to date on their recommended vaccinations. Vaccine save lives. Take precautions with children who are under 12 months and cannot be vaccinated, have weak immune systems, or who cannot get the vaccine for medical reasons. Consider keeping these individuals away from anyone with a fever, cough, or other respiratory symptoms. Wash your hands regularly Is the measles vaccine safe? According to CHOP: Yes! The vaccine is safe and effective. Once a common childhood illness that affected mostly preschool- and school-aged children, measles has been relatively nonexistent in the U.S. in recent years. This is the result of widespread vaccination. Measles vaccination is highly effective in preventing infection. Unfortunately, we are seeing rising cases of measles in the last few years because of decreases in vaccination rates. Can my child get vaccinated before they 're 12 months old? According to CHOP: A mother who has been immunized with the measles, mumps and rubella (MMR) vaccine or previously had measles passes on antibodies to her unborn baby. These antibodies provide protection for up to six months, and possibly longer. Babies are not routinely recommended to get the vaccine before 1 year of age because the antibodies they're getting from their mom might interfere with how well the vaccine works before that time. This recommendation has not changed.Your providers will continue to monitor guidance for vaccination recommendations. If an official outbreak comes to Pennsylvania, providers may recommend that children younger than 12 months get the vaccination. Keep in mind, the MMR vaccine is still recommended for children 6 months and older at least two weeks prior to any international travel. What should I do if I think me, or my child has the measles? If you suspect you or anyone in your family has the measles, contact your healthcare provider before you go to a doctor's office or hospital. They will give advice on precautions to take before entering any facility to avoid potentially exposing others. For more information, refer to the or . * | Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes | | | District Office 2401 North 54th Street Philadelphia, PA 19131 Phone: 215.879.7777 Fax: 215.879.7778 | | Harrisburg Office Senate Box 203007 Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007 Phone: 717.787.7112 Fax: 717.772.0579 | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | \- \-

This is an awful budget, and let me tell you why. Budgets are an opportunity to share your priorities — **and the Republican proposal tells us exactly who they are fighting for.** With this budget proposal, the GOP wants to cut vital programs and services to veterans, seniors, children and our most vulnerable communities to give $4.5 trillion in tax cuts to the wealthiest individuals and corporations. Their budget would add $1.6 trillion to the deficit. But let me tell you what this specifically means for our district:
* 25,000 people who rely on the Affordable Care Act for healthcare could see insurance premiums skyrocket to $1,730, a more than 60% increase.

* 210,000 people who rely on Medicaid, this includes over 91,000 children and 32,000 seniors on a fixed income. Those services will be impacted and potentially defunded.

* Republicans would also gut food safety net programs, impacting over 80,000 people. SNAP allows people to put healthy food on the table and Republicans want to strip this essential resource.

It is clear — Republicans are more interested in serving the billionaire class than the hard working Americans that keep this nation running. They do not care how it impacts us, our families, or the American people. **I am doing what I can to fight back against this extreme agenda and hold the line on the issues impacting everyday people, but I cannot do this alone.** **[The best opportunity to hold them accountable is by flipping the House blue. Will you pitch in right now to help us protect this seat and keep me fighting for families across Connecticut?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103549398/532518286/-1544467485?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ZiZTcxMS0yMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZxbGfUXFXebwiF8vSsA1cWTXLVRY2YA6gNTDh2us6o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103549402/532518290/-1544467485?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ZiZTcxMS0yMWZkLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZxbGfUXFXebwiF8vSsA1cWTXLVRY2YA6gNTDh2us6o=)

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

subject: House GOP Unveils ‘Clean’ Text To Fund Government While Democrats Threaten Shutdown
body:
Trump Train News

House GOP Unveils ‘Clean’ Text To Fund Government While Democrats
Threaten Shutdown
https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze8v9iaahocljmiktn7g6dprt1knc40rlv0777v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4clhm2o70cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kugn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnk9g64pb7k1j6f830sugbfdbmekqqedtgemin7crl6iorctd666qj8ctlk5qj1sblk5rrb8pleeojb9pnmdqj4stlmkpr2td7e2qb3d9lk4qjbdtm69q32tjlk5ob4t9k65qj7dd6e2qn2s9nmtprf8h5u

https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziq85cifjgro1np63o8g6ch5a21km3dnmpkqf9q0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t1e9qnbc3he9q39ctjmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9imf836cug61pt0muqnct9lksrr0td5eepnad5hmpqqccdl6gprb8bl63onb8bnmmhjasth6mjjfcrl69prbd9jm5qqes5km6qjb89l6mrrccjk65r7b8bgm9qj8cbl6eqqcs5le5ojfdrjmuh238h1e8he4937c5i6aor1c3g69oh5u

House Republican leadership unveiled bill text Saturday to fund the
government through September and avert a partial government shutdown

name: PragerU
subject: MEGA MATCH: Your Gift Goes 2X Further Today!
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuee8pIteknop5I6ITm82bsswv&s=BKJINKPBGBPELBJD)
---
| | Dear Patriot, Conservatives didn't just win in November...we're about to win the culture. Now, it's not only safe to be conservative, it's cool. This massive cultural shift didn't happen overnight. Fourteen years ago, Dennis, Allen Estrin, and the small but mighty team at PragerU set out on what seemed like an impossible mission--to change millions of young minds in just five minutes. And that's precisely what we've done, thanks to our generous supporters who took a leap of faith by investing in us. Today, PragerU's viral content reaches millions of young people (25% of them are not conservative) every single day--and we're changing 70% of minds in the process. **[**Your tax-deductible donation to PragerU TODAY will be MATCHED.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuee8pIteknop5I7ITm82bsswv&s=BKJINKPBGBPELBJD)** But our work is far from over. The moment is ours. _To win or lose._ Either we swiftly and aggressively take back more lost ground from the left, or we squander this incredible opportunity to save America for future generations. Our education system is still under the control of radical leftists. As President Trump rightly said: "...we have an education system that teaches our children to be ashamed of themselves, in many cases to hate our country..." We must stop teachers' unions, leftist nonprofits, and unelected bureaucrats from using our precious children and grandchildren as cannon fodder to gain more political control for the left. These leftists aren't going to become reasonable and "see the light" because they lost one battle. They're going to do the opposite. They see this defeat as their personal mandate to push even harder to indoctrinate our children with their radical, anti-American values. PragerU is on a MEGA mission to Make Education Great Education. **[Give to PragerU today and your donation will be DOUBLED with 2X the impact!](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuee8pIteknop5I8ITm82bsswv&s=BKJINKPBGBPELBJD) ** PragerU's content has already reached 1 in 3 Americans--thanks to the support of patriots like you. But we're still facing a powerful, well-funded, and sophisticated opposition. **[By making your MATCHED gift today, you'll help PragerU's Make Education Great Again (MEGA) Campaign teach millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuee8pIteknop5I9ITm82bsswv&s=BKJINKPBGBPELBJD) ** It's time to loudly and proudly proclaim our love for America. We must fix the education system from the outside and from within. PragerU is now doing both--reaching young people directly and in the classroom through many U.S. state partnerships. What once seemed impossible is becoming reality. Together, we are shifting the culture, and we need YOU to continue fueling our fight. For the love of God and country,Marissa StreitPragerU CEO **P.S.**_Please help us continue this patriotic wave across America: Give today to have your gift MATCHED and fuel PragerU 's MEGA Campaign to teach millions more kids to LOVE AMERICA! The moment is ours, if only each of us will take it. _
---
| | [**2X My Gift**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuee8pIteknop5IaITm82bsswv&s=BKJINKPBGBPELBJD)
---

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump just handed Democrats a MAJOR opening—now we have to take advantage!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=N24OYggEOYPP3%2BovjDZU84Bp5tKJjdfzqKXHtwPKrr%2BQlO99qaVcdNV7YnPYBBbXbrMmkW1uJ6S3F%2BvCoQ%2Fp6G18KUQjnMi3qV0bP6DDoAAa1GpRWmBFW54kltUohc14ilp1UvaznoNtkce5RZwfMZ7b0NsRHbYMjLxQNngtcmNjL%2Bon6Okk5J%2BSi%2FmOcX7tTbnKLDEmbv0lVaJ7Megjqk1P2O%2BiOLr7LTOGjpzf4nrLDs1Cxct0Zr6QSLnBoDoKam6r3LdBGLecTuCuCTu7gMPKlECHozA%2BEextKl%2B7Izr6sMRA%2F3ClfTeVWcnjBtTWLudPfshkvNuD2IltyMzJedbSK4srQkS1DbdMdLlsnQaLTHaY1kLK%2FThTrYFsvTXw9buZIIvXX1%2BRuULpowaPyCoF3v0zoTKShjYPkz4%2BvdM%3D .

| Peter, it's Jenn — Maxwell’s finance director. The next time you’re wondering if your $20 donation makes a difference, I’m here to tell you: _**it does._** So far this year, Maxwell’s average donation is $18.91. Yes, you read that right. _Just $18.91._ That $18.91 is what allowed Maxwell to be the first Gen Z member re-elected to Congress. It’s what’s fueling our fight against the Trump administration and their billionaire buddies. It’s what’s keeping Maxwell fighting for you in Congress. So whether you gave $1, $20, $100, or even more than that, _thank you._ Each of your individual contributions led us to that $18.91 average donation so far — and that average donation is accomplishing so much. [**_Now that 2025 is well underway and the challenges ahead are more clear than ever, will you match that average donation and contribute $18.91 to our campaign? ## My Three Calls To Action
Therefore, here are my 3 calls to action--_I hope you choose to complete at least 1 of them_. Your support has gotten us this far, and your support will elevate _Let 's Address This_ to the next level (especially as we face an incoming fascist President).
1. Jump in. Become a paid subscriber at a cup of coffee ($6) a month or $50 a year.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..bZ36E-bL1anG-CL_VKI2WAuashGr1MOsrKhTmXyhByc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158726319)
2. Grow our community. Gift a subscription to a friend or loved one.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..bZ36E-bL1anG-CL_VKI2WAuashGr1MOsrKhTmXyhByc?&gift=true)
3. Maximize our reach. Share this post on your social media, in your family group chat, or simply like and comment. Engage and help boost its visibility.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=158726319&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NzI2MzE5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDE1NTM5MDUsImV4cCI6MTc0NDE0NTkwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.m9lBmBzaln4-z6co3fTGqT_nUFwwcTYzaEgv8TxHJjs)

## **A Final Word**
Donald Trump has spent the last 6 weeks engaging in mass deportations, another Muslim ban, book bans, anti-LGBTQ orders, trade wars, threatening our closest allies, giving unaccountable billionaires unprecedented and illegal access to our private data, and even building a concentration camp in Cuba, and more. Corporate media has already kissed his ring, and will not have the courage or integrity to convey accurate information.
My mission remains clear and firm--**uphold absolute justice and human rights in all I do and advocate** , and do so without billionaire support. Instead, do so with the people, by the people, and for the people. **This is why I seek and want your support.** Every dollar we spend is a vote for the kind of future we want. Help me build a future more committed to justice and universal human rights. Subscribe, share, and let's remain relentless in our mission for a more perfect Union.
**Thank you for your trust. ❤️**
Sincerely,
Qasim

A Final Word Donald Trump has spent the last 6 weeks engaging in mass deportations, another Muslim ban, book bans, anti-LGBTQ orders, trade wars, threatening our closest allies, giving unaccountable billionaires unprecedented and illegal access to our private data, and even building a concentration camp in Cuba, and more. subject: Coming soon: New electoral maps in Ohio

body:
Chip in to help stop gerrymandering in Ohio and nationwide
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103551016/532521542/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkMTY4MTczLTI5ZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4GmRZz8qES01sjYzh074c4DoBl5rItrnFs1eZ055jpA=&emci=f3fdaf5b-70fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=bd168173-29fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, “Confusing Ohioans was not such a bad strategy.” Yes, you read that right. These shockingly cynical words from Ohio’s state GOP chair reveal the true agenda of Ohio Republicans: misleading voters into rejecting reforms that would make state electoral maps fair. That is exactly what they did last fall to defeat a ballot measure that would have created a nonpartisan redistricting commission. **Now, Ohioans are looking ahead to a redraw of Ohio’s congressional maps later this year —** using the same-old extreme partisan approach. As infuriating as the deceptive practices of the state GOP have been, the backstory of Ohio’s electoral map saga is even more outrageous. **Take a couple minutes to keep reading and see why we must keep fighting for fair maps in Ohio and across the country. **[**But first! Donate to help us stop Republicans’ ongoing efforts to gerrymander electoral maps and create an unfair political advantage.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103551017/532521546/469381263?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ComingForCensus_email_20250309-NDRC-Tier1-ComingForCensusOhio_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250309-NDRC-Tier1-ComingForCensusOhio_&utm_campaign=ComingForCensus&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkMTY4MTczLTI5ZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4GmRZz8qES01sjYzh074c4DoBl5rItrnFs1eZ055jpA=) Back in 2015, Ohio voters passed a constitutional amendment to create the Ohio Redistricting Commission to draw new maps. It took until 2021 for the Republican-led Commission to meet for the first time — and over the next two years, their proposed state legislative and congressional maps were struck down in the courts a staggering _seven times_. During the 2022 election, the Republican-led legislature forced Ohio to use unconstitutional maps that the Ohio Supreme Court had already overturned for unduly favoring Republicans. **Then, during last November’s election, Ohio voters had an opportunity to create a citizen-led, nonpartisan redistricting commission. But Republicans did everything they could to sabotage the ballot initiative.** They even resorted to trickery in the phrasing that’d appear on official ballots! Republican Secretary of State Frank LaRose wrote a description of the measure and pushed it through along party lines, claiming that Issue 1 would “establish a new taxpayer-funded commission of appointees required to gerrymander the boundaries of state legislative and congressional districts.” The problem was, the _actual_ proposal said Issue 1 would **"ban partisan gerrymandering."** Republicans knew they couldn’t win by telling the truth, so they resorted to bald-faced lies. **In the end, Republicans successfully defeated Issue 1 in a close race — and now we must continue the fight for fair maps in Ohio when it comes time to redraw the map again this year.** The good news is, in spite of the well-funded confusion Republicans sowed around this issue last year, we came extremely close to defeating the gerrymanderers at the ballot box. Ohio voters are getting wise to their antics. This year, we need all eyes on this process to ensure that they don’t get away with an even more skewed map. [**Peter, any contribution you can make will help fuel the fight for fair maps in Ohio across the U.S. Please donate today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103551018/532521557/469381263?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ComingForCensus_email_20250309-NDRC-Tier1-ComingForCensusOhio_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250309-NDRC-Tier1-ComingForCensusOhio_&utm_campaign=ComingForCensus&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkMTY4MTczLTI5ZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4GmRZz8qES01sjYzh074c4DoBl5rItrnFs1eZ055jpA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

As infuriating as the deceptive practices of the state GOP have been, the backstory of Ohio’s electoral map saga is even more outrageous. Take a couple minutes to keep reading and see why we must keep fighting for fair maps in Ohio and across the country. = Back in 2015, Ohio voters passed a constitutional amendment to create the Ohio Redistricting Commission to draw new maps. It took until 2021 for the Republican-led Commission to meet for the first time — and over the next two years, their proposed state legislative and congressional maps were struck down in the courts a staggering seven times. During the 2022 election, the Republican-led legislature forced Ohio to use unconstitutional maps that the Ohio Supreme Court had already overturned for unduly favoring Republicans. Then, during last November’s election, Ohio voters had an opportunity to create a citizen-led, nonpartisan redistricting commission. But Republicans did everything they could to sabotage the ballot initiative. They even resorted to trickery in the phrasing that’d appear on official ballots! Republican Secretary of State Frank LaRose wrote a description of the measure and pushed it through along party lines, claiming that Issue 1 would “establish a new taxpayer-funded commission of appointees required to gerrymander the boundaries of state legislative and congressional districts.” The problem was, the actual proposal said Issue 1 would "ban partisan gerrymandering." Republicans knew they couldn’t win by telling the truth, so they resorted to bald-faced lies. In the end, Republicans successfully defeated Issue 1 in a close race — and now we must continue the fight for fair maps in Ohio when it comes time to redraw the map again this year. The good news is, in spite of the well-funded confusion Republicans sowed around this issue last year, we came extremely close to defeating the gerrymanderers at the ballot box. Ohio voters are getting wise to their antics. This year, we need all eyes on this process to ensure that they don’t get away with an even more skewed map. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’ll keep you posted on further developments in Ohio — stay tuned! \- The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determined the outcome of the U.S. presidential race last year. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. **More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally.** Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. **[The people who tell you we can't get rid of the Electoral College are wrong. Chip in $25 or more to help us change to a popular vote system once and for all>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103551203/532522100/-523723236?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOGQ4NjA1LTJhZmQtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JBL1aP0Y_iLV7AM3dIW3OgvMwgxlRtEAWdodI8G8XRg=&emci=0a5b90f7-0afd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5a8d8605-2afd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=33603084)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: PRC: Majority of Americans continue to favor moving away from Electoral College| | | Team: When nearly two out of every three Americans agree on something, it's probably a good idea to do it. When it comes to the Electoral College -- a system that isn't equipped to handle the stress tests that opponents of voting rights are giving it -- we need to end it and stop letting cynical candidates game the system to take power. | | | As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determined the outcome of the U.S. presidential race last year. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally. Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to move to a system that's right and just over a system that benefits only themselves and silences others. This is about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something. This is about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. This about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to just enough Electoral College votes. you, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: Every single Republican is facing this deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE
body:
maximize your impact here| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e96f0211ebc40fca1e432128c9199e2&_e=0i3V8O2MmgI8QI_vQbvuEhVO7zjjb6RH2ByPRnZFs7lnn7K5xTp6UvKuXE9ASIlKgo45_D9Q_fG58SyXuCJtWUpj4Q5GdzmCSjYNYG5ssNiK24tOfJOOmflyl8-8qDxdvtlIriQDB-3xeP9TfJ0d1aKCjKrbDgIu59FBpiIuaAPYp2ntReF8-VedCocKVo5yOu7yM3t7U9rgpEOJ0-MbvOqSmrUuL6TNtz3QwaXWWSJ0jHriefroTTshFneIMgpSERCrw7TRjoSk0kfLjAkSLK89xY_Z_9upnGFIqx9_ULuQS7vo-WyaeRVrKwE0stC44B2QDPTJgen4kXF_yXbUPEy4J3L71OWDfqFqNuXpHNOOVcWKrY76MJaBEpD6GLDC)
---
This is Senator Tom Cotton. I’m facing my first fundraising deadline on March 31st. I’m not alone. Every single Republican Senator and Senate campaign is facing this deadline. And when it comes to _must-win_ states, it’s as important as it gets. **[That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and these key races ASAP.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e96f0211ebc40fca1e432128c9199e2&_e=0i3V8O2MmgI8QI_vQbvuEhVO7zjjb6RH2ByPRnZFs7lnn7K5xTp6UvKuXE9ASIlKgo45_D9Q_fG58SyXuCJtWUpj4Q5GdzmCSjYNYG5ssNiK24tOfJOOmflyl8-8qDxdvtlIriQDB-3xeP9TfJ0d1aKCjKrbDgIu59FBpiIuaAPYp2ntReF8-VedCocKVo5yOu7yM3t7U9rgpEOJ0-MbvIm6y2oDK5QhQKsNFxTERYg0zPesUjTDwz6P_7S6MtJ0IlWUY3CEANi5GfH0wGFtG80gRBKUvg8ybfbXWuQuKgO7jx0ZSldEWFJX2AxvcwrYzhcXgp2bjCQ29LvQHrDzDi89anwGT2z0RU0OZLVz3dhd_qrcix0BQspTrtkRHFfk)** **_In Georgia, we must defeat Jon Ossoff._** Georgia is a Trump state, but Ossoff votes like a total liberal. He also raised _$156 million_ last time. To defeat Jon Ossoff, we need every tough conservative to support the Georgia Nominee Fund. **_In New Hampshire, Jeanne Shaheen could run again, or could retire and create an open race._** Whoever our nominee is, the New Hampshire Nominee Fund will be ready for them on day one. **_In Michigan, we have an open Senate race. _**Michigan, like Georgia, is a Trump state. There’s no reason it shouldn’t have a Republican senator. The Michigan Nominee Fund is there to help us hit the ground running. **_Finally, in North Carolina and Maine, we must defend the Senate seats we have. _**

Georgia is a Trump state, but Ossoff votes like a total liberal. He also raised $156 million last time. To defeat Jon Ossoff, we need every tough conservative to support the Georgia Nominee Fund. In New Hampshire, Jeanne Shaheen could run again, or could retire and create an open race. Whoever our nominee is, the New Hampshire Nominee Fund will be ready for them on day one. In Michigan, we have an open Senate race. Michigan, like Georgia, is a Trump state. There’s no reason it shouldn’t have a Republican senator.
