name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines - 03/09/2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

This week, the single-minded political theatrics of my progressive counterparts on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors has once again illustrated the need to keep commonsense, Republican leadership in Richmond beyond Governor Youngkin's term.

>From public safety, to education, to our economy... if the Democrats get their way in 2025, Virginia will look more like California, (or Maryland, as our candidate for governor Winsome Sears often shares), than the Commonwealth we want and expect from our leaders.

I'll circle back to Fairfax at the end of this week's newsletter - but the redeeming part of my week was the time spent on the campaign trail continuing to visit with conservatives across Virginia and garner support for our commonsense, conservative message.

---
| |
---
Our first campaign stop this week was in Charlottesville, where I had the pleasure of speaking with their Republican Committee and a number of College Republicans representing the University of Virginia.
---
| |
---

The next evening took me back to Frederick County for their Republican Party's Lincoln-Reagan dinner. It was a great opportunity to provide an update on the campaign and visit with friends and supporters.
---
| |
---

It was an early morning to get to Augusta County, where I joined City Elders and spoke about the
importance faith and defending our conservative principles over the next four years.
---
| |
---
From there I traveled up to Harrisonburg's First Friday, where I had the opportunity to visit with a number of friends and supporters. It was a pleasure to see Senator Mark Obenshain and Supervisor Dewey Ritchie especially - both endorsements we announced this week.
---
| |
---
We wrapped up the week with the Albemarle County Republican Committee, a phenomenal group of conservatives who are passionate about improving Republican performance in Democrat areas. As a successful Republican in Fairfax County I found we have a lot in common, and I look forward to working with Albemarle to win across the Commonwealth in November.
---
| As we continue on the campaign trail, we continue to earn endorsements and support from some of our party's most respected leaders, and I was honored to announce three new endorsements this week.
---
| |
---
Senator Mark Obenshain has been a statewide nominee for our party, a long-time leader in the Senate of Virginia, and currently serves as **Chairman of the Senate Republican Caucus**. I'm incredibly grateful to have his backing as I seek to represent all Virginians on our party's ticket and as our Lieutenant Governor.
---
| |
---
Former Fairfax City Councilman Sang Yi has been a close ally in the past, and another leader who has been successful at persuading voters in Democrat leaning areas to support our commonsense, conservative ideas. I'm grateful to have his endorsement as someone I've worked with in Fairfax and known well for some time.
---
| |
---

Rockingham County Supervisor Dewey Ritchie is a fixture in the Republican Party of Rockingham County and in the City of Harrisonburg, serving the party and his constituents faithfully. His support is extremely influential in the Harrisonburg area, and I'm honored to have him behind me this year!
---
| While our campaign to represent Virginia with commonsense, conservative ideas continues to gain momentum, my liberal counterparts on the Fairfax Board of Supervisors continue to resist commonsense.

This week's board meeting was particularly frustrating, and demonstrated once again that the Democrats care more about their political agendas than they do about doing the right thing. Some of you may be following the situation in Fairfax County with Richard Cox, a transgender man who exposed himself on numerous occasions in women's locker rooms in county facilities. He was able to do so because Fairfax County policy allows individuals to use the restroom or locker room that matches the gender with which they identify - rather than requiring them to use the one that matches their biological sex.

This week, I moved that the Board have a discussion of changing that policy - a policy the board never reviewed or approved in the first place. Not only did all nine of my Democrat counterparts decline to second my motion, the Chairman both later in the meeting and in his newsletter attempted to mislead residents by saying that this policy has changed. Last week I confirmed that, while the Park policy was revised, the policy continues to permit individuals to expose male body parts in the women’s locker rooms. Woman and young girls that witness this activity are directed to use the family restroom if they feel uncomfortable. The underlying county policy remains completely unchanged. Having a close friend whose granddaughter was one of Richard Cox's victims - an eleven-year-old girl that had to lock herself inside a bathroom stall until she felt it safe to run out of the locker room and is still traumatized by the incident - I can't comprehend holding the position that a simple discussion of changing our policy is unnecessary. It's the only way that we can protect women and young girls in the future.

If we don't want the political agendas that permeate Fairfax politics to fully permeate Richmond, it's critical that we keep our statewide elected offices in Republican hands this year. It's why I'm running, and it's why I'm committed to doing everything possible to help elect Winsome Sears as our next Governor and reelect Jason Miyares as our Attorney General.
---
|
---
| On a less somber note - if you haven't purchased your tickets yet, I hope that you'll join us on Sunday, March 16th for my annual St. Patrick's Day Party! We'll have live music, corned beef & cabbage, plenty of good beer, and our famous mashed potato bar! [Click here for details and to RSVP.](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=4c7d446b4b&e=a1ea0f9c99)

---
| [RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=2cd9bc3d94&e=a1ea0f9c99 "RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!")
---
|
Thanks for taking the time to follow along this week, and I look forward to seeing you soon on the campaign trail!
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---
|
---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=630315ed1a&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
---

---
| [Sign Up for Herrity's Headline](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=5e52cbf23a&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline")

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=2a12a57159) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=2a12a57159)

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. | 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd318KdcIopMeJEFhiMtm3tcD8oPuo9YlopfPcfc1P-EGldiqhe82eVaU1-YMZA7mV2vjSuvCN8yfWAwFNBvi7GPP4pE9Uo8tmVme7i0-vMI5EWYLkXhlk9EPXHiXBvUE4YLJHzSoAlM9MhwbUICvFrh0CFUmQlkY7v-6mnoVMBhYrazX6D2TBuZ7O7ZGBTdtx7bDLvzMHY_tZHPXb3IzJMCnOkEYkwSp0t2ZwS21sPU1a3TCfEoSPjvjMrtZnW53W-WARtWABXlME-Or0A1cMJcYcrAR7dEKcUjcl7_6DENKIAqztNTT7BJi_xDAUdfEFWWdI7ur7vqZXGoBg8CI0pIooAQW-1p5nJioaLk2V4KxTwkGoUdeXWWqMrvwAH4jh_0YNYs_u9YOkm84VK4pWTqfLtEp1Jwe_nowGiY1Ua1Ea/4en/6PSALu0iQVe8Jtm7ccQknw/h0/h001.Cct-rt4ztlKbSAtoOf6yhjW8upQotF4bc-tVc_AXoFw)

# [Union President SHUTS DOWN Kaitlan Collins, defends Trump's tariffs live on CNN](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158729145&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NzI5MTQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDE1NjAxMjIsImV4cCI6MTc0NDE1MjEyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3EtXs02vkGqBphj44AubPsB3jJ1CEu6vc1zR903VazU)

United Auto Workers President Shawn Fain **[shocked CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbe72dc-a941-4ed7-a3f2-ad253184c766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by defending President Trump's tariff plan, praising his moves to get a fair deal for America in trade during a live T.V. interview.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbe72dc-a941-4ed7-a3f2-ad253184c766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbe72dc-a941-4ed7-a3f2-ad253184c766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What does the uncertainty say about companies should be preparing for what's coming?" Collins asked Fain of the recent 25% tariff placement on Canada and Mexico.
"Well, this isn't new," Fain answered. "They've had time to prepare. Workers, consumers, communities,**[they've paid the price for NAFTA and these unfair trade agreements,](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbe72dc-a941-4ed7-a3f2-ad253184c766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and they shouldn't have to pay to fix it."
"We hear a lot of fear-mongering, that tariffs are a tax, tariffs are going to cause prices to go up, but that's a choice on behalf of companies. They don't have to raise the price a penny!" he continued. "Companies are still making billions of dollars and they're still forking over billions of dollars to shareholders!"
**[Collins expressed shock with Fain's answer,](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbe72dc-a941-4ed7-a3f2-ad253184c766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** saying some would be surprised to hear his support for Trump's tariff agenda after Fain had strongly supported Kamala Harris and had once called Trump a "scab."
"As I said, there's a lot we don't agree with,... but look, the election is over. We all recognize that there is a major issue with our broken trade laws. We agree on that and we're ready to go to work to fix it," Fain explained.
Watch the tense interview here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbe72dc-a941-4ed7-a3f2-ad253184c766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Sen. Kennedy goes HOG WILD on arrogant Democrat, tells him to stop taking drugs**
Sen. John Kennedy **[exploded at Democrat witness for refusing to admit](https://substack.com/redirect/52c21dd2-a55c-4d3f-9b57-c111116c145b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** there is surging antisemitism on Ivy League campuses like Columbia University.
_" You need to stop dipping into your ketamine stash!!" _
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/52c21dd2-a55c-4d3f-9b57-c111116c145b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/52c21dd2-a55c-4d3f-9b57-c111116c145b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What's there to investigate?! We see it!" Kennedy asked the witness about rising anti semitic activity on college campuses. "It was clear to me that the administration of Columbia and most members of the faculty believe passionately in diversity, equity, inclusion and the right to hurt jews! Isn't that what you saw?!!"
When the witness refused to agree with Kennedy, the senator went hog wild, "Are you telling me Columbia was supportive of the jewish community?! You need to stop dipping into your ketamine stash!!!"
"If you want to stop the antisemitism, maybe we need to stop teaching the kids to be anti semitic!" Kennedy added.
Watch the off the rails moment right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/52c21dd2-a55c-4d3f-9b57-c111116c145b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Judge Jeanine EXPLODES AT Jessica Tarlov during HEATED live tv screaming match**
Judge Jeanine **[went off on Jessica Tarlov](https://substack.com/redirect/f917cd97-9b59-41d0-9c0c-e83b6c768651?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when she suggested that Jeanine was pro-Russian, during an explosive segment on "The Five."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f917cd97-9b59-41d0-9c0c-e83b6c768651?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f917cd97-9b59-41d0-9c0c-e83b6c768651?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Jeanine highlighted that the current situation in Ukraine came about because of NATO's encroachment on Russia, which was challenged treaties "signed decades ago."
"They [Ukrainians] do not have a future with him, They do not have a future with Zelensky. Zelensky is dependent upon us! It is time for Ukraine to start building and stop the killing" Jeanine argued.
"Oh poor Russia" Tarlov shot back.
"I'm not pro-Russian at all." Jeanine countered but was cut off by Tarlov
"Really? It doesn't sound like that at all!"
It was at that point that Jeanine lost it, "Oh, don't give me that! The truth is...they don't want NATO any closer and it's been decades that that's been agreed too!"
**[Watch the heated debate right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/f917cd97-9b59-41d0-9c0c-e83b6c768651?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f917cd97-9b59-41d0-9c0c-e83b6c768651?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"Well, this isn't new," Fain answered. "They've had time to prepare. Workers, consumers, communities, and they shouldn't have to pay to fix it." "We hear a lot of fear-mongering, that tariffs are a tax, tariffs are going to cause prices to go up, but that's a choice on behalf of companies. They don't have to raise the price a penny!" he continued. "Companies are still making billions of dollars and they're still forking over billions of dollars to shareholders!" saying some would be surprised to hear his support for Trump's tariff agenda after Fain had strongly supported Kamala Harris and had once called Trump a "scab." name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: My story →
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer email, but I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read it. I want to take a moment to share a bit more of my story with you, why I ran for DNC Chair, and why I’m hoping to earn your investment in our Party as we rebuild after a tough election cycle. I am the first son of a single mom who had me when she was 15 years old, and who was raising four kids by the time she was 20. We were in and out of shelters, and we knew what poverty felt like. We saw what my mom sacrificed to make sure we could have a warm dinner most nights. Because my mom gave a damn about us, and because my community gave a damn about our family, it meant we had a chance. I ended up being the first kid in my family to go to college and get a degree. **I got involved in politics because I believe our government should give a damn, too.** Too many people view politics as a sport – something that’s just about winning or losing. But to me, and to millions of families, this is personal. Whether we win or lose has a real impact on people’s lives. Just look at what we’re seeing right now: Donald Trump is openly coming after public schools and child care. He’s going after nursing homes and community health clinics and farmers. His policies are raising prices for millions of people, on necessities like food and gas, and doing nothing to help working families. If Donald Trump were president when I was a kid, I wouldn’t be here today. All of what he is doing has a real impact on people — and it’s why it’s more important than ever that we elect as many Democrats as possible, all over the country, who are willing to stand up and check Trump’s power in any way they can. **That’s my vision for our Party: organizing against Trump and his allies’ harmful agenda, competing in every ZIP code, and building the long-term party infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats _everywhere._** [**To do that, I’m asking for your help. Can you make an investment now in the future of the Democratic Party?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250309_2923_fr&refcode2=2923_22930333_Ga7DGd&akid=2923%2E22930333%2EGa7DGd) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250309_2923_fr&refcode2=2923_22930333_Ga7DGd&akid=2923%2E22930333%2EGa7DGd)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?refcode=em_20250309_2923_fr&refcode2=2923_22930333_Ga7DGd&akid=2923%2E22930333%2EGa7DGd)**
---
****
Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and for the chance to earn your support.
Ken
Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250309_2923_fr&refcode2=2923_22930333_Ga7DGd&akid=2923%2E22930333%2EGa7DGd)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Vasquez HQ
subject: re: Cuts to Medicaid and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:

name: Jessica Sutta
subject: From Vaccine Victims to Hollywood Stars
body:
| |
---
Rolling out the Red Carpet for the Vaccine Injured brave enough to tell their stories | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDM3Njg1MDkwOTEyMDM5LFwiclwiOjE0ODQzNzczNTkzMjE2Nzg4OH0iLCJzIjoiZTQ2MmQwN2Y3MGM3ZDRmZSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDM3Njg1MDk2MTU0OTIyLFwiclwiOjE0ODQzNzczNTkzMjE2Nzg4OH0iLCJzIjoiZDNlMTUyM2YyYjM2NjQ2MSJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, My name is Jessica Sutta, and I am writing today to tell you about a groundbreaking documentary that I have been blessed to be involved in. [**_Follow the Silenced_**](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDM3Njg1MTAwMzQ5MjI4LFwiclwiOjE0ODQzNzczNTkzMjE2Nzg4OH0iLCJzIjoiNzMxNzRkNTJkZWRjNmQyNSJ9) tells the heartbreaking stories of everyday Americans whose lives were changed forever by the COVID-19 “vaccine.” **I know because I was one of them.** The jab hijacked my brain and destroyed my body, leaving me wondering if I could face another day. I went from being a famous singer and dancer to a woman barely able to get out of bed. Doctors did not believe my invisible pain, and I was shunned by friends and Hollywood agents. Tragically, countless others experienced the same pain and isolation, but today, we are reclaiming our lives by speaking out and sharing our stories. _Follow the Silenced_ is bringing awareness to the horrors of vaccine injury, and we want to honor the brave voices in this film.

|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDM3Njg1MTAzNDk0OTU4LFwiclwiOjE0ODQzNzczNTkzMjE2Nzg4OH0iLCJzIjoiY2I1MmEwZTVjMDNhMDZhYiJ9)
---
|
---
That is why I have joined Texans for Vaccine Choice to help raise funds for some of the incredible individuals I’ve had the privilege of meeting on this journey. We want to cover the travel costs for these heroes to attend the film screening at the Santa Monica Film Festival in Hollywood next Saturday, March 15. [Can I count on you to help me give them a true red carpet experience with a gift of $100, $250, or even $500 today?](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDM3Njg1MTA2NjQwNjg4LFwiclwiOjE0ODQzNzczNTkzMjE2Nzg4OH0iLCJzIjoiNWVkYWQwOTgxZGVhZjBjOCJ9)
|
---
| | [ **Donate Today!** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ4NDM3Njg1MTA5Nzg2NDE4LFwiclwiOjE0ODQzNzczNTkzMjE2Nzg4OH0iLCJzIjoiOWRmZDc2NTRhZThhMzYzOCJ9)
---
|
---
For people like us suffering from vaccine injuries, traveling can be painful and exhausting, but the joy of being together and promoting this film will be worth the effort. The stories so courageously told are truly a testimony to the human spirit, showing that even in the worst circumstances, the best of us rise to the occasion as a force for good in the face of adversity. That’s why I’m asking you to consider contributing—to ensure these heroes can be there with us to celebrate everything this film represents, made possible by their courage. I know how much this once-in-a-lifetime moment means to me, and I hope you’ll join me in making it a reality for every member of this extraordinary cast.

|
---
| | | **Love,**
******Jessica Sutta**
---|---|---
|
---
P.S. Can you chip in $100 so we can give the individuals in _Follow the Silenced_ a true red carpet experience on March 15?
|
---

---
|

clean_body: | | Rolling out the Red Carpet for the Vaccine Injured brave enough to tell their stories | | | | | | Peter, My name is Jessica Sutta, and I am writing today to tell you about a groundbreaking documentary that I have been blessed to be involved in. tells the heartbreaking stories of everyday Americans whose lives were changed forever by the COVID-19 “vaccine.” I know because I was one of them. The jab hijacked my brain and destroyed my body, leaving me wondering if I could face another day. I went from being a famous singer and dancer to a woman barely able to get out of bed. Doctors did not believe my invisible pain, and I was shunned by friends and Hollywood agents. Tragically, countless others experienced the same pain and isolation, but today, we are reclaiming our lives by speaking out and sharing our stories. Follow the Silenced is bringing awareness to the horrors of vaccine injury, and we want to honor the brave voices in this film. | | | That is why I have joined Texans for Vaccine Choice to help raise funds for some of the incredible individuals I’ve had the privilege of meeting on this journey. We want to cover the travel costs for these heroes to attend the film screening at the Santa Monica Film Festival in Hollywood next Saturday, March 15. | | | | For people like us suffering from vaccine injuries, traveling can be painful and exhausting, but the joy of being together and promoting this film will be worth the effort. The stories so courageously told are truly a testimony to the human spirit, showing that even in the worst circumstances, the best of us rise to the occasion as a force for good in the face of adversity. That’s why I’m asking you to consider contributing—to ensure these heroes can be there with us to celebrate everything this film represents, made possible by their courage. I know how much this once-in-a-lifetime moment means to me, and I hope you’ll join me in making it a reality for every member of this extraordinary cast. | | | | Love, ****Jessica Sutta ---|---|--- | P.S. Can you chip in $100 so we can give the individuals in Follow the Silenced a true red carpet experience on March 15? | | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us. |

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: I’m a little unsure about opening up to you this way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=7f1a5021b91c40e1a4147c6daedbc1c1&_e=MXLLFqVj5Tc7_DBNAYyihjLgeiGlOL0AcGgkWK24R2QeryFg9HM0KjJTUlPSYrWU2WoSqc3A0oodBQv_AlSwb9aHls2cG_ZhgzLIzkR1HCnOuXRvH1215FqxYdd58upEZKQHaPWUHq1WhcnuFIISiQc32qjmkwGZ0km7PLPElre7HOLub9QhN7zS5xRkR66pGR-GC3ocSLm50xthRKs54kZnmxhJebagHPHtpa5RcCqmz9eFhFzhhsOtQxCJ2QhUtsFz8HcI4z5o6U0vx7m7GbwX-KiW3emJqzT3g3PCw7GmeqhWI3-Vyx3ZmZco3AL2Xa077IrAAqlTl1mVkDZqqW0ujqrkx_0zbNC1FJBcQkw%3D)
---

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=7f1a5021b91c40e1a4147c6daedbc1c1&_e=MXLLFqVj5Tc7_DBNAYyihjLgeiGlOL0AcGgkWK24R2QeryFg9HM0KjJTUlPSYrWU2WoSqc3A0oodBQv_AlSwb9aHls2cG_ZhgzLIzkR1HCnOuXRvH1215FqxYdd58upEZKQHaPWUHq1WhcnuFIISicJlnZKlrsk5MaDIy1pYEvyr5PFaO9oVCPmj-s2XrmduzqCDUKnQhCkudL2jnqLr8b33N_50mRgctwikl2q4kS5fmht7hmih6pPlLNbCZNnkflpOesVRPAWr5JuXpQbhTGLaWMyIJNl6rdE7X9SY0mvJMkp09kggN7eXBhiaSD2QvD4Tazca8iQB2X6xxnaVoQ%3D%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=7f1a5021b91c40e1a4147c6daedbc1c1&_e=MXLLFqVj5Tc7_DBNAYyihjLgeiGlOL0AcGgkWK24R2QeryFg9HM0KjJTUlPSYrWU2WoSqc3A0oodBQv_AlSwb9aHls2cG_ZhgzLIzkR1HCnOuXRvH1215FqxYdd58upEZKQHaPWUHq1WhcnuFIISicJlnZKlrsk5MaDIy1pYEvyr5PFaO9oVCPmj-s2XrmduaV-gtbBUzu72_GYmW61VdnDI1hf2ojuAI2EIzS2Xk4R0QtdGZOY0FzutBn8mC_ts9_pSug2L-dfdaGfrA1PFgYjzyEcILggv_810DC1IH8ZYfQ1YOVCX08pn3YLLODOUt8_vqJWWISGBKTeSbbpIBg%3D%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=7f1a5021b91c40e1a4147c6daedbc1c1&_e=MXLLFqVj5Tc7_DBNAYyihjLgeiGlOL0AcGgkWK24R2QeryFg9HM0KjJTUlPSYrWU2WoSqc3A0oodBQv_AlSwb9aHls2cG_ZhgzLIzkR1HCnOuXRvH1215FqxYdd58upEZKQHaPWUHq1WhcnuFIISicJlnZKlrsk5MaDIy1pYEvyr5PFaO9oVCPmj-s2XrmduV27jJRwcjI9Zj8SQ986R2vxujIpx7urE89WzFYnpxwUPyS0Qb8wBiX4bIgfq9NrpWvQrZyknXTvaq1CSxENWrJ6bMUryFGPHftiaXy0om_MQX_vQJzsYzHgZEtQ5PmHeZGsoGywLM2CrCDb35oyPOQ%3D%3D)
Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=7f1a5021b91c40e1a4147c6daedbc1c1&_e=MXLLFqVj5Tc7_DBNAYyihjLgeiGlOL0AcGgkWK24R2QeryFg9HM0KjJTUlPSYrWU2WoSqc3A0oodBQv_AlSwb9aHls2cG_ZhgzLIzkR1HCnOuXRvH1215FqxYdd58upEZKQHaPWUHq1WhcnuFIISiQc32qjmkwGZ0km7PLPElre7HOLub9QhN7zS5xRkR66pLucuLho7Mlxaz8FBsE8S7UB73DZIY9aou61o-m2HQ4b0etN-kERfODEZoAC38cOt7EnU9XQliC4S2SRrWOLoM0qaFjSv9rCgPRqWw2-KLW-mYktSqeJ2PT0TrEYO0x1U6zqkDdkcoMEwti61M5Nub3XsvbK7bHW_h0fernSinG8%3D)**
The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right.

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

clean_body: But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have just won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. Here 's a pic of the whole family in D.C. when I had the honor of being sworn into office. Cleaning up the mess Joe and Kamala left us won't be easy, but it's a challenge I'm eager to take on. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. The talking heads and leftist political know-it-alls say we'll crash and burn before the first 100 days of 2025 are up, and we can't let them be right. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you, and God Bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: March 9th Bolick Brief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5433180eea&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

While many Arizona families are enjoying spring break and spring training, the state legislature has been busy at work. Many bills sponsored by State Senators have passed the State Senate and have been transmitted to the House for consideration and vice versa for the House to the Senate. Last week we resumed our committee assignments since a bulk of the Senate bills were voted out and sent to the House the previous week.

If you are keeping track of some of the legislation at the capitol, you may have heard I sponsored a bill ensuring schools and school districts are creating a cell phone policy. I even went on the [local news](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=438d43267a&e=a7ab36849c) at the end of February to discuss this common sense [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9e1cb8dc29&e=a7ab36849c) I have sponsored. If we want our kids to get back on track, this is one step getting our kids refocused on their academics while in the classroom setting. Several teachers have expressed concerns to me that it’s very difficult to teach because they can’t compete with TikTok and other social media platforms during school. Many current and former school board members around the state also support my bill. In addition to Senate Bill 1226, I have also sponsored a school safety grant program to help schools comply with their cell phone policy by purchasing cell phone cabinets and pouches to store student’s cell phones during class. As a bonus, a cell phone ban during classroom instruction should also reduce some of the bullying taking place in our schools. It is [well-documented](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fc7b628e61&e=a7ab36849c) that excessive cell phone use is not helpful to our kids’ developing brains. Other states have also imposed cell phone bans during classroom instruction so this isn’t a novel idea.

I also sponsored a [bipartisan bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b48740b0a6&e=a7ab36849c) hoping to provide a tool for law enforcement due to a horrendous domestic animal hoarding case in Chandler a few years ago. [Senate Bill 1234](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=030912322e&e=a7ab36849c) will hopefully prevent egregious animal abuse cases by setting parameters to define what adequate food, water and shelter is for companion pets.

Last week, [Noble Predictive Insights](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4a97739c80&e=a7ab36849c) released a recent poll showing voters across political spectrums demanding housing affordability. I have sponsored bipartisan [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e2ab4fc1c6&e=a7ab36849c) to legalize [starter homes](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=47ff0535f6&e=a7ab36849c) on smaller lots, [removing unnecessary government barriers](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=72a78b955a&e=a7ab36849c) that ultimately increase the price of a house. A growing numbers of state legislatures across the country are trying to force cities to allow more density to alleviate the current housing affordability crisis. I have also sponsored a bill to place a moratorium on cities for the next three years from passing any more zoning regulations unless it is in support of health and public safety. Why should a city zoning department dictate to a future homeowner what type of roof or color their house will be?

Even the [Trump Administratio](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e7c2b1734e&e=a7ab36849c)n is focused on figuring out how to reduce regulatory burdens to make housing affordable, again. Speaking of bureaucratic overreach, I sponsored Senate Bill 1627 to give every day Arizonans clearer access to [rules and guidance](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3a3935292c&e=a7ab36849c) coming from government agencies.

With the hopes of countering “eggflation” due to avian flu, I have sponsored a [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a87f39b603&e=a7ab36849c) to undo rulemaking by the state’s Department of Agriculture. A leftwing group from California initially threatened to put a measure on the ballot in 2020 to require all eggs sold in Arizona to come from cage-free hens. Ultimately, they went to the state agency to avoid going to the voters. The USDA warned this week that egg prices could rise by 41 percent by the end of this year. Here's to hoping my bill passes and is signed to alleviate soaring prices at the grocery store.

More and more, both political parties have been trying to weaponize our judicial branch. My husband penned this recent [article](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=aa25f473e8&e=a7ab36849c) providing commentary on this very subject.

As you may know, I have filed to run for another two-year term in 2026 representing Legislative District 2. If you live in District 2, [please sign my online nomination petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4447c96709&e=a7ab36849c) that helps ensure my name appears on the Republican primary ballot.

If you're so inclined, please [donate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8a44d88d3b&e=a7ab36849c) to our campaign. As you may know we had to raise close to $400,000 dollars last election to save this seat. If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, please [email me](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=Volunteer) and let me know how you'd like to help us secure this seat.

_State Senate Press_

Ballot Measure to Ban Foreign Funding and Election Influence
[https://www.azsenaterepublicans.gov/post/ballot-measure-to-ban-foreign-funding-and-election-influence-passes-senate-one-step-closer-to-voter](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9689d9d498&e=a7ab36849c)

Starter Homes Act to Make Home Ownership Affordable for Hardworking Arizonans Passes Senate
[https://www.azsenaterepublicans.gov/post/bipartisan-starter-homes-to-make-homeownership-affordable-for-hardworking-arizonans-passes-senate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1a28bacb5a&e=a7ab36849c)

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna
